name: Gov. Gavin Newsom (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 can change the game
body:
As you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynY0BT0TZhrtzHx_RQeNOP5dewtulschGCKEEfieE8zwlCh4V8NXJN_tjlHotreAz84fpSDRkrocRKkGSCF2BXiflxDRaBUi7Nx9fyzcgeksc8FjwbztHXtTfDQObrPObD52mKGN3oCc9J_hthw6yWdMoykOsflkf0Qm-bUIzE5nAZUdkE3vRrOmyhxsbiWNsJAxmoJE0521oBDlUdinxV-KoHOIiLf2LGVSXsXYLoR5amPEEtwZ2ye1mg9d4mJSZ5BZRWCpTju3_llynQBQHDRXZeq3Ox45veNe5CEWUQH8ZsJsZc6pFAm4riWaVMoz3J7dWXleVYHkhmsgQl1SsdWZKnUYomtEhfwrhls5HpqWpxvq1Sv1p_28HbgENFhUGACk3E4O6uo4ZJYCuxMm92qp3G6mJ-aOH9wg48xSPbvJdEMedbCjrAdEy5d4I52YuVOF1-F7kjnTgiZZLo6sWikL6y1waC_hBZz8TI6NvP3-GbjCnau51td6GQtqH4wCylpl8BgEUzSC4jHBk1od_ZsqRZeJpaNYHtL5LldW_1Ug/3zv/Zckce5pxSpOwhFy6S9tS-w/h0/Nc1bd7jNWDIb6VRLE9um-dulmRnhXxorWPeRbBirClM) Hi, it’s California Governor Gavin Newsom. As governor, I urge every leader in our country to use compassion, protect democracy, treasure diversity, and so much more. But as you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. Both the Virginia House and Senate are up for grabs in **_just 45 days_** , and the margins are ultra-thin, so we need to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win. [That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in $7 to the DLCC:](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynY0BT0TZhrtzHx_RQeNOP5dewtulschGCKEEfieE8zwlCh4V8NXJN_tjlHotreAz84fpSDRkrocRKkGSCF2BXiflxDRaBUi7Nx9fyzcgeksc8FjwbztHXtTfDQObrPObD52mKGN3oCc9J_hthw6yWIdxPIVe0fGIP1jwL-g85-wKmq8Mf2SaiLSfrooc3VkONjSom1wt8GxYHtEzOAWSFzI-xfOdoiX0kwBbpWGW_2e1C-PCHy0Gohy8RXkay96hS-ugoY1IDf06GPnGlHzy47KNUyIL9jnzcg6QMvy-3ianGJRrFVnO2x-gRIhfen3N8z7TH9LbDoknu92fVkFVofS3UuovPc71M9HC3DZj7VNbXpeK0iePsfktbnbuPEVzWFGzxqUByMPB-NTP3JADpSXvaFj7bOdrBKCnDtsTdrJ-9t7x_9DFMH6sGQOqIWRNf2sL0PeQ5tUUiAW9wfEWZokBL4WnrXitopr8qgucbko2wtAMROOJ_Kn4nfEbAOKxA9InmjTX_u_63kz8Z7AeyJ2fH9giyYWOYOaXaH2S-QoSggJIAJTNs9JqNM8_AExA/3zv/Zckce5pxSpOwhFy6S9tS-w/h1/nVmSUZVFuuHBZolCedlWSZNmiGlW3yoQzv7Q7zW7kow) **$7 to protect abortion rights** – every sitting Republican legislator in Virginia is on the record with an explicit anti-abortion stance – if they secure a trifecta, they’ll pass dangerous restrictions on abortion. **$7 to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community** , fighting back against Republican-backed bills that ban gender-affirming care for minors and target LGBTQ+ students. **$7 to protect expanded access to the ballot box** by safeguarding early voting laws and protecting Virginians against voter intimidation. **_And that’s just scratching the surface – common sense gun safety, public education, and paid parental and family leave are all on the ballot in Virginia._** [To power Democrats to victory in Virginia, I’m calling on you: Will you rush $7 right now to give state Democrats the resources they need to compete against Republicans’ multi-million dollar war chest in Virginia and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynY0BT0TZhrtzHx_RQeNOP5dewtulschGCKEEfieE8zwlCh4V8NXJN_tjlHotreAz84fpSDRkrocRKkGSCF2BXiflxDRaBUi7Nx9fyzcgeksc8FjwbztHXtTfDQObrPObD52mKGN3oCc9J_hthw6yWIdxPIVe0fGIP1jwL-g85-2fv4ymnpL2vh5HvsIwPlWCxl-fqmwDKXao__W8FfzRdbgaz1d8ofKVYIwrMEjLmhzjS9f4wGE6OPC5nyPex4JMscSiLgjIlkz1QPSPR_3ud-z_C1Jcs25-i3JNDqO2NjK-5K06cbE0YeEumVHotvPPxgIduvxQPjDQHDSbJ01fMXu73X8pHAZE3yKgGGpjvF-T9B9WmFfA2LPM7udtMK2HUWRbdq3oI4gISLK3vDCInuOIad5viSlvfStg5OoClMj-bny5lpV-oA4g1fukhBYYMxguWTt68OUFTTM4mg318gc0E2uAMnIpAdsPqLqqKJCE3q61Vmv6snXxK8lrcee4k-70eOP3XIJ7vb-Bi_LEpk35cVIC-HaxoEFbaq55GFNRNKBiANZERcH2QV3YeQcQ/3zv/Zckce5pxSpOwhFy6S9tS-w/h2/EZhP9WCPcI9--g0jaCzZbgnNOIphBQ06Gdq8Y5GJlw4) I’ve seen firsthand what Democratic state legislators can accomplish with legislative majorities, but with Republicans pouring millions into these races, we need to be ready for an uphill battle this November. **The GOP is laser-focused on making Virginia the next state to ban abortion – but with enough support from grassroots Democrats like you, we can block their far-right agenda, and elect leaders who will protect our fundamental freedoms.** [ So I’m asking you one more time: Will you donate $7 or more to the DLCC to fuel the fight against Republican extremism and elect Democrats in Virginia and nationwide? As governor, I urge every leader in our country to use compassion, protect democracy, treasure diversity, and so much more. But as you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. Both the Virginia House and Senate are up for grabs in just 45 days , and the margins are ultra-thin, so we need to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win. $7 to protect abortion rights – every sitting Republican legislator in Virginia is on the record with an explicit anti-abortion stance – if they secure a trifecta, they’ll pass dangerous restrictions on abortion. $7 to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community , fighting back against Republican-backed bills that ban gender-affirming care for minors and target LGBTQ+ students. $7 to protect expanded access to the ballot box by safeguarding early voting laws and protecting Virginians against voter intimidation. And that’s just scratching the surface – common sense gun safety, public education, and paid parental and family leave are all on the ballot in Virginia. I’ve seen firsthand what Democratic state legislators can accomplish with legislative majorities, but with Republicans pouring millions into these races, we need to be ready for an uphill battle this November. [**Peter, I checked ActBlue and as of 11am, I’m still 3,000 gifts short of my End of Quarter budget goal. I’m reaching out to my strongest allies to see if you’ll help me close the gap in these final 7 days. Will you be one of the 3,000 supporters I need you to renew your Democratic Membership by splitting a donation between me and The Collective PAC before midnight?>>**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd08Cnt8yETzp0d4OIwup9OjW5ZeyHYGrd6usiMhK5-Yoi3spTGf55kV1jrjdg7cwF9npX1kLty38HM2YrKIe1VwqiBJqKYwIZn4FaJwFpH3wyTpDOC0W4jZjgFgswrLpKK_AGQL9inb_ZsuNAg1Mh_MFLzuy9DsOzdl6inB3nnrVSPbIaQSVFrui8klm4mJFI0YmfoQrOsbB2QRSrPYzjdfRzynBboXqIoBFwSP-Mec6x5mQtDVeyTacRFL7NKzRFt8irZRcwvwjsk_tVkDeNYwK0fE3POxymxVrL4iG_1hg_ijJbjJWtSbMJnz6tJL8-yiHN8PJ6uxw8b_gt3WSwoyUtLpNxH3rToUyqP6PaFw/3zv/vpzsYyNBQN6JAIV78IoHcg/h2/INqNc9EFcjncAYxBa1k64ilKXpoJPeyG5r0Egw2Tj2g) I’ll cut straight to it, Peter.

With help from Cresco supporters like you, we’ve made so much progress in our work to reclaim the House.

Extreme MAGA Republicans are pushing wild conspiracy theories, attacking abortion rights and threatening to end Social Security and Medicare as we know it. Democrats need to rally together to defend our vision for our country.
**It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $10 in these final 7 days:

I can’t tell you how much it means to me.

**We are showing the entire country that there is nothing Americans cannot accomplish when we band together.**

Democrats are putting People Over Politics to grow the middle class and make life affordable for everyday families.

We’re not done yet, we must take back the House to make our vision for the future a reality.

**[That’s where you come in, Peter. Our success depends on the resources we gather in the next 7 days. I’m humbly asking: Is there any way I can count on your $10 before midnight? I need 3,000 supporters to renew your Democratic Membership to close our budget gap, rush resources to our most critical races and help Democrats reclaim our House majority. Will you split a gift between me and The Collective PAC before it’s too late?>>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd08Cnt8yETzp0d4OIwup9OjW5ZeyHYGrd6usiMhK5-Yoi3spTGf55kV1jrjdg7cwF9npX1kLty38HM2YrKIe1VwqiBJqKYwIZn4FaJwFpH3wyTpDOC0W4jZjgFgswrLpKK_AGQL9inb_ZsuNAg1MhLe-18GQIePWKcAbTArUwVSnN0Ew_XUB78l8M2LFYb3NBkizSAqUVmssElPu9yE6YsakgE_dSmsbnR3VfiuTXvEGFjD4UNjsTPhF9HtFo8BqTyDjiJLAAUkOwJ1JRpLwcrLyUCu1_Y0XjAQutDYn0ZrMy2J2vL0hrndm82rS58veXUdF6Ir8an2tEcBaKiYXuahtQGJxQMyjr-BiHi43i0A/3zv/vpzsYyNBQN6JAIV78IoHcg/h5/XtmFM80oljWe2z3yr9eJkIvnQ8rdqB0UzQDFQs_9_9U)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Hakeem Jeffries and The Collective PAC.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLirRJC-n-pox9wHt1ehI8sb5NT8RsBszj-PTbRSvGoeltP3-BZcssvLqmG4NOV3z8JK2do4Vg4VY0uZDiTFj0b8X7NlNWFKT1XHOAZcWrS5fMvvGCFdasLjr9KB-TRDZ4kse8BtckTiFhvGfyPYceu1nHXJnEigvIwfDgIz_HvU-bz8uu1k13Zy6266mL3CM09Cchb2x3SHF-XY4wVuQ-STBe8bITZiicvERWrzAfEorEaDBkqEr5K7XcnRH_zsuelbatIEocL8esJftHzgr3uJqlMA62b7Y_kD88-3qfF2XQ/3zv/vpzsYyNBQN6JAIV78IoHcg/h12/kX4mlTGqpPx3u3eiK6Cx-nD0NYGrBgGEOaOgpQpVj1o) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

Democrats need to rally together to defend our vision for our country. It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $10 in these final 7 days: FOR: Peterdpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, all your support humbles me. I can’t tell you how much it means to me. body:
We’re on the ground in counties big and small. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70253318/428785746/17860314?refcode=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjY1NmItNzI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tFgpiDsBlz-sFO0K9uAzZZ3V6-QtlqoEinnYRxFdzpU=)

Peter, Earlier this year, Mississippi lawmakers passed a measure that makes it easier to remove active voters from being able to participate in local elections. **That’s why our team has been on the ground in every corner of the state, working to register voters and make sure no one is left on the sidelines this year.** [But here’s the catch: we need to raise $108,000 by the end of the month to fund this work, or we’ll have to cut back our targets. Can you donate right now to make sure we have the funds to register voters in all 82 counties?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70253319/428785747/974620941?refcode=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjY1NmItNzI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tFgpiDsBlz-sFO0K9uAzZZ3V6-QtlqoEinnYRxFdzpU=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70253320/428785748/974620941?refcode=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjY1NmItNzI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tFgpiDsBlz-sFO0K9uAzZZ3V6-QtlqoEinnYRxFdzpU=)**
---
Our Voter Protection Team has:
* Recruited 150 poll watchers in a month
* Registered 500 voters during National Voter Registration Week
* Restored the status of HUNDREDS of voters wrongfully placed on inactive status

We’re doing this in counties big and small. Hinds, Lincoln, Oktibbeha, and Forrest County – we aren’t leaving a single voter behind.
Every dollar that we raise goes toward important resources, like hiring lawyers and expanding our campaign team. We’ll also use the funds for direct outreach efforts, including phone calls and door-knocking to connect with voters directly.
**And our campaign strategy is working.**
That’s why recent polling shows a TIED race – 46% to 46%. But with time running out until Election Day, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for a second. If we don’t meet this $108,000 fundraising goal by the end of the month, we’ll have to make serious cuts to our voter protection work.
[That’s why we’re asking, Peter. Can you invest $25 right now into our campaign’s voter protection work? Any amount helps us fire Tate Reeves this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70253321/428785749/974620941?refcode=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60eb656b-725a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjY1NmItNzI1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tFgpiDsBlz-sFO0K9uAzZZ3V6-QtlqoEinnYRxFdzpU=)

Brandon Presley for Governor

Let me level with you, Peter.

I was just running through our numbers and noticed our finances aren’t where I’d like them to be at this point in the month.

You see, being short by even a few dollars can throw off our entire budget. That means we may have to cut back on our plans over the next few critical months of this campaign.

**If you have a few bucks to spare, I’d really appreciate it if you could add a contribution to our campaign before our critical end-of-quarter deadline.**

Look, I hate asking you for money, but your grassroots donations help us keep the lights on and pay for staff.

_**[That’s why I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign today. No pressure though, I know how hard you work for every dollar—and I’ll never take your support for granted. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Meet the leader we have in Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6bpee3io389div3q64dq6febndkemnqon1q2jv0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaj6loiep7hgvkkesj6iniphqemmdtbvd37pucjo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zualr8137bbees9dd3pks7m123048b0o9lfpuf1o_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zemkqfn76cguse1hv09sdm4r29kq1m3e2fle0m98_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8h90ppjsoghhfaqpkmuoh892s2g4khp1f357720_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0gcjsp8ivnagh1hubfj6ps5bothkks5dtdeibv8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zifvldo0jcpjo29frvldsid6s1p983v9ktkn9c7o_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9pg3d9urbql6br8loavpeaghau5lf2u351hoj00_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zujjpu3aucb3p4leordubovhsb523ubenisjled0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm1pr4c3h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

name: Betsy, Nikki Haley for President
subject: Campaign Update: 09/24/23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9f0a38894197b7b36ac864733040f269a25f61c1f454d450c72bdf0003373ecdba15f23a09ccd8d3b8e097dc8996962c34d737d682435d60b34148ece5fe9684 To: Peter From: Betsy A. Date: 09/24/2023 RE: State of the race Hi Peter, it’s Betsy, Nikki’s campaign manager. After another great New Hampshire swing, an economic policy rollout, and some mother-daughter time at yesterday’s Clemson game, Nikki’s finishing up her debate prep ahead of her second presidential debate on Wednesday. Since the first debate, we’ve gained a massive amount of support on the ground, poll numbers have surged, and our momentum has never been higher. But buckle up, because this is only the beginning. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us, and we’ll continue to fight for every inch. Now, take a look at my memo below to get the full rundown of the current state of the race and what’s still to come. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9f0a38894197b7b36ac864733040f269a25f61c1f454d450c72bdf0003373ecdba15f23a09ccd8d3b8e097dc8996962c34d737d682435d60b34148ece5fe9684 After you finish reading, please consider chipping in $20.24 to keep our momentum strong as we enter the next stretch of the campaign. CAMPAIGN STRATEGY UPDATE AS OF 09/24/2023: SURGING IN THE POLLS: In every early state poll that has been released over the past week, Nikki is the only candidate who has consistently gained ground while others have fallen. Nikki is now in a close third in Iowa, second or third in New Hampshire, and a solid second in South Carolina. Nikki also remains far and away the strongest challenger against Joe Biden in a general election. And while the polls continue to reflect the surging momentum for Nikki, Nikki is full speed ahead. Just this week, Nikki had another New Hampshire swing, bringing her tally of total campaign stops across the country to more than 120. And let me tell you, every event has seen a surge of support on the ground that’s bigger than ever before. Everywhere we look, people are flooding out of venues into overflow rooms. ECONOMIC FREEDOM PLAN: While Nikki was in Manchester, Nikki delivered a major policy speech where she rolled out her Economic Freedom Plan. Here’s a glimpse of her plan: - Provide thousands of dollars in tax relief for middle-class families. - Eliminate the federal gas tax to help families struggling with high gas prices. - Cut income tax rates for working families. - Veto any spending bill that doesn’t take us back to pre-COVID spending levels. - Send more power to the states. - If Congress fails to pass a budget on time, they will fail to get a paycheck. No budget, no pay! Nikki will strengthen the middle class, cut out-of-control spending and debt to bring down inflation, and put more money in the pockets of hard working Americans. IMPORTANT DATES: → In just THREE DAYS, Nikki will take the stage for the second presidential debate. We all saw how Nikki dominated the stage in the first debate, telling hard truths and showcasing her vision for the future. As more voters across America tune in to watch the second debate, it’ll be a great opportunity to bring even more supporters into the fold. Leading up to the debate, it’s so important we’re prepared and ready to capitalize on the momentum after Nikki walks off stage. And YOU can do simple things to make that happen. Whether it’s putting a bumper sticker on your car, sticking a yard sign in your front lawn, organizing a debate watch party with a couple of friends to cheer Nikki on, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9f0a38894197b7b36ac864733040f269a25f61c1f454d450c72bdf0003373ecdba15f23a09ccd8d3b8e097dc8996962c34d737d682435d60b34148ece5fe9684 or chipping in to help us have the resources needed to amplify Nikki’s message. Make sure to TUNE IN on September 27 at 9 pm ET on Fox Business and watch Nikki crush it on the debate stage! UPDATE ON OUR GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT: My team and I could really use your help to send Nikki a HUGE wave of support before she takes the stage for the second debate this week! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9f0a38894197b7b36ac864733040f269a25f61c1f454d450c72bdf0003373ecdba15f23a09ccd8d3b8e097dc8996962c34d737d682435d60b34148ece5fe9684 Will you step up with a donation to let Nikki know you have her back ahead of this important campaign milestone? Your donation will not only send Nikki a BOOST of support, BUT it will also help provide our campaign with the resources we need to WIN the White House! I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come – a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 – there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment – vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://trk.readactnews._2aOrvTB2W7mRVK-4Ltw)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://trk.readactnews._JK4gtslw)**

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNjctNzhlMGQzMjM4MmQxNDAzM2E3MTFmYTEzMWRmNTEwNWMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/2Wp7B0vtBs0Mo60hM1dgDw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh24jafdl3ajs4bhmuga32v46ifgpoqh6q2ua8f8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm9or1c1h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77qssa9v0j7cni1h3gp3mo5qqect24ghl5l6vtg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm9or6clh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s True Legacy
body:
| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst “president” of the United States...but Barack Obama is still the worst thing that happened to our republic. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008._ __He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.__ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage.__ __And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have joined other conservative powerhouses to publish _Barack Obama’s True Legacy_ –[and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zikqmbduk9mu6ualqfailqpan3fvmabebmcglqbo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm9or1cdh2bs)** So many of our fellow citizens think the nightmare we’ve been living for the past three years came from nowhere. They think that this “administration” is made up of incompetent fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden’s cognitive state. But the truth is much darker, friend. **This decline was by design – and in many ways, Barack Hussein Obama was its chief architect.** That’s why I believe _Barack Obama’s True Legacy_ is one of the most important books of the year, [**and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today today, I’ll send you a complimentary copy.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8tccj4i25lgugp7n062jo9nn4bhfrsh1018jnio_rp22sh2s8i66p75clgm9or1cdh2bs) In his first week in office, Joe Biden signed a record number of executive orders, taking a wrecking ball to all the hard work President Trump did to get our country back on track. He brought us back to where Obama left off, and now, with his White House full of Obama holdovers, he intends to finish what his old boss started. We can’t let that happen, friend. But if we can’t stop an enemy that we don’t understand. That’s where this incredible book comes in, and why I need patriots like you to read it immediately.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Michael FinchPresident, The David Horowitz Freedom Center
---

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The Beginning of Our Great American Comeback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfscg1jb57mul7bgijblvs62008qqcskd9imjb8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7tppafub7egdrvjujiv4ob120jt0bu4gaudf1p8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf44qp55ur7v1v6ce0grtuilnoq3ujp1nm87kdpo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51lfrfh50s1qh9b0242samg6dsnlkb91mpdfrd8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpb1el6k5h8grp3r5hf8b09o223o6ob25dilmbe0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmnavjoqedsbptm9hq45b8n7dobgt7o8vno8fe4o_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlvh98ht863pd47qf8kld4sobgfebfbki62mjis0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgf6dptv6mpj9mi4hta1aqth21uh51k24mcejtrg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvnmvk101lqsq26q08r0eli3evkljce5coqupf88_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim0pb2chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678697%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jk4DHwCb6b08xi59fddPVg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678698%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YxPeyf9e2uqIg8IGhFiKwg&sysid=1)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678699%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IZBpDTz5Po3AoQ2z56HFAA&sysid=1)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678697%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jk4DHwCb6b08xi59fddPVg&sysid=1)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678690%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eXFPi73nl3jStD9nWEYGUg&sysid=1)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678697%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jk4DHwCb6b08xi59fddPVg&sysid=1)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678691%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=apEA3t9uIOioAP0Ws%2bsCLw&sysid=1)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678692%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Tpm2AZ8B%2fCLZzZFPc0gtA&sysid=1)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678693%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SFzrGo51LFvdFj9NE0qlLQ&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
