body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgagf3c8n6d6n71eu1rr15hu8682647cl63rmg6o_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbu6a8mieff2nk59mrbsr6kct9mk5ln2gin5n8r8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zilp3dpfg1sen3s34q9qlo2nuricea9l6ftk4958_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlpbaehrdjg0t0tu3eltl3dr6e0fvrv7m5go6eo0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z44c9skb7ru5p39c0fa548puj6hl212tt5dtib2g_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8jochdc2ign2bmdhoo5v191qlae3e4img9og4g0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zar190hcm32gbr233r3eulh6u3our8fg1veec3i8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0o8jdvgl55d9ib5j68qtb6568dcei6ge1sfcjtg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgslpfglsg2sbgj6mk1cofnjhm02mkfhn59cmrho_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim4pj6cth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

subject: Under Attack & Above the Target

body:
We will not be subjected to the failing policies of the radical Left any longer. Watch here to understand our Great American Comeback.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kydwAbqb2i1Lu1C28yVGvA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23178%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bqLDR7OUgdQZG73ZDAtRUQ&sysid=1)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23179%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JsM6wxd5BM8YXZyr5zaXyQ&sysid=1)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kydwAbqb2i1Lu1C28yVGvA&sysid=1)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5hYPh%2fAlj8ig%2bDLBzlESww&sysid=1)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kydwAbqb2i1Lu1C28yVGvA&sysid=1)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=14h5ybfvtvIipQ9hliarMQ&sysid=1)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3lo%2faeneNXgxJOsArqPfOQ&sysid=1)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pmgJlsQ%2blQRQ9gVDwuqhRA&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zftebb63m931iauvvsl3688ksgkquiktpanu9e6o_rp22sh2s8i66p75climcoj2c5h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrb5jk4pipddku1hjqjnnernlf5fd9ttn664kfu8_rp22sh2s8i66p75climcoj2c5h2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9g8lpqn5jcjopkmruelltfugp0p712tvqul9bv8_rp22sh2s8i66p75climcoj2c5h2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bXlzdGVyaWVzX2VuZF90aW1lcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9TUE80MzEwNSJ9/VP9wgTrMsAqcQcEbvDgt6A)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come – a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 – there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment – vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bXlzdGVyaWVzX2VuZF90aW1lcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9TUE80MzEwNSJ9/EMWav4uwe1_iQMC19YODWg)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bXlzdGVyaWVzX2VuZF90aW1lcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9TUE80MzEwNSJ9/jKmc1Pd1xPzZbszeZlFvtQ)**

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjY3LWFjOWQyYTY5YjZlNTQxYzRiMDZmMWVmMjEwZWU1MjFjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/-Ic7P6vQbyOt77yHe4aAhQ) to unsubscribe.
---

DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**

---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zddbfsveekuvs5en3ug00qib4rlt51umblca84qg_rp22sh2s8i66p75climepr2cjh2bs)

| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjkpeshq64pmaajkk64ajmibgirajl862qfv8v70_rp22sh2s8i66p75climepr2cjh2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ki5tguk3hdb9mgajis2j7g3qapbdtvbalha96g_rp22sh2s8i66p75climepr2cjh2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg419eh38eaktlvm8e129dt4cii540glu2m8t0cg_rp22sh2s8i66p75climepr2cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is dangerous. We need an energetic executive as our next President who will: RIP UP Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks. STOP THE INVASION worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation. RESTORE patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military. FIGHT back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces. | | | This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. subject: Ron DeSantis is leading our Great American Comeback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsa0l5sr884o944dieqrmqsrtjrmotc0nub5u7ng_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr174dged5ivc3rc3hd631c20n6oln9qflqvb8q0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zslfllfd7oin1774htrh54un61dmmjembbkpqoq0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjcv1157su1tlai5gb0qv6tfoj2caqktpi88t2j8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb6i6pg73a4k81jkjm92truq8ll722s3bau6in00_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs6dvt9t9tg5r03qci6jebm4jsdu4nj3a9ogca40_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3kj8ldgesr7ltcjntoiqa3oiqan45jv16u0f2e0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znlq7h42pmp9q5oltvuh1ck9diuoee5hfiq6mg50_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcgnidkvbvusgnmbq0vka70096noqdqau06edho8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clim9pb6c9h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

- House GOP

To: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23197%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j0Y0vEtvU0Gd%2fEhHW7nXzA&sysid=1 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
Subject: Please complete my NEW Impeachment Inquiry Survey

---
My fellow Americans:

**My colleagues and I just took the major step of launching an impeachment inquiry into the 46th President of the United States: Joseph R. Biden.**

I didn’t take this step lightly. But the evidence pointing to deep corruption and possible HIGH CRIMES AND MISDEMEANORS are impossible to ignore.

Biden’s inner circle has been stonewalling us at every single turn. So we’re taking matters into our own hands.

Because this is such a historic moment for our country, it is critically important to me that I check in with our grassroots team. Things are changing by the second so I just launched _**[my first-ever Impeachment Inquiry Survey.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23198%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ftpttgC2%2f53htgffrZF6OQ&sysid=1 "my first-ever Impeachment
Inquiry Survey.")**_

_Consider this your direct line of communication with House Republican leadership._

Your answers will be reviewed by me and my team, and I’ll keep your feedback to help guide the important next steps in this inquiry.

The only catch is I need to hear from you ASAP.

Forgive me for being so blunt but we’re finalizing our next steps as you read this email. I’m opening this survey for _JUST 20 MINUTES_ from the time you open this email to respond.

I’m attaching your unique link to access the survey portal below - thanks for responding with haste.

Thanks for all you do, Patriot. I mean it.

I look forward to reviewing your response soon. Sorry I have to ask for such a quick turnaround.

**Steve Scalise**

clean_body: Your response is critical at a time like this | | | | | If you are receiving this email, we have NOT received your response to our Impeachment Inquiry Survey. | | | "BEGIN YOUR IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY SURVEY" "The first hearing is officially scheduled for THIS WEEK so consider this your last chance to respond before then. " Thanks for your prompt response. - House GOP \---------------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------------- From: Majority Leader Steve Scalise To: "dpwillis67@gmail.com" Subject: Please complete my NEW Impeachment Inquiry Survey My fellow Americans: My colleagues and I just took the major step of launching an impeachment inquiry into the 46th President of the United States: Joseph R. Biden. I didn’t take this step lightly. But the evidence pointing to deep corruption and possible HIGH CRIMES AND MISDEMEANORS are impossible to ignore. Biden’s inner circle has been stonewalling us at every single turn. So we’re taking matters into our own hands. Because this is such a historic moment for our country, it is critically important to me that I check in with our grassroots team. Things are changing by the second so I just launched "my first-ever Impeachment Inquiry Survey." | | | "IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY SURVEY: ACCESS GRANTED" Consider this your direct line of communication with House Republican leadership. Your answers will be reviewed by me and my team, and I’ll keep your feedback to help guide the important next steps in this inquiry. The only catch is I need to hear from you ASAP. Forgive me for being so blunt but we’re finalizing our next steps as you read this email. I’m opening this survey for JUST 20 MINUTES from the time you open this email to respond. I’m attaching your unique link to access the survey portal below - thanks for responding with haste. "IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY SURVEY PORTAL" Your Unique Access Link Attached Here: "" * Remember \-- This link goes offline in 15 minutes Official Notice: Please do not share this link with anyone. It is only registered to your email - nobody else’s. You have been given special access to answer this survey so please keep this to yourself. Thank you. Thanks for all you do, Patriot. I mean it. I look forward to reviewing your response soon. Sorry I have to ask for such a quick turnaround. Onward, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | | "IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY SURVEY: ACCESS GRANTED" | AMAZING news! You're only 1 GIFT AWAY from receiving a coveted spot in Steve Scalise's Majority Leader Founding Circle! There is no minimum donation to join, even $5 will snag your place in this premier digital membership of elite grassroots supporters. | | | "button" | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z276ua7th2jgusd3tl00q9ccrfvnhmac854sl4a0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm0ob2chh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7lb1n4ppbc0kqe26jmos8r95o5f0shndvj6vq50_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm0ob2chh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9dqoi2i6uilg65qh9b2q2o4068sbofpcqcrnt8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm0ob2chh2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztv68del3p89ho6i4pee6cocesallafn7b6dndg0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm0ob2chh2bs)
---

[**Support the Freedom Center through a contribution today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl8iqep7oai15o3poil5f0fcv02qtru6b0rdtch8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm0ob2chh2bs) © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Meet the leader we have in Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
We will not be subjected to the failing policies of the radical Left any longer. Watch here to understand our Great American Comeback.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4qa7plgu4g8p3v6u4mbrjosms0uerjard9ojug_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztiuvg8jj2e2a7hfqpnof5h6frjt5ui9tasb3kl8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsle087iahne4egkcoivgkdnsr0vqjspe0r6up48_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkjnm248di18gcm2a8eia71vb24cupecj7dbb30_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlok0f1spol50efe61one453utvh5jmnv578co00_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1uc885qr9il4pokusm208nerouq3ahudlbv7m90_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52hi2h688dlnu98uicb7dsj71ji1f3ta99td9n0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm9f9bkenuna4e5ki5epubqribho3d2v4qi0s2mg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpg22fo91p08eubojjabo56elpapihva7a5en2b8_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm8pj4c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
