Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [Urgent] We MISSED our National Public Lands Day goal, but there’s still time to make up the difference.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
This is urgent, friend. **We thought we were sure to hit our National Public Lands Day goal yesterday. But when we checked the numbers, we saw that we’re still falling short. This is a huge blow to our efforts to protect vulnerable animals and the lands they live on – and it’s coming at the worst possible moment for our planet. Here's why:**
**Trophy hunters are using their powerful lobby to attack the Endangered Species Act, one of our most crucial and effective environmental laws. And they’re getting a major boost from destructive industries like mining, logging and oil companies.** These greedy corporations are hell-bent on destroying wildlife habitats to extract more fossil fuels. At this point in the climate crisis, the consequences for our dangerously warming planet could be disastrous. **And vulnerable species like our LAST gray wolves are feeling the pressure on all sides. **
That’s why we’re taking a chance and **EXTENDING our fundraising deadline for ONE MORE DAY** to make sure you get the chance to chip in. We know you care about the future of our planet’s fragile ecosystems and the creatures facing corporate-driven extinction. So we had to pull your supporter record before our fundraising extension expires. Here’s what we found:
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008625?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**EXTENSION EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. TONIGHT
**WOLVES AND BEARS: FACING EXTINCTION**
---
| | [RUSH MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008625?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Extension_
_expires 11:59 p.m. This is your last chance to help hit our critical National Public Lands Day goal, friend._
---
We can’t sugarcoat it, friend – we’re worried. We set our goal of hitting $60,000 before our National Public Lands Day deadline because the situation for vulnerable wolf pups, bear cubs and other threatened creatures is dire. **Fossil fuel corporations are TRIPLING DOWN on their planet-killing exploitation and pollution. They're seeking every opportunity to expand their dirty operations into some of the most pristine wilderness areas we have left. We can help stop them by protecting the Endangered Species Act and fighting to keep our precious public lands safe for essential wildlife. But time is running out, and we must increase our efforts to fight dirty industries before it’s too late. **
That’s why we can’t afford any gap in our fundraising budget. Every dollar has a job to do in our fight against well-funded, anti-environment corporations. If we miss our goal, our planet-saving work gets harder, and we risk losing more ecosystems and their inhabitants to fossil fuel destruction.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008625?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[**Our extension only lasts until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. So please: Rush your $27 or more membership gift now and every dollar will power our efforts to fight dirty industries and protect wolves, bears and ****the only Earth we’ll ever get.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008626?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Fellow American,
**_
It’s time for me to give away another gun!_**

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash.

With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, **we’re once again in need.** So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – _**one of my favorites**_ – a Kimber 1911 stainless II!

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3TUdc1Oa1iOPb-ziliWpg5ax5XNuiLx5xmqPy_S44PqkV6GxUsrE5w975fgbLHmKDyvzqI5ZF0x3d6DBv1kJwUh-Y6wm0BVpmp6pf2ZH-s0aL-9NvYNsgtv5LZ_rs1DQB5Xspi_qpdT9ns_Ia3Wj8kQ%3D%3D)
Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, **[now is your chance.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3rDo7LIFDgJE5hklKUZUEaBO91mTS1B8msFFeFTLl0QEJlZpVNMbENRWYLlkqDBKa8twNklvdEKzTtVnn9kTsRCmQShGkcx1Voayhul12JKgQoBSCYxuDXf2oOiPhFBTqqRr1CF8ccNN6WLzSVA9udw%3D%3D)**

Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?”

It’s simple: **[The $9.11 donation that I’m asking you to make right now](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3E1jogd2jBdnNdopE3I2Zf8hnSsBnAR34065MZl4QbzENPg-XOpgA3vTJ0U2EdLaOWkNeR5hAz6CYsduWC3cZOTa1qy4HE80GxjVzCdwlziBwGNshzcYqGoAbRO7qJKy0YztQ2-4_12xcBSPgClYDkg%3D%3D)** for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024.

**Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? **

[**ENTER FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN TODAY »**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3pYqao93blj9YC74cx5Sb5VU5BCF8Hj9kClEogvYGRkHZVCuCzPOgw0fBtCoUwITsCzXFOUCmV4L2PH69kiWtL49OVLy3Is9A4cRSzsqKvBxwPs35OW6Ryp4dKQ3OG22-2a_NXe_5qwuM4ubmr5t38w%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN $9.11
ENTER THE RAFFLE »**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3hIHyet9U4VkCdH8EWcB75y-ck92wcZeKjskoQrHJMbSTlFeY7ah6iVLdRNFUE30w-zrgd26M3IiGy9v78YiUWW_ARptOww6RrbEIkkJo88nhUST_MBTSc-9FMQmrx_84TDHJA91Kq1L6il391BTQ4g%3D%3D)
As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.

Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time.

Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them.

Responsible gun owners obey the law.

Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to **[secure your support for my Republican U.S. Senate campaign.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3MNov4R5S93oph_OpjpDsqATGKSe4Wc37DCI9mAROia3P1522qVvlx-0aC6NywjIcnblZYVd0xKSi1QbR65j9imV1jsX9r5BPpfc5GUpXILHvvXwcsKlHpFsIso9aLFeIsnoPLmwcnhlqabK0TdNT8Q%3D%3D)**

**This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle.**

If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5229b26c075c4d98a59c24b6ce04134a&_e=9hjLht_2Tj3G9oDK02BDwDZ-kH3W1iviC6xowaE_r8y5tHGrpNKKEYIcESVxbuAhtboJVpMu2ZFkpZgvw0w6pFRydGW5rf-B_rDyd3szZQO8qOMIs_FU2i1VlALCbbfuop-V7EZ6FeG8wDhC6yJen4p2QGpSsG_J3MHXPPDYlCd3p4t5KiTqf5bf6oIS2n9aPTb3UZZhftHp5X_ypu7SYUET_XOweGL1B1gZCoJIzpOqN7ThMegAHNtXmf41-TP3MrjvTsnidkDegKsNUA_O8h7YD9F7A4qpFrmbdr6i8YKiDwefYu6I2dWw9QLQE2z_s7F8jUxjOdqjPffgviBqmDC8TYHLXvqawVui0ogGXuwruzUiEvNOPlgiNcqFGCyB4vaVRmZh_XjUf89MB7f5mg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m raffling off one of my favorite pistol to one lucky individual. | | “An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.” - Allen West Fellow American, It’s time for me to give away another gun! If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash. With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, we’re once again in need. So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – one of my favorites – a Kimber 1911 stainless II! Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?” It’s simple: for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle. If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. name: David Horowitz
subject: How Barack Obama radically transformed our country
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9ad8e7e2f3ea497f9cd179c7ecbeb1f1&_e=84hb13L9alyXbcbqNHWlzALitG2g7670hdp_uZqZBpCNu2h1xBbyGD1PsIjAHCqk1p9-ryEcR0-ZS26arwbrrwUNBuKizHolFhlH0uf5CVb60tG29UhUAKaFTx7KO5FoDZ2cBB2iUrw2N5KVJC15UM1BaAGBHHwkjiHQrjIcCyTcVRwMpGbuNLwnL5hQqQzkREsef6SmW6heFJNRo3-mZq_o60tGww_FNrqYImrx1IU3rBXz-MSp2lIAHy1SRehQU-aWIDO0Y50MsR8FDDnJ1PPT5jtyF8UQlyUlEmcZps9YyarcLogd8-a_KmbocrRfUo8C1EFzxKa8HFpWyLRudlhNcCzRzXejttX7xIG66ErQS6qYlFn9LuglLT59qNKm5XgZ7i1UsNFzJmBALZF2Nw%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9ad8e7e2f3ea497f9cd179c7ecbeb1f1&_e=84hb13L9alyXbcbqNHWlzALitG2g7670hdp_uZqZBpCNu2h1xBbyGD1PsIjAHCqk1p9-ryEcR0-ZS26arwbrrwUNBuKizHolFhlH0uf5CVb60tG29UhUAKaFTx7KO5FoDZ2cBB2iUrw2N5KVJC15UM1BaAGBHHwkjiHQrjIcCyTcVRwMpGbuNLwnL5hQqQzkREsef6SmW6heFJNRo3-mZq_o60tGww_FNrqYImrx1IU3rBXz-MSp2lIAHy1SRehQk5AwsAz4F1_dJ8XLUvnaQ63Eddn-vfbwpy2HWS7dnP8a50ncm4Hm1Mif_3OpyGzN3qRCLQc_cXmz4agPtdQQ0wy2C_REZHAXPXQ6nFC-zQ2sk1zIELwJ7VBuUV2e5JYSUsl-BpnCSnZh1BIIEN2A_w%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I'll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9ad8e7e2f3ea497f9cd179c7ecbeb1f1&_e=84hb13L9alyXbcbqNHWlzALitG2g7670hdp_uZqZBpCNu2h1xBbyGD1PsIjAHCqk1p9-ryEcR0-ZS26arwbrrwUNBuKizHolFhlH0uf5CVb60tG29UhUAKaFTx7KO5FoDZ2cBB2iUrw2N5KVJC15UM1BaAGBHHwkjiHQrjIcCyTcVRwMpGbuNLwnL5hQqQzkREsef6SmW6heFJNRo3-mZq_o60tGww_FNrqYImrx1IU3rBXz-MSp2lIAHy1SRehQV5DQc9XNpYnzIkKvQsprYC_NITqnrjILRtYB8s4cswupCFdXvmDl08W2buGApsABBQdC6zBJfkd_dz2VwQ76DDQ6tawANOy9TugRQKkA4r-r6TE9-5frzoaabbSC8m_naZbzB5X8-N1OOQFdKNkzag%3D%3D)**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: How we use your donations:
body:
Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33c3bb0f-c165-4963-bd1d-9ad7b4b0fd32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago: Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f035e99-6894-4de8-8b7e-8f8531d9feb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Blue Amp Action's support in this mission. [Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7bf025a-94ce-427c-aa4d-03e37d235943/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf733105e-4d65-47b1-8ad6-563b9a8c7734/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul. But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts. [Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bf9d15b-33ab-454d-aed3-c7ec3500c773/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c8c9378-d88e-4fce-b4aa-8948bee1a996/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| More soon, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_op_leaderswedeserve23092416?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=515487eb-9815-4d89-b9fc-03a023e9ab4e&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=515487eb-9815-4d89-b9fc-03a023e9ab4e&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The Beginning of Our Great American Comeback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoj1ijfetq7m6oeg0uccoo5fveajib4hs4e2lcng_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options?
---
| | | | | [Success](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zijfsveag8q2mqu3mgo5ruvonfsi2bt04l4kmug0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
|
**OR**
---
| | | [Decline](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp6bu4vs93l444dd6hag8ctn89vrb96v6gme72lo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is **determined** to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. **Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7l7pnk03g29qgmb3so7c9oucscq3vjvrqoac6bg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO HERE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi4o7b297dkg7j9id2017lbmd40hh7cgsvnufgeo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is **dangerous**. We _need_ an energetic executive as our next President who will:
* **RIP UP** Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks.

* **STOP THE INVASION** worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation.

* **RESTORE** patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military.

* **FIGHT** back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo5n5k3jtf13a9qgj5fl8r4r4agj8jsr0kverhl0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH HIS VIDEO TO LEARN MORE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zorvpvvmqqvdjts5rrkgtl859nud444qjiuksb3g_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, **[**watch here**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zra2qkd2taau3lceik4k9m6rmsr4b7d30d97jrvg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)** , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrgoqp4a2bs4c9f45t7g2q0f52eb462hbf4fu8go_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o36c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

🚨GOP DEADLINE ALERTS 🚨

name: American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6m11hvk7b6s6ui77f92mr8t8g8p8l5um03jjfvg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fsohapk4joctc3cms2214179picmk6lg1bmpd0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lqc1dj54aqbop213frt55b1qakuhk8908t372o_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77jsrgflk0pjbu384heph4p83kqteq5ih7ftbpg_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2qi5eaee69p8fkvt6ccm32gpes0tfqn1qjiabo_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq1e8hrmdrclkkgo1msg4mkt6ifiq0gr2ji6t4ko_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cdie1p75c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7tjqfuonegvji6f7t3lhd79d4sk4crk5td2fc0_rp22sh2s8i66p75clhm2o31c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kjvs7l3s1lfnk8r39p4m5g85mr8kljv5ql7mso_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4slim6ob0c5h649fg)

Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Fellow American,
**_
It’s time for me to give away another gun!_**

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash.

With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, **we’re once again in need.** So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – _**one of my favorites**_ – a Kimber 1911 stainless II!

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsYGb-zpeix1U_JCPIo-3x41Ch66q-s3jgqVFH2nSzk3bdIcnq2gMX7khP3-KgPGVfTBLFPV1FeU1W047AGazf_7bKbxGF_N6J98Fh-0QJCioHO5dR6IoCz_R1HmbU_MV5S3Gh09R_8ZOXlUgNUUyLHfQ%3D%3D)
Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, **[now is your chance.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsY4qiVp2TUrXS6M0VfYthZiO6jA2R9W9675DJCallZUB5Ha5DdDg4eZqu9bGI3IxcfxjqoDpyCjUnVAjGAZ5FhOwrlWEOshHuGs49ElBhIuJeswD_xAMB9bLBkCkJJu2U8zIM3-GsFy8p8tuu-3AKt-A%3D%3D)**

Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?”

It’s simple: **[The $9.11 donation that I’m asking you to make right now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsYVviYg8wgkkW3mP1BoCi9rFYFQCq5idbhrt_XB9Fi1iZ2kYk_LEZrK23C-jB0bBNxd84lf3btEWOoGs271gCw2kE0tI6DAlVJmRkqVvHwjbm4CsoTUdRYlR_8uVO1UDXcUr3zYyO1v-Y9NJ1l9h-8xg%3D%3D)** for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024.

**Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? **

[**ENTER FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN TODAY »**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsYBNGTo4C-zjlTwYV0vUJVHEQO8Zs3QW6bBPi60L3I5Iy2EfXYIymTNqEjx5WPnxq_iIL7PSM76PrQf1_ZBF8fFoAup3CUoKayL1-6w1_ojU4WlxTo3UuBn61HTQBeJTC_1qhmcX4UbPuhhHywpbIaVw%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN $9.11
ENTER THE RAFFLE »**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsY_yJbm0BvqvyUwL9SKQz6HL6h0JwIACw-LEbAq-V6TzqYQgPz7lk396Dp5NVv4nDV9wMHTzukpGOdbxbaayWwGHRQQsaeIjht_gxeWHFTsrv3rPuDQH92R5MH4kUkitAANrotw_24iUrZq0Pp0vaU2Q%3D%3D)
As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.

Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time.

Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them.

Responsible gun owners obey the law.

Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to **[secure your support for my Republican U.S. Senate campaign.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsYEJUNqbxgsZ88rHD9Whqy5ULHgUN03M_YUBr8n2zQ8wAtTW4NJGu31GQSWoeP4rUOIP4vL1IZ_JOZmkHJv9tL_MzABhw1LkW4gSvPfNDJavBPgeDVl1fv3KmeFBQiOtboE0O-MYPTpXOCwK_K7-hjIA%3D%3D)**

**This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle.**

If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, **[enter this very moment!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsY5ZYfj20P2TSSzHCpAmuttEgcBfn1wn8i9HCt4NaxCEylmhWV1UJ2-JfAgUA9F6B_mBUADXQECCu7OPDt63cfu_cRBqSXbXPxKCC-OiTJQns6g0Z5XO27aPheyH9gLBPp37TPq-aOTh46e2KqVR-Dfw%3D%3D)**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c48239c1a89049ca9867cc53ddc9b28c&_e=u18kZwRCce79DsviX852hntVoXcpz1uubgb8NKHhkdg9sprm2LQmZYzrioH4EfxT7hAhndiCNKd0f-AB8Qer_SPG55qph_pjrwA9NUQSltQpnRhNFH0O4I6OiSZp0hK1CwNZfNgqJzyOScMIvBF97WHEh0jKpSK7zp_W9fen3dGyIYaD96GAzr-tXZdI6gJ2qncNKki0ggZ2E7Jhb7XVgtLPaU_kqH1J1Yc-Uk6lxMklxEO5Fy16RjoQuo0cVxsYEYLXyR4_gtC645OHXnc_Dp0Wh6pN3vFXC5oNII9G1P3CoAKquESrgTrUDXyu8erIQup81sJ1gc2kYWSwk3Rwje7gz6-aj3Kw5qcxpeJMZ9U2QM1aVo_7dkr22YAh0PFAE2Qfjm2P7Cq7UkCfDNHPwA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I have one gun to giveaway. You have less than a week to enter! | | “An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.” - Allen West Fellow American, It’s time for me to give away another gun! If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash. With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, we’re once again in need. So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – one of my favorites – a Kimber 1911 stainless II! Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?” It’s simple: for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle. If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, Good luck - and thank you! Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. P.S. Fellow American - I know times are hard in Joe Biden's America, and I hate to ask for money... but if you can spare enough to help my campaign fight the tough battles ahead, I would be so appreciative. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, To enter without making a contribution, Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The promotion begins on June 15th, 2023 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on June 30th, 2023 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on June 30th, 2023.
