subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. body:
This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

| |

| | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a624183cd5b421383bda6849acae3f2&_e=THb4LFteOny5hPiVYNAbJaEWAgVQN0JKgi-4CIc6X-dc3kMpPLJ0G4VH-__jBDimuyKrrVAdmZQ4I3-94dUywpM5czT-VuuMY3-y0j-9nHMrD_9mGetPd56bhJIEJ377Vk4faSqc4R70mpYz7_V43D_qQGD4U85WFdDwr0QyfBLiLTCQrnf1zZcZxWcufHtWPu0hDJXd7eznv_wp8AUorQOIkQRdewEkh5NLKpfTwaWHTgJLH4v5KdWRo2knH14Hod5zdtxwvhMaMIc9qBIAioTp-uB2MDyG8_es3bv6rPcYP96ROXjOMHD-OU67-U7j9wFfyGvWARu0FOvMJ82dXzUqDG36vt0C3x8wc8QLqbBpH9lkF7YeLaSY2JW6TyyAyQkXUpAI_3xSK9XlDOfCeQnn2r5EJweyztx22aRCn_lvr6QykaR0G_Y5nXF0AnNwS3Gv4w4eiky_IqlrmxxT0xmIad4EsuWZ1Co3LDEU1lg%3D)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **
**Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a624183cd5b421383bda6849acae3f2&_e=THb4LFteOny5hPiVYNAbJaEWAgVQN0JKgi-4CIc6X-dc3kMpPLJ0G4VH-__jBDimuyKrrVAdmZQ4I3-94dUywpM5czT-VuuMY3-y0j-9nHMrD_9mGetPd56bhJIEJ377Vk4faSqc4R70mpYz7_V43D_qQGD4U85WFdDwr0QyfBLiLTCQrnf1zZcZxWcufHtWPu0hDJXd7eznv_wp8AUorQOIkQRdewEkh5NLKpfTwaWHTgJLH4v5KdWRo2knH14Hod5zdtxwvhMaMIc9qBIAioTp-uB2MDyG8_es3bv6rPcYP96ROXjOMHD-OU67-U7j9wFfyGvWARu0FOvMJ82dX1nY8xeykznvznbvVpbBECC1Crz0VfZ1mjwkQcGhg05TgXm_RHkTuAAx3GLrBKRO0R6huqPlimu0nmsKdSsmYR8g00EscIzIbJmKLEB9tzQVcIE3waq9wPl3QuZ_SCufYItQp_axuAgabOrWmRUCH90%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e58270bf6340e9bd74bfc89ff5122c&_e=WYdGBs7QqUJue2dH6egGdKXVz56nNaVUrikQ_J4LpHiBa5CUcerM8iEuqOoIUxQnDdYJaCwNG0xHXzLAramVgp2p3p2GBXCLgNKPd-tOenv700PROJ1-bbvK_mKYcp4DM9zsYIIAEa1VrlGutfholH2UEG7TJJXilsuGf-eLvjnWgtxL-DSe7LqNofilkSys8BJ08wpILGD6pKeBK6UdFKPuiv3Dxlc-tfETUWrjiSRKLjfu9jekMQcRhEQ6kANMGg8AvrRuKMfgKirQfa8trl9DcNUlivlno9GJBeVeHyGXm_eaXHnuYfmHXPnObu7j6A_8O9_u-HSgRjRHk8CPB4QHcckElraPjjNsh7xIvjS1955eHPGJBbEIER04aH1ePzhY5tpM6mDcFhDH66ZnAsPG7VzJhaZ9psvTwCwE1GVex9Bu5B6SnbMO3n5kbLlJ)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

clean_body: The disaster the radical Left has brought raining down across our nation will END. Our Great American Comeback means reversing every failure. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Americans are facing a critical choice in the upcoming election. The options? | | | | | | OR | | | Today, we can make a difference and get our country back on track by supporting a leader who is determined to reverse the decline the radical Left has rained down across our nation by leading our Great American Comeback. Gov. DeSantis knows that our nation's survival depends on our leadership's strength. | | | There has never been a moment more critical than this one. Continuing to leave power in the hands of corrupt, ineffective politicians who have failed to live up to their promises to the American people is dangerous. We need an energetic executive as our next President who will: RIP UP Biden's crippling economic policies that have made average American families struggle to fill up their grocery carts and gas tanks. STOP THE INVASION worsening at our border every day that Biden refuses to secure our nation. RESTORE patriotism that is at an all-time low throughout all levels of our society AND military. FIGHT back against the woke agenda invading children's schools, corporations, and our armed forces. | | | This is our Great American Comeback that Gov. Ron DeSantis is running to lead, Friend. Leadership matters--especially when there is no end to what the radical Left will try to do to control our lives. If you're wondering what our future could be, , and join us in endorsing Ron DeSantis for President. We hope to see you on our team. In Freedom, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. body:

| **_“An armed man is a citizen; an unarmed man is a victim.”_
- Allen West**
* * *

Fellow American,
**_
It’s time for me to give away another gun!_**

If you recall, I held a similar raffle back in June and gave away my favorite BTE-USA Taner Carbine AR-15. That raffle raised a considerable amount of money for my campaign at a time when we really needed an infusion of cash.

With the announcement that my race is about to get a bit more crowded, **we’re once again in need.** So, I’ve decided to raffle off a cool gun – _**one of my favorites**_ – a Kimber 1911 stainless II!

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9O3DFUbUgeKi0W1Lho2yPL2Is5a_JW1DZ4WkeNKb_awwsZwZISIErNH8Bqw08eqrtlN__7uaYUm1t3ZDI8U8BzgwsvoArawYom-AEIq772dGJ8cqavLSK69JLlUaSRbpNPJDLD1UKmhHDTE0ShIio_Gw%3D%3D)
Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, **[now is your chance.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OqxdGCKHlXJq_5OQBdohmVcFp4HPPoJIaZdAUIc3Miv9RGOKSAxsyrynxPPvN6DSNviIOkNhpA4Esnl5XnobpL8oN4UydXVSBcra20oZCggHdkAnMArJhJ_6KfGBTLLZUUWjlhOhT-IonWKnGeBtwJA%3D%3D)**

Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?”

It’s simple: **[The $9.11 donation that I’m asking you to make right now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OYFSyydNFe4qPcrY4jZiS4Tr3a211Le5rPAIiyo_PI7o3H-d_qKE0jqizmg1Y535PROCujz7KLV340wSc6KFlNSPDfXqlNB77ABkS1tjaQTRTo9oIkgaQmqFQZ3juBk35k1mM1OkPnlDv3TgFEDOJ7w%3D%3D)** for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024.

**Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? **

[**ENTER FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN TODAY »**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OgqhBzK1NdUlsvStdCT8uNeN9Zk4FxuFS-jFFD9Udtx1Z7qcd1Xq9-Co-ZuZaqx6fhRUEmzPU8_1JHEicjOTH99mga_dxQ_TT6AarBNdAylt3IydoQRaewNQdeRBp3hpzc_3RkVGy9eeseK3c0GByFQ%3D%3D) [**CHIP IN $9.11
ENTER THE RAFFLE »**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9ORHghh359Le8Q3s1NkRyOcsWoWM3gD_Y3CnLPC_R9PczUUJYKcNpmYD0fK8swSfldUWohBQNC_zL0IRNsAfltIa3Y3-b5MsfZ2G0-YB4b9ICA8TMYfEjblJGjQ9eIGIx7ebzSV1kQDA_O1R8WOw3PCw%3D%3D)
As the top law enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens.

Responsible gun owners pay their taxes on time.

Responsible gun owners use their Second Amendment right to protect themselves and those they love from those who would wish harm upon them.

Responsible gun owners obey the law.

Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to **[secure your support for my Republican U.S. Senate campaign.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OpGTnTOsn4dXceRiBtfBbAsZiX9WlXN-5IP60XQ6HzRWOWzAzHwDzZmgUngBaW_JAn65souF4EACKSGo6-oZyLjvH5QZvH97Wb7mq_EkDhgHs6hOyZEp6RbVO0Yx44n6dTKcAZx636_17Vtp_bKhrew%3D%3D)**

**This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! So, don’t wait to make a donation of $9.11 now which guarantees you entry into the raffle.**

If you want my gun, then you’ll need to make sure you enter by 11:59 p.m. on September 30th. So don’t wait – if you’re reading this right now, **[enter this very moment!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9ObokW0_q9436Hod4k-wsgoUEh3rDhl_vkZhs4EWPHKru1EmAyp-dwlkvE-soKtU-7PjRaYK7h1FEwiCglEph3Jq806IFp-XVptBCG-XMrWYUlZetJE4n9HuEqofADgAJrqnvTZad9kPIfbnoS-EB58Q%3D%3D)**

[**CHIP IN $9.11 »**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OV8w0qnNPmQwPD0gslvqd1dddgIeAVuJaBHI-YyTVEBqAQIC-HcGoTTN8YjRM0UKZryCbuz6jUW7xThJGdXVOcZ3c18iUOxQ66C_7clcQRByW5rhDJI8fvjHQweXq5C1bGWSTtAQIrD6i5KHagqFbmQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=901065b0b0f243bd99833eb50c96e2a8&_e=C2FTpz5acCBfCWezn4YAYWiJ2lGi570tJ9i-EhqSSlLeNKjr_OJWBHz1ZK3yIrFJaLShm86aYxe_VIurW70IPQi1CZtdLu9djFMEzSrnT8jH_uqMnBvrfXGYfW0G9OeNSv6bg7hUM-79KfH7PG4UydPFfoF-0DE4ta7rO8ZcOKc217CtCgPOnBQnRtMsAC18DHzvogC9XC1k7ro0OKc-sTAX31VzWIc07yVCxPGURr873utc7PzQKDif16b-zA9OtKDyEosI8r1T8UP7l7qxHbK12SCaoqnNPnYHu5b1PPGwtlzm59lBG7QrF_9rBS-iVhJ5wvIUnA9Xagz_ikR-98b33VbkQkbdNksBimmUhDuKbaDIDWws9F3JW9sZ7fXVmEiNw4PvE249z2NvOiAM7A%3D%3D)

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. Have you ever wanted to own a handgun used by an American Sheriff? Well, Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful handgun with a 5.25” barrel and rosewood grip?” It’s simple: for a chance to win this American-made handgun will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. Donate $9.11 right now and you could win a handgun valued at $1,021! With the barrier to entry that low, how can you afford not to enter? Responsible gun owners obey the law. Raffling off my Kimber 1911 not only gives me the opportunity to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you, but it also opens another avenue in which to This contest, like my campaign, is likely to get hot! | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Writing from the field . . .
body:
I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0117f7a23c94358912744d9f39d82d7&_e=evy0mmwq9NRKhxyluaNCx8dXeBFAxBqnTklTRlqCeGHYmBdy2nwUD8Vt-FgrEgdWrjjkiJf4wazR0lV6x8HlfX1dmkhZrkJjhaXc6ulaZ27NOS-J25tS5upcdGLIezrlKgSH-kqoIqiu5n39nt8nNknOQiNZI5oKnOYcVJWO1QykeHKF9PbDh_USru3Dz-PFSSk3xOjLN56IM1KabMSUzA2hjuH5v9Echq9ycKebm8hRtD5_DDzQhefcqi4P5prnztEiBjoyEWhxFymQA6qKLhj-BF-YXlm0ikmhuNEUucLaGo1S3xWh34L17u0M3NRKHrcSegVm1fPjB9BL-PS49A3P4P9nv1iNaZB96_7896Q7Vaa2nFvp0_RYYUJiDyqmWFm3GR9WdJQ6ZM8jfMAfSA%3D%3D)
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0117f7a23c94358912744d9f39d82d7&_e=evy0mmwq9NRKhxyluaNCx8dXeBFAxBqnTklTRlqCeGHYmBdy2nwUD8Vt-FgrEgdWrjjkiJf4wazR0lV6x8HlfX1dmkhZrkJjhaXc6ulaZ27NOS-J25tS5upcdGLIezrlKgSH-kqoIqiu5n39nt8nNknOQiNZI5oKnOYcVJWO1QykeHKF9PbDh_USru3Dz-PFSSk3xOjLN56IM1KabMSUzA2hjuH5v9Echq9ycKebm8iJNBsWVk4jDsURJM1U-c2lJKIqJU2b43GuzmCT47P3jHJWXrCQNRzm-dBHWOWu1WCj8830hawLdvl81CsE8XbcA_8pXsjCebDm-KKnIfTgzKb8V5Mwkk9nkKbfjf559kZ_nkLAM7OE7gAdgyRvAjFNmtwgXL0m32TeQOyNxmjhYw%3D%3D)
Dear Patriot,

I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see.

Our cameras are charged, and we're getting our brave sources wired up to go undercover.

As a journalist, these are the moments I live for. The adrenaline starts to pump as our teams walk into the unexpected.

Undercover journalism is an equal combination of art and ethics - and I've put together a Master Class on my profession to teach other brave Americans how to go undercover, get the story hidden in the darkness, and bring it into the light.

But I need your help finding, training, and equipping new journalists who can work independently and be trusted to present an honest and unbiased story to the public.

**[Will you chip in to cover these costs?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0117f7a23c94358912744d9f39d82d7&_e=evy0mmwq9NRKhxyluaNCx8dXeBFAxBqnTklTRlqCeGHYmBdy2nwUD8Vt-FgrEgdWrjjkiJf4wazR0lV6x8HlfX1dmkhZrkJjhaXc6ulaZ27NOS-J25tS5upcdGLIezrlKgSH-kqoIqiu5n39nt8nNknOQiNZI5oKnOYcVJWO1QykeHKF9PbDh_USru3Dz-PFSSk3xOjLN56IM1KabMSUzA2hjuH5v9Echq9ycKebm8jDYq28jJAix0GAePyeFD4UQU_Xl3gLYLzS6A__fM7vTizwSVdJvyNmC1oeUA9-NRJVeuDsslzFVm8ehe36f04exFkcy9-gw-L9IBmHHgRO7Bh3TrhYxL-YIBfovBVLgsunPpHwe2pAxi604QG7o8AiTtawwTs1lnYPR3FiLKXwoQ%3D%3D)**

This is not easy or cheap. This is a battle for America, and I'm training soldiers who will work hard, show the highest degree of integrity, and choose to be courageous.

Now, the Army spends an average of $50,000 to train a basic soldier, and our fighting men and women are worth every penny and more.

Training an undercover journalist costs my company thousands, and that's where you come in . . . **[please chip in to get more journalists in the field.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0117f7a23c94358912744d9f39d82d7&_e=evy0mmwq9NRKhxyluaNCx8dXeBFAxBqnTklTRlqCeGHYmBdy2nwUD8Vt-FgrEgdWrjjkiJf4wazR0lV6x8HlfX1dmkhZrkJjhaXc6ulaZ27NOS-J25tS5upcdGLIezrlKgSH-kqoIqiu5n39nt8nNknOQiNZI5oKnOYcVJWO1QykeHKF9PbDh_USru3Dz-PFSSk3xOjLN56IM1KabMSUzA2hjuH5v9Echq9ycKebm8jejsYjGcUyDcGMRjm00anijzeirIxkEan5_h8jHePe2WICv2bFsqpjltO3Bar8J1aQCastpi6SreuQ_gO9rpyRI5GPbz9IHMH90zMqzRGzLBj0884PMdv-U40iB1_P-L3BDSNgjZLooyTMraGkOcifCYGe-mluagxBAcHYQysbmw%3D%3D)**

America needs to be swarming with journalists just like we had decades ago.

Today, corporate conglomerates have taken over local papers, and any remaining journalists never leave the comfort of their desks to write a story.

The 4th Estate, the press, is missing in America!

Help me bring it back, but better than ever. **[Please donate here.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0117f7a23c94358912744d9f39d82d7&_e=evy0mmwq9NRKhxyluaNCx8dXeBFAxBqnTklTRlqCeGHYmBdy2nwUD8Vt-FgrEgdWrjjkiJf4wazR0lV6x8HlfX1dmkhZrkJjhaXc6ulaZ27NOS-J25tS5upcdGLIezrlKgSH-kqoIqiu5n39nt8nNknOQiNZI5oKnOYcVJWO1QykeHKF9PbDh_USru3Dz-PFSSk3xOjLN56IM1KabMSUzA2hjuH5v9Echq9ycKebm8i0qPn37thGPjz2UAqIgu-lHggAbHKd5PwxJCLCR7WhasdarTUp5C8G5cMltt2mB9L0Espz7tKcwbPb332Ulgch9derkfLwsbUXY_mmiPhI10TlYNxhSRyyb4e2pT-_wbeCzqAB5GpEBLrko2OR2MVojBRs2peopeQPAsDMiljL2g%3D%3D)**

Thank you for all that you do, and as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

Reclaiming American Freedom

clean_body: I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see. Dear Patriot, I touched down earlier this week and set up a basecamp for my team to go undercover in a story that America will need to see. Our cameras are charged, and we're getting our brave sources wired up to go undercover. As a journalist, these are the moments I live for. The adrenaline starts to pump as our teams walk into the unexpected. Undercover journalism is an equal combination of art and ethics - and I've put together a Master Class on my profession to teach other brave Americans how to go undercover, get the story hidden in the darkness, and bring it into the light. But I need your help finding, training, and equipping new journalists who can work independently and be trusted to present an honest and unbiased story to the public. This is not easy or cheap. This is a battle for America, and I'm training soldiers who will work hard, show the highest degree of integrity, and choose to be courageous. Now, the Army spends an average of $50,000 to train a basic soldier, and our fighting men and women are worth every penny and more. Training an undercover journalist costs my company thousands, and that's where you come in . . . America needs to be swarming with journalists just like we had decades ago. Today, corporate conglomerates have taken over local papers, and any remaining journalists never leave the comfort of their desks to write a story. The 4th Estate, the press, is missing in America! Help me bring it back, but better than ever. Thank you for all that you do, and as always, stay tuned. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [Deadline Extended] Big Oil’s attacks are relentless and our wildlife is paying the price
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
This is urgent, friend. **We thought we were sure to hit our National Public Lands Day goal yesterday. But when we checked the numbers, we saw that we’re still falling short. This is a huge blow to our efforts to protect vulnerable animals and the lands they live on – and it’s coming at the worst possible moment for our planet. Here's why:**
**Trophy hunters are using their powerful lobby to attack the Endangered Species Act, one of our most crucial and effective environmental laws. And they’re getting a major boost from destructive industries like mining, logging and oil companies.** These greedy corporations are hell-bent on destroying wildlife habitats to extract more fossil fuels. At this point in the climate crisis, the consequences for our dangerously warming planet could be disastrous. **And vulnerable species like our LAST gray wolves are feeling the pressure on all sides. **
That’s why we’re taking a chance and **EXTENDING our fundraising deadline for ONE MORE DAY** to make sure you get the chance to chip in. We know you care about the future of our planet’s fragile ecosystems and the creatures facing corporate-driven extinction. So we had to pull your supporter record before our fundraising extension expires. Here’s what we found:
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008744?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**EXTENSION EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. TONIGHT
**WOLVES AND BEARS: FACING EXTINCTION**
---
| | [RUSH MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008744?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Extension_
_expires 11:59 p.m. This is your last chance to help hit our critical National Public Lands Day goal, friend._
---
We can’t sugarcoat it, friend – we’re worried. We set our goal of hitting $60,000 before our National Public Lands Day deadline because the situation for vulnerable wolf pups, bear cubs and other threatened creatures is dire. **Fossil fuel corporations are TRIPLING DOWN on their planet-killing exploitation and pollution. They're seeking every opportunity to expand their dirty operations into some of the most pristine wilderness areas we have left. We can help stop them by protecting the Endangered Species Act and fighting to keep our precious public lands safe for essential wildlife. But time is running out, and we must increase our efforts to fight dirty industries before it’s too late. **
That’s why we can’t afford any gap in our fundraising budget. Every dollar has a job to do in our fight against well-funded, anti-environment corporations. If we miss our goal, our planet-saving work gets harder, and we risk losing more ecosystems and their inhabitants to fossil fuel destruction.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008744?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[**Our extension only lasts until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. So please: Rush your $27 or more membership gift now and every dollar will power our efforts to fight dirty industries and protect wolves, bears and ****the only Earth we’ll ever get.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008745?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: What we raise now will help us break in 2024 strong and prepared. | | Team – We want to give you a peek into our September fundraising: = That’s the first number we see when we log into our ActBlue account. It’s the average contribution amount for our campaign for the quarter so far. As Jahana’s Finance Director, my job is to make sure the campaign has the funding it needs to keep us on track so the Congresswoman can keep focused on her work in Washington and in the district. I’m tracking our progress, but I still need your help to reach our $20,000 goal before the 30th. What we raise now sets the stage for our entire campaign and will dictate what we can invest in as we protect one of the most vulnerable blue seats in the nation. As we’ve seen over the past two years, the current House GOP is not interested in finding solutions for the American people, but rather in political stunts to appeal to their base. Taking back the House is imperative to getting back to work for the American people! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, team. Chanita Thompson Financial Director_ | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

| |

---
| | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People's House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they're falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big End-of-Quarter goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We've only got a few hours left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fc2f219da8c4f3b9310c3de75dd4e8f&_e=mxS8zqoxWxWrHO7vTLQbUB3C_ZoDzy1HmBsCrU_COWt-pTYMPIo2XzpQgVss_JWVAKoqDvk7GZ5ohjw9hp70A6e8nO4H9IY1fiO-zEMC6nHvRRqySKvWabDKayUQkPuwtvjE3Yn2AxbphIb4HZPUBFZAJ_rRGwyfyn2Joti6jER8kuTMNYh5QZ_3dAaQ8fC8fplJceALK8GXW-KI2iL0Dyk5_SgIPr9VP4JwP5f8HKnNs10CH0VXcpqN6wq_B4qyCvdU62vlX_e7wTD32C1QepzUeAQJCVxa2J5jqVHH3jdAnOsyDOT5pj7SiF7bCSTEzmpwWeuqmu6R5elYsjNp-mbA-d8Gb1Qjp_mH61K681QSee7jg1BJz1jn0jiFuaDRZxyXYsZ5JaeOYDC9XsiIa-I_4QrIC-mcMCFrqr61JyHNo5S8c31CRVxiBBFfTAmhc210oB0ZTzR_APfNEwlqAg%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few hours left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. ")**_

_Do you think you could do that? For me?_

Look, this deadline was important before... but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

And I'm afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. **That's why I 'm pleading for your help right here and now:**

I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...
I know James Comer reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Jim Jordan reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you're probably tired of hearing from us, but we don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!!

_**[So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I'm personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fc2f219da8c4f3b9310c3de75dd4e8f&_e=mxS8zqoxWxWrHO7vTLQbUB3C_ZoDzy1HmBsCrU_COWt-pTYMPIo2XzpQgVss_JWVAKoqDvk7GZ5ohjw9hp70A6e8nO4H9IY1fiO-zEMC6nHvRRqySKvWabDKayUQkPuwtvjE3Yn2AxbphIb4HZPUBFZAJ_rRGwyfyn2Joti6jER8kuTMNYh5QZ_3dAaQ8fC8fplJceALK8GXW-KI2iL0Dyk5_SgIPr9VP4JwP5f8HKnNs10CH0VXcpqN6wq_B4qyCvdU62vlX_e7wTD32C1QepzUeAQJCVxa2J5jqVHH3jdAnOsyDOT5pj7SiF7bCSTEcrpjGSMCVfLvJE1JJsEC5Ezgnys60x1iAw0nwcYRImlUS27tpFYo1Pg2zTOGQk1YPdVJ8JWak-htVMCTpDdJlibr4Phcav_tw-f4iMWJtNRG-GSmW4j15McX_oiuIqolesZsZOEvguT3xWc4xi-Suw%3D%3D "So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

clean_body: I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase: | | | | | Hey folks -- John Kennedy here. I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase: My Republican colleagues over there in the People's House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their big End-of-Quarter goal. They also made it abundantly clear to me that they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short. "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few hours left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. " Do you think you could do that? For me? Look, this deadline was important before... but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election. And I'm afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top... With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives missing their goal - it could be all over for us. That's why I 'm pleading for your help right here and now: | | | "Send In Ten Bucks Now >>" | | | "Send In Thirty Bucks \(Most Folks Give This Much\ >>") | | | "Send In Fifty Bucks Now >>" | | | "Send In More Now >>" I know Kevin McCarthy reached out... I know James Comer reached out... I know Kellyanne Conway reached out... I know Jim Jordan reached out... I know Steve Scalise reached out... And I sure as heck know you're probably tired of hearing from us, but we don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win!!! "So in the short time we have left before the deadline, I’m personally asking for your help to save our Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America." God bless you, John N. Kennedy * | AMAZING news! You're only 1 GIFT AWAY from receiving a coveted spot in Steve Scalise's Majority Leader Founding Circle! name: Daniel Cameron
subject: The Future of Kentucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniel Cameron for Kentucky
body:
With your help, we have every reason to be optimistic
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/50840a759ca890113947229f28c3afba/40933/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933)

---
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/50840a759ca890113947229f28c3afba/febfe21f97d0046cc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
Friends, I am optimistic about our future. I can't say the same for Andy Beshear. Beshear is a shutdown governor who trampled on our God given freedoms. Never again. We must end the failed Biden-Beshear agenda now, once and for all. I'm counting on you to join us to bring that optimism back to the Commonwealth. You have my commitment that I will work day and night to deliver BOLD leadership to Kentucky. But I can't do it without you. I need your help.
---
[**FIGHT FOR KENTUCKY’S FUTURE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/50840a759ca890113947229f28c3afba/1b241e7406201f9dc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
We have every reason to be optimistic because of the great teachers in Kentucky and the promise of our young people. We can be optimistic because of our communities and our people. We are optimistic that when we back the blue, our communities will be safe again.
---
[**GIVE KENTUCKY A REASON TO HOPE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/50840a759ca890113947229f28c3afba/d7c799cdc21b63b7c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
I know that together our movement can turn around Kentucky. We will restore our values. We will catch up our kids in school and help them thrive again. We will hold criminals accountable and make our streets safe again. But I need your help. _**[Give $5, $15, $25, $50, or more TODAY!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/50840a759ca890113947229f28c3afba/00b29edc7fd4e530c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ With your help we have every reason to be optimistic again about the future of Kentucky. I'm counting on you. For Kentucky,Daniel Cameron

subject: The shutdown fight, explained
body:
Kevin McCarthy has had months to work with conservatives in the House to fund the government. In fact, he promised to do so. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10391551?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

With a government shutdown looming, it’s critical for conservatives to push back on the shameless narrative and outright lies being driven by the Washington cartel.

**In this fight, context is everything. Let me explain. **

Kevin McCarthy has had months to work with conservatives in the House to fund the government. In fact, he promised to do so in the power-sharing agreement he made with the 20 brave patriots in January in order to become Speaker.

One of the hard-fought concessions made (through 15 rounds of votes) was _funding the government through individual appropriations bills_ for discretionary spending totaling no more than pre-COVID levels of $1.47 trillion.

Instead, at the last minute, **McCarthy tried to jam through yet another short-term spending bill** known as a “CR” or continuing resolution funding Biden’s woke and weaponized government to the tune of $1.59 trillion. Rep. Matt Gaetz said it best on short-term spending bills.
---
|
---
| I put out [this tweet](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=46b6717508&e=17913c7d6d) which made the rounds on Capitol Hill detailing what should transpire next since Republican Leadership lacks the vote to push through his latest short-term spending bill.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=db30a760d7&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Fortunately, after conservatives refused to support the CR and defeated a procedural vote by McCarthy earlier this week, we’re seeing a variation of this plan take shape.

McCarthy now plans to put several appropriations bills forward this coming week, including individual funding measures for Homeland Security and the Department of Defense, which presents a real opportunity for conservatives to make cuts to woke and weaponized parts of the federal bureaucracy.

**If you take away anything from this email, let it be this:**

McCarthy and the Washington cartel wanted another business-as-usual short-term spending bill that funded the weaponized bureaucracy, but a small contingent of America First patriots in the House said enough is enough.

Now we’re seeing movement on funding the government through appropriations bills and a real chance to defund weaponized government.

_These patriots need all the support we can give them_.
---
| As always, thank you for [your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c039d1e0fe&e=17913c7d6d).

Keep fighting,

Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---

**Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

name: Team Lucas
subject: Missourians know how to take back their power at the ballot box
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’ve got some bad news for Josh Hawley.
#
Peter: Missourians already know how to take back their power from corrupt, control-obsessed politicians like Josh Hawley.
So let’s just review what Missouri voters have accomplished over the last six years — **and why their streak of using the ballot box to gain control over their own families and lives spells bad news for Hawley in this election.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36685?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY)**
**2018 —** Missourians rejected an anti-union “Right-to-Work” law and voted to raise the minimum wage from $7.85 to $12.00 with HUGE statewide margins.
**2020 —** Voters approved Medicaid expansion in Missouri.
**2022 —** Missouri voters legalized recreational weed.
Missourians have broken with Josh Hawley on all these issues over the last three election cycles because they’re tired of corrupt politicians like him trying to control their lives by getting in the way.
That means our campaign to replace Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate isn’t just about making a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**But we need your help to do it, Peter.** GOP mega-donors are already dumping money into our race hoping it’ll slow down our record-breaking grassroots movement. They even put over $1 MILLION into a Super PAC to fund their desperate attacks about Lucas. So we’re coming directly to you to ask:
**[If you’re ready to help Missourians take back their power one more time by defeating Josh Hawley and protecting abortion access in 2024, will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36685?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36686?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36685?refcode=em20230924-3835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3835%2E614464%2EAJnYcY)

**Josh Hawley only cares about accumulating more power for himself.** So next year, we’re electing Lucas Kunce, a real warrior for working people, to take back power for everyday Missourians.
Thanks for helping us make it happen.
Team Lucas

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

| When I first announced I would be running for the Senate, I pledged that we would build a grassroots movement that wouldn’t leave anyone behind.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4026%2E5257348%2EhNnM7p)
Derek,
When I first announced I would be running for the Senate, I pledged that we would build a grassroots movement that wouldn’t leave anyone behind.
For the past eight months, that’s exactly what we’ve been doing.
My team and I are leaving no stone unturned to reach voters in every corner of California. With tens of millions of voters across the state and more than 1⁄3 of voters undecided in the latest poll, we have a lot of ground to cover to reach every single person.
**[Will you pitch in $5.80 to help me reach voters in all of California’s 58 counties? I’m working to build the largest grassroots movement this state has ever seen, and I’ll need your help to do it.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2845?c0=sep2023_abs_em.8tYHCN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230924_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4026%2E5257348%2EhNnM7p)**

---
I won’t beat around the bush, Derek: Reaching voters across California’s 58 counties will take a lot of resources. **But I’m up for the challenge.**
Because it’s critical we share our message to voters in Siskiyou.
And win tough districts in the Central Valley.
And boost Democratic turnout in Bakersfield.
And stand up to the GOP’s attacks wherever they come — from San Diego to Santa Rosa.
**[I am asking you to pitch in $5.80 to help us win in all of California’s 58 counties.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2845?c0=sep2023_abs_em.8tYHCN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230924_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4026%2E5257348%2EhNnM7p)**

| | Derek, The Virginia Center for Investigative Journalism released a troubling report on the amount of dark money being poured into GOP campaigns for the General Assembly. According to the article, outside spending is heavily favoring Republicans – in fact, **_more than $1.4 million has been spent in an effort to elect GOP candidates._** That’s millions of dollars disbursed to bolster Republican campaign ads, phone banks, mailers, canvassing, and more. _****[Can you rush a donation of $5 to help Senator Warner show the GOP that Democrats have the grassroots support that we need to overtake their wave of dark money and turn Virginia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70264125/428835270/-636306340?refcode=mw_em_230919_1_no&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDkwYmJiMS1lMjVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uDadvAy7bjl-uOlDdDHDgztGM2TydyliOstV1iBm0Ms=)****_ But that’s not even the worst news. The largest dark money spender was a nonprofit that is renowned for its work to stop action on climate change, cut social programs like food assistance and childcare support, and give tax breaks to the wealthiest few. And they’re shoveling money over to GOP candidates who undoubtedly support these dangerous policies. clean_body: over $1 million spent... | | | Derek, The Virginia Center for Investigative Journalism released a troubling report on the amount of dark money being poured into GOP campaigns for the General Assembly. According to the article, outside spending is heavily favoring Republicans – in fact, more than $1.4 million has been spent in an effort to elect GOP candidates. That’s millions of dollars disbursed to bolster Republican campaign ads, phone banks, mailers, canvassing, and more. **= But that’s not even the worst news. The largest dark money spender was a nonprofit that is renowned for its work to stop action on climate change, cut social programs like food assistance and childcare support, and give tax breaks to the wealthiest few. And they’re shoveling money over to GOP candidates who undoubtedly support these dangerous policies. The reality of the situation is, as Election Day inches closer and closer, we’re only going to see more of this dark money flood into the state in support of Republican candidates. = Thank you, Team Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Al Franken
subject: I can’t say enough good things about Josh.
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b40f60c-8b4b-445b-8f6f-227124971fec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his next FEC deadline is September 30. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2efa35f3-a11d-428e-96a6-e23f4d9bb461/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34c1e5b0-d50c-482e-a568-ee01bd5a454c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. **Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf93cf1fa-0667-4943-a631-cfb1ae9e1bb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The next big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf039c71e-3235-41a8-825d-82b79aba18b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1902b232-dab1-4485-9ab4-798cab77ee63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47da56d7-1013-4f1a-982e-745dec546a78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

Hi, Peter -- The second Republican debate is coming up this Wednesday, and we would like to get [**your input on some of the most important issues before it begins.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl6pemHGweo0nMkWOHiGToAdTYa3Ns0i00uCdNrbXVl2COtKd8Agfru25B02k8sNy159egaTl7u-U4Sa43FmshHroVjD3TwpF0Ezyo0BgnAE3pGBNIRgCdUk3mIVk_EZNUAZ-pY3Dgap0_jKfMF4IU4BocrrViwweFrueJFc2XIkm83qKJ3W4hc1H8OikHYkjJ7O-cwnzU0Z_bUPj2K0Dmh2kbDCUGeC95GHkd-HiYBHoMTx6y_jCxGLtkPANFvxTfjcvA-KAxu5v8WotXKRoczobkp8VcZ5KmY_KWv-SPju4hUOiY9tRJYN0HnfxwTL6X-nySsUDdpNxVzRL0d7ap6ka0g8X4qbyu4NSba-KQbVQ9biSQyofkuI7O8bfAtOgASUjEWdHDkzCCAwqsArD4XityWFcFd5oghJrmtCSOwJgrLCv9ltQyLxhsIlenMTtda1CyOEf2WlFWPSI4ubk6dA_JUBSp-iFDHcYkN5aAB3A/3zv/WCZePGhEROWGyzH8WBItdA/h0/-dI3zvfmLRDBVN-by59focUNL3m9V1WaTPm4YLuLdKQ) Look, we don’t have to tell you how extreme these Republican candidates are -- their out-of-touch agenda speaks for itself. | I’ll keep this short!
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1212%2E35263%2EHDWpiM)

This morning, my finance team let me know that our grassroots fundraising is tracking behind where it needs to be to reach our end-of-quarter goal by next weekend. I don’t want to interrupt your Sunday plans, so I thought I’d send you quick email before the game in case you were able to pitch in: **Can you add a donation (of any amount!) to help my reelection campaign hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can keep this seat blue and defend the Senate majority? And as always, Go Pack Go! — Tammy

body:
Mitch McConnell and the GOP will spend millions to save Ted Cruz
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53271?t=6&akid=10603%2E878179%2EwiYXJR) Friend, we set an ambitious goal to raise $450,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline when our fundraising numbers will go public for Ted Cruz and every Republican in the country to see.

[But right now, we're falling short of our goal. There has never been a better or more important time to make a donation to elect Colin Allred. Split a donation of $10 between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project now →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53271?t=7&akid=10603%2E878179%2EwiYXJR) | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53271?t=8&akid=10603%2E878179%2EwiYXJR)
---
**Friend, this is why Colin needs your help:**

**1.** Mitch McConnell and the GOP will spend millions to save Ted Cruz.

**2.** Polls show Colin just 5 points down and 14% of voters are undecided – this race is anyone's to win!

**3.** Colin's not taking a dime of corporate money, so it's up to grassroots donors _(that means you)_ to power Colin's campaign to victory.

We can't let all of our incredible momentum to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and save the Senate majority slip away by falling short of this critical goal.

[So, please – will you split a donation of just $10 between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help Colin Allred defeat Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator they deserve? →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53271?t=9&akid=10603%2E878179%2EwiYXJR)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53272?t=10&akid=10603%2E878179%2EwiYXJR)

We _can_ flip Texas blue, but Colin’s counting on your support to build this winning grassroots movement.

Thank you,
Team Allred

body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because polls show President Biden statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 74 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11989%2E9716520%2EnAsSRU)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11989%2E9716520%2EnAsSRU)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230924-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11989%2E9716520%2EnAsSRU)

Diana
Research Director, DSCC
