Friend,
The minute I announced my 2024 campaign the Fake News hacks began claiming that the Democrats “want to run against Trump.”
These clowns couldn’t be any more full of it.
But now, with the evidence so irrefutable, even the failing _New York Times_ is forced to _finally_ admit what the American people knew from the start...
_**“...Mr. Biden’s top aides and advisers have believed... Mr. Trump would be a tougher general-election opponent than Mr. DeSantis or any of the other Republican presidential candidates.”**_
With poll after poll showing us CRUSHING the RINOs’ Deep State-approved puppet candidate, the primary is _effectively_ over.
And the nightmare scenario that Crooked Joe and the Left thought they could pretend did not exist, is now very much their _REALITY_ ...
_**“Trump would comfortably beat Biden by 49 percent to 45 percent.”**_
[Source:_Daily Express_]
With 2024 _ALREADY_ shifting to the general election, we can’t afford to waste a moment as a truly desperate Crooked Joe will go to unimaginable lengths to try and stop us.
**Which is exactly why I recently set a new goal for our campaign ahead of the 9/30 FEC-mandated quarterly deadline of 100,000 grassroots contributions...**
_**...Even if it’s $1 at a time!**_
Between you and me, Friend, I might actually enjoy seeing the $1 contributions the most! There’s no greater reminder than a $1 donation that our movement truly is a movement of _THE PEOPLE_.
_If you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s moronic and disastrous policies, believe me, I understand. And I don’t want you to even think about donating! Just hit the back button and go about your day._

clean_body: Crooked Joe is terrified to face us. | | | Friend, The minute I announced my 2024 campaign the Fake News hacks began claiming that the Democrats “want to run against Trump.” These clowns couldn’t be any more full of it. But now, with the evidence so irrefutable, even the failing New York Times is forced to finally admit what the American people knew from the start... “...Mr. Biden’s top aides and advisers have believed... Mr. Trump would be a tougher general-election opponent than Mr. DeSantis or any of the other Republican presidential candidates.” With poll after poll showing us CRUSHING the RINOs’ Deep State-approved puppet candidate, the primary is effectively over. And the nightmare scenario that Crooked Joe and the Left thought they could pretend did not exist, is now very much their REALITY ... “Trump would comfortably beat Biden by 49 percent to 45 percent.” [Source:Daily Express] With 2024 ALREADY shifting to the general election, we can’t afford to waste a moment as a truly desperate Crooked Joe will go to unimaginable lengths to try and stop us. Which is exactly why I recently set a new goal for our campaign ahead of the 9/30 FEC-mandated quarterly deadline of 100,000 grassroots contributions... ...Even if it’s $1 at a time! Between you and me, Friend, I might actually enjoy seeing the $1 contributions the most! There’s no greater reminder than a $1 donation that our movement truly is a movement of THE PEOPLE. If you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s moronic and disastrous policies, believe me, I understand. And I don’t want you to even think about donating! Just hit the back button and go about your day. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Tom Horne and his extremist Republican agenda are at it again. This time he’s going after dual language programs, which students in over 20 Arizona school districts rely on. [**Tom Horne is using his position to attack dual language programs and enact an extremist right-wing agenda. Will you sign on today to stand up for the thousands of students who depend on dual language programs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70268059/428848934/-473045287?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230924_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU4NzZhZmYtZTg1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-EtN_TXHeMraJB94s6Fxl1O02MQOd9VCUY5wDmmsm4=&emci=18c1c0ca-7a59-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=65876aff-e85a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70268060/428848935/-473045287?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230924_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU4NzZhZmYtZTg1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-EtN_TXHeMraJB94s6Fxl1O02MQOd9VCUY5wDmmsm4=&emci=18c1c0ca-7a59-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=65876aff-e85a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)

Instead of investing in a proven educational program that has supported Spanish-speaking Arizona students, Horne is threatening to withhold funding to any district that doesn’t use an immersion program. He’s also encouraging parents to file frivolous and xenophobic lawsuits against districts using a dual language curriculum.
Our classrooms aren’t battlegrounds for culture wars. Our children deserve learning environments that are tailored to their success, both academically and personally.
[**Team — Stand up for dual language students today and sign our petition to protect dual language programs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70268062/428848937/-473045287?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230924_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU4NzZhZmYtZTg1YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-EtN_TXHeMraJB94s6Fxl1O02MQOd9VCUY5wDmmsm4=&emci=18c1c0ca-7a59-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=65876aff-e85a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)

subject: Not backing down

body:
| | | Fellow American, It’s Kellyanne Conway. I’ve been working with conservatives across the country to help us hold onto our House majority, and one thing we can all agree on is that we need your help.

Republicans are fired up to win. And even with Joe Biden in the White House, our Republican majority in the House is achieving success for American families while holding Biden and the Democrats accountable.

And America is listening. They’re sick and tired of the Biden White House and the Left’s extreme, woke agenda.

_But as much as we’re ready to win, the radical Left is ready to take us down._

Bigwigs in Washington are terrified - and they’re pitching in major money for Democrats to regain control of Congress back from us.

**They might try to intimidate us, but I know you’re not the kind to back down.**

_**[Will you stand up to the Democrats and join us today to defend our House majority?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=705c3793608d4cdd9c8eb0e1b36badd5&_e=QKta8msyspM8T9p-p7l5XkZC7bpaxm3Ucq6mqleWIl1gt_fIsX5Zdh4VI9oGiCHWkieZS7O7FeN8GEn4k36HtaW28dvVKOjxM2oZVj4LXj3D4pE1N3ASrus20WPSk0N0E39R8kw02WX1Kyf8ntSR4d7z9w8-pd-xEQHbKvrT2AYu16J0nbXk3sbMJ3U0tOuyz6ShiT5FplHcmrPamRYSDC1LKn_dJpD5k_X362Yr34IcvQ17zS1IvE54Zh8boMdXFzmJCYl3P-7iiFXoEM16dahX8Ww0faVFzhIIcChAJTvS_6SVWWA9xNQnYEyqfl9w-eOms5wD13ngh9qpIl64YeoRjAr7C_YUHylfK1VIOlgkg-kYnhHm9goM722YIT5cFeCBBF7Gq46y6ljfjUI_bD1yRVLUR_rUTeZ9guGu25U%3D)**_

I’m sick of the Left’s lies.

As a woman, they tell me I should be ASHAMED and give my hard-won place in the world to men.

They say that our children can change their gender without their parents even knowing!

And while they focus on their woke social agenda, our economy is failing and Communist China is growing stronger every day.

**[It’s simple: America can’t afford to lose our Republican majority. Our Republican majority is the firewall from full radical left control of our country. Our future is on the line. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Before our window of opportunity closes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
When we get the chance to do the right thing, we have a duty to act. Right now, we have a crucial opportunity to fight for our essential rights. | | |
---
Peter,

When we get the chance to do the right thing, we have a duty to act.

Right now, we have a crucial opportunity to fight for our essential rights and the future of our democracy by ensuring bold leaders across the country can get on the ballot, mobilize our communities, and defeat the GOP’s extremist agenda. **But our window to act early, when it matters most, is closing.

That’s why today I’m asking you to join me in supporting Emerge, the only organization completely dedicated to empowering Democratic women of the New American Majority – Black, Brown, and Indigenous women, women of color, LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women – to run for office, win, and take charge of the direction of our country. **
**[Will you step up and donate $5 or more to Emerge now to recruit, train, and equip Democratic women with the skills and strategies they need to win in 2023 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70269630/428854904/-1986725773?amount=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZTQ0MmM2LWViNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wP-esC-kV85fU5Q6c8Quq0uHjvqd4qB337Wja6aJ9p0=)**
| | | [DONATE $5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70269631/428854905/-1986725773?amount=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZTQ0MmM2LWViNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wP-esC-kV85fU5Q6c8Quq0uHjvqd4qB337Wja6aJ9p0=)

---
**I’m proud to support Emerge because they stand with women at the very beginning of the long, hard road to public office – and stick with them every step of the way. With more women stepping up to run for office and fight for our futures, Emerge’s unwavering support and winning strategy matters now more than ever. **

Year after year, I see Emerge women give everything they've got on the campaign trail and defy the odds to achieve historic progress. They’re often the first to shatter glass ceilings from school boards all the way up to Congress, daring to demand that their voices be heard where decisions are made. **We urgently need these voices to strengthen our vulnerable democracy and resist the far-right’s constant attempt to shut these communities out.

That’s why your support today is so critical.** Emerge needs it to keep building a women-led and community-driven movement, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it today. Community members like you are at the heart of this work to make sure Emerge can be there for every woman daring to fight back. **Emerge is the only organization of its kind doing this vital work, Peter, so please:**
**[Join me by making a donation of $5 or more to Emerge right now. Every dollar helps empower Democratic women to run for office in every state and at every level of our government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70269635/428854909/-1986725773?amount=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZTQ0MmM2LWViNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wP-esC-kV85fU5Q6c8Quq0uHjvqd4qB337Wja6aJ9p0=)**
Thank you for being a part of this work,

Hillary Rodham Clinton
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70269636/428854910/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1317-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZTQ0MmM2LWViNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wP-esC-kV85fU5Q6c8Quq0uHjvqd4qB337Wja6aJ9p0=)

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Sep 23, 2023
Subject: Delia is the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I’m honored to work alongside progressive movement leader Rep. Delia Ramirez in Congress.
**Delia is not only the first Latina serving in Congress from the Midwest. She’s also the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family.**
Her husband is a Dreamer, a DACA recipient whose ability to live and work in the U.S. is under threat as right-wing federal judges attack the DACA program. With a deep understanding of how urgently Congress must act, **Delia is leading legislation to keep families together and protect immigrants from deportation.**
**Delia has taken politically courageous stands to champion human rights for all—including honoring the humanity of Palestinians.**
That’s risky for a first-term Congresswoman, because AIPAC’s pro-apartheid network of PACs will very likely spend millions to try to defeat her in 2024’s re-election. Can you join me in having her back?
[**Please split a donation today between Rep. Delia Ramirez’s and my 2024 re-election campaigns. Delia is a bold champion for human rights and justice, who’s moving with the urgency we need. Let’s have her back and keep her in Congress fighting for marginalized people!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKYG9Res0K8Z8Aq0N5l3QzE34s1za2WLp5niOQ38ShkCUaFlHBYPoTyZbG9vv54IxuS3zD_QRyqU_LrMT_DRSisQiaMuzrPtY9lRIiNvIqD4SLqoBfkhH_3mMFaLJ1FCrvpCiCRi3_UCsgqi-vYKF-L9bTMxAXRNWDsg-0WIMuOxVjYnttwAN1nHJwTKqQ2QIA5xRxT-IABQPM7nU3ayVAIG3Rv25EI_wFzGxD5HKCW64Yoklglr0c97qNe43RkPUs6LittKq4kyLEzAMCoVh2vKhfdr6O2h-IVRcXU509DDU4tjpQKgd-9unDtRzWMyN344VHXjXKQVB52DZ2B_JM1inUsdgbY2KjHDuUtsCqMFgf96-zP6Qgaxx6NWw2Lrk6gpqukW1GS3GnTOnvkErLelKkelXryRy-zeAf1AhTFxc/3zv/2T3RPPRJSh2yefeFOwF4fw/h8/Qh4FGf9N82uG3Nf4DBmU9iAnfGmW-Msew-0odeVLfMo)

While in the Illinois State House, Delia expanded Medicaid coverage for state residents regardless of immigration status. And she led on housing justice for all as a grassroots organizer in Chicago.
Delia is deeply rooted in her community and has set up a strong constituent services program to support residents through everyday challenges. Like me, she prioritizes this essential part of public service—in addition to pushing for the transformative policies our communities need.
Together we’ve introduced legislation to protect restaurant workers as well as a bill to expand veterans’ health care providers by welcoming health care professionals who are immigrants to care for them.
As the Vice Ranking Member of the Homeland Security Committee, Delia is also calling for expedited work permits so asylum seekers and our undocumented neighbors can stay here without fear. She has successfully pushed the Biden administration to protect more immigrants who are fleeing their countries, by extending the time period for more people to apply for Temporary Protected Status.
We need Delia in Congress to keep leading on immigration reform and pushing Democrats to act with urgency.
**Delia overcame heavy spending from billionaire-funded PACs in 2022 during her first election to Congress. Now that she’s among the boldest progressives in Congress, she’s sure to face more attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo.**
[**As we near an important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline for 2024’s re-election, please chip in $5 or more today to send me and Rep. clean_body: Gearing up for 2024’s re-election: | | | Friend, In her short time in Congress, Rep. Delia Ramirez has already accomplished so much for marginalized communities. A champion for human rights, Delia is leading legislation to provide pathways to citizenship for asylum seekers and our undocumented neighbors. She’s successfully pushed the Biden administration to protect more immigrants from deportation. And Delia was one of only 9 members of Congress who voted to affirm Palestinians’ humanity this summer. This politically courageous act makes her a target of AIPAC and its network of PACs, who spent $40 million to defeat progressives in 2022’s elections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we’re pushing Democrats to embrace a bold progressive agenda and pass the transformative policies we urgently need. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Sep 23, 2023 Subject: Delia is the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m honored to work alongside progressive movement leader Rep. Delia Ramirez in Congress. Delia is not only the first Latina serving in Congress from the Midwest. She’s also the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. Her husband is a Dreamer, a DACA recipient whose ability to live and work in the U.S. is under threat as right-wing federal judges attack the DACA program. With a deep understanding of how urgently Congress must act, Delia is leading legislation to keep families together and protect immigrants from deportation. Delia has taken politically courageous stands to champion human rights for all—including honoring the humanity of Palestinians. That’s risky for a first-term Congresswoman, because AIPAC’s pro-apartheid network of PACs will very likely spend millions to try to defeat her in 2024’s re-election. Can you join me in having her back? While in the Illinois State House, Delia expanded Medicaid coverage for state residents regardless of immigration status. And she led on housing justice for all as a grassroots organizer in Chicago. Delia is deeply rooted in her community and has set up a strong constituent services program to support residents through everyday challenges. Like me, she prioritizes this essential part of public service—in addition to pushing for the transformative policies our communities need. Together we’ve introduced legislation to protect restaurant workers as well as a bill to expand veterans’ health care providers by welcoming health care professionals who are immigrants to care for them. As the Vice Ranking Member of the Homeland Security Committee, Delia is also calling for expedited work permits so asylum seekers and our undocumented neighbors can stay here without fear. She has successfully pushed the Biden administration to protect more immigrants who are fleeing their countries, by extending the time period for more people to apply for Temporary Protected Status. We need Delia in Congress to keep leading on immigration reform and pushing Democrats to act with urgency. Delia overcame heavy spending from billionaire-funded PACs in 2022 during her first election to Congress. Now that she’s among the boldest progressives in Congress, she’s sure to face more attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we can win real change for a more just and equitable world. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Darien Davis, LCV
subject: Tell the Department of Transportation: It's Time for Cleaner Cars
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~YvE-hv/M2h5OE1LV1VhZXZrTVVuKzZYaDNkWGtlekpoc0tNTG5nT0x5S0c5aTh6UzJrcE9tWU1MbEI0SEVVR1VneHFneFp4OURRTko3bHpkemhibzZvcVFNZlZwVHlnS3RJU1lqT09vRnY4MzgrL3M9S0/ZERMQlhrbjBzVXM1YXZTWVNNV3pJakhpWmN5QXVGZUdwaW1jOGV6cHlpU0YwdGplRGRsSG1YdnBlaFBxUUlKUDRWVWVJZGVhNGgxQStTUGZKMXpsWFE9PQS2 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcg_4EecV/M2h5OE1LV1VhZXZrTVVuKzZYaDNkWGtlekpoc0tNTG5nT0x5S0c5aTh6UzJrcE9tWU1MbEI0SEVVR1VneHFneFp4OURRTko3bHpkemhibzZvcVFNZlZwVHlnS3RJU1lqT09vRnY4MzgrL3M9S0/ZERMQlhrbjBzVXM1YXZTWVNNV3pJakhpWmN5QXVGZUdwaW1jOGV6cHlpU0YwdGplRGRsSG1YdnBlaFBxUUlKUDRWVWVJZGVhNGgxQStTUGZKMXpsWFE9PQS2

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc9xKeyfY/M2h5OE1LV1VhZXZrTVVuKzZYaDNkWGtlekpoc0tNTG5nT0x5S0c5aTh6UzJrcE9tWU1MbEI0SEVVR1VneHFneFp4OURRTko3bHpkemhibzZvcVFNZlZwVHlnS3RJU1lqT09vRnY4MzgrL3M9S0/ZERMQlhrbjBzVXM1YXZTWVNNV3pJakhpWmN5QXVGZUdwaW1jOGV6cHlpU0YwdGplRGRsSG1YdnBlaFBxUUlKUDRWVWVJZGVhNGgxQStTUGZKMXpsWFE9PQS2

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9994270&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDUxNjE3MgS2&spReportId=MTgyMDUxNjE3MgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9994270&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDUxNjE3MgS2&spReportId=MTgyMDUxNjE3MgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_s3-0eGMG/M2h5OE1LV1VhZXZrTVVuKzZYaDNkWGtlekpoc0tNTG5nT0x5S0c5aTh6UzJrcE9tWU1MbEI0SEVVR1VneHFneFp4OURRTko3bHpkemhibzZvcVFNZlZwVHlnS3RJU1lqT09vRnY4MzgrL3M9S0/ZERMQlhrbjBzVXM1YXZTWVNNV3pJakhpWmN5QXVGZUdwaW1jOGV6cHlpU0YwdGplRGRsSG1YdnBlaFBxUUlKUDRWVWVJZGVhNGgxQStTUGZKMXpsWFE9PQS2 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdw7gWHy/M2h5OE1LV1VhZXZrTVVuKzZYaDNkWGtlekpoc0tNTG5nT0x5S0c5aTh6UzJrcE9tWU1MbEI0SEVVR1VneHFneFp4OURRTko3bHpkemhibzZvcVFNZlZwVHlnS3RJU1lqT09vRnY4MzgrL3M9S0/

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Do you see it?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Imagine a future free from gun violence
#

Imagine a future free from gun violence.
Do you see it?
**Right now, this future is more in our reach than ever before.**
When GIFFORDS was founded ten years ago, we never could have known that today, we’d have helped pass over 525 gun safety laws in states across the country.
We never could have known that gun violence, which was once considered taboo for our elected officials to speak freely about, is now a winning issue.
We never could have known that after a decade of fighting, we’d now be closer to a future with universal background cheeks than we’ve ever been. We are making progress.
A future free from gun violence is possible, but we still have obstacles in our way. We have a narrowly divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House. We’re up against the gun lobby, who spends millions of dollars and uses fear-mongering tactics to push their "guns everywhere" agenda nationwide.
We need the resources to fight back, and that starts with the donations from people like you to emails like these.
[**So please, make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can today to GIFFORDS PAC and help us keep up our work to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230924-1-60&t=1&akid=6633%2E3935704%2EeC4S_D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: David Hogg
subject: Why I asked for your old furniture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=fk5Qh4Q0zsswOM6MPSuRzf64dAODs9krnpFi051r2XXXU4fPTdvRgqsrBUrtnbFDlSw0EOze6nDRZ2nkdagMSy9WyKImRN8LnJRx0g1d9dQLM5o3iQcJn2ER3%2BA3orXB5qCoys%2FPmdi9ApljSXe3RAJe8S%2BL6%2FLcuMTmBxX3YvEz1SiRg8XwQEnlqAFmowyNLK1A6moU3BSuUjj2RLSo3zRw%2BTlsdm3o78F1c%2FcGA8Q%2FZ%2Bz7ER8R6MleGZLnjoYiqphlzeroaOQPsdslhmcZXXOBQxtrVtidwimzALXZoW3HUDVxwWWnLHc4knFrorpAC1aphjAhyJyoQYSvXL12Cmlekj6kfa2av9%2F7Ao6a9GAnSMkrVi5aG3Au96AlquVg%2ByvZq95LTadm40sibwquetHSeAG%2FvErpjqpdLOnzNq2Jlge4JztgIYcbE%2FNXOgYA .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago:
Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-hogg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-hogg]
I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Roland Gutierrez's support in this mission.
Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-hogg]
This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul.
But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts.
Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs). [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-hogg]
More soon,
David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.)
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

| Peter,

Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but my FEC fundraising deadline is this week, and Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day.

My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: [VIDEO] fake fundraising tactics inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We believe in treating Porter Supporters with the respect you deserve.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)
Derek, check out this video message from Katie:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-1?refcode=EMAL24_1_DTC_20230924_V1_F&refcode2=30383_3422442_FIDQY-&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)
[Watch now ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-1?refcode=EMAL24_1_DTC_20230924_V1_F&refcode2=30383_3422442_FIDQY-&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)
As Katie mentioned, you won’t find any fake, BS fundraising tactics that try to shame you or terrify you into donating here.
Katie believes in treating Porter Supporters with the respect you deserve—and that means being honest with you about what is real and urgent. That includes our fundraising deadlines and the facts we give you about our race.
So here’s the deal, Derek.
We have a federal fundraising deadline on September 30. That means we’ll have to soon disclose how much we’ve raised over the past three months.
Reporting a strong number can deter super PACs from spending big on attack ads on Katie, and it’ll ensure we have the resources to sign off on the important spending decisions we’ll be making soon to reach as many undecided voters as possible before the California primary in six months.
[**That’s why we set an end-of-quarter goal of $100,000, and we still have $71,540 left to go to reach it. Can you pitch in $5 now to help us close the gap?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-1?refcode=EMAL24_1_DTC_20230924_V1_F&refcode2=30383_3422442_FIDQY-&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-1?refcode=EMAL24_1_DTC_20230924_V1_F&refcode2=30383_3422442_FIDQY-&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)
Thanks!
—Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL24_1_DTC_20230924_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30383_3422442_FIDQY-&akid=30383%2E3422442%2EFIDQY-)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Voting rights are under attack across the country. Here in North Carolina, Republicans are hellbent on rolling back access mail-in and early voting options, disproportionately impacting communities of color.

Though we’ve seen small wins this year to protect the voting power of Black and Brown communities with _Allen v. Milligan_ and _Moore v. Harper_ , this is no time to slow down our momentum.

This legislative session, we need to show her she has our support as she works to pass key legislation that will fortify our right to vote. [_**We face a major FEC deadline at the end of this week. Will you support Valerie’s efforts with a $5 contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70272042/428863418/-344990004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230924-z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDFjOWI3OC1mMzVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pY0jh9K1WVm4U2zoz7KiCuAExdtGrQPDV4zUdKufac=)

clean_body: Voting rights are under attack across the country. | = | Peter, Did you see Valerie’s article on The Hill? = | = Voting rights are under attack across the country. Here in North Carolina, Republicans are hellbent on rolling back access mail-in and early voting options, disproportionately impacting communities of color. Though we’ve seen small wins this year to protect the voting power of Black and Brown communities with Allen v. Milligan and Moore v. Harper , this is no time to slow down our momentum. This legislative session, we need to show her she has our support as she works to pass key legislation that will fortify our right to vote. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Protecting our right to vote will take a massive effort. name: Barack Obama
subject: I’m going to say something that might surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President

Team, the next big election is happening a lot sooner than you think.

Many states across the country are holding important elections **this year**. That’s why the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, led by my friend Eric Holder, is working to help elect Democracy Defenders across the country who will support fair elections.

[**_The NDRC’s work is made possible by people like you, so I’m asking you to join me today in supporting their efforts. Let me tell you about some of the important elections that will be taking place over the next few months:

→ **Multiple states** will hold elections to fill seats on their highest courts. These elections will have an impact on a whole host of issues we care about – including reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights.

→ Upcoming elections in **Virginia** will decide control of the state legislature. They’ll determine whether Virginia keeps building on the progress they’ve made on issues like voting rights and gun safety, or sees that progress rolled back.

**The outcomes of elections like these will have massive consequences for our democracy, team, so we cannot afford to sit them out.

[_That’s why, if you’re able, I hope you’ll donate today to support all of the NDRC’s work. Anything you can give will help power their efforts to support fair elections and strengthen our democracy._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70273622/428869275/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230924_FR_8K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZjE1YjhlLWY1NWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Nm-HqwE55N16Pz081KHf9KvjygpyrMjcyJSteA0ctfg=)**

Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement.

– President Barack Obama

clean_body: | Team, the next big election is happening a lot sooner than you think. Many states across the country are holding important elections this year. That’s why the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, led by my friend Eric Holder, is working to help elect Democracy Defenders across the country who will support fair elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let me tell you about some of the important elections that will be taking place over the next few months: → Multiple states will hold elections to fill seats on their highest courts. These elections will have an impact on a whole host of issues we care about – including reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights. → Upcoming elections in Virginia will decide control of the state legislature. They’ll determine whether Virginia keeps building on the progress they’ve made on issues like voting rights and gun safety, or sees that progress rolled back. The outcomes of elections like these will have massive consequences for our democracy, team, so we cannot afford to sit them out. = Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement. – President Barack Obama = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Then, my team sends out a survey to everyone who RSVP’d so we can get their feedback. And yes, I really do read the responses. That’s because I want to know what people are concerned about. I want to listen to what they care about. And then, I fight for solutions. And when I pick a fight, the people always win. Peter, I will always put the people over the political class. It’s what I did as a state legislator, as governor, and as UN ambassador. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f6811041e594f4c8ac0b599dac8c8039a0f6de4aa1eefaabdb0defdc172ff76400ecb479267ebf805ea9372fdb2e1bc9b7cc50ff9c3ecb3a9a310 And, it’s what I’ll do as your next president. I’m not afraid to shake up the status quo and put in the hard work that’s needed to fix the problems facing our country. I’m not beholden to Washington. I’m beholden to the American people. We need a refreshing change in Washington. We need hope for our future generations. We need an accountant in the White House who will hold BOTH sides accountable for their out-of-control spending. We need a leader who will stop your taxpayer dollars from being wasted on pork projects. We need an outsider. Someone with the executive experience of a two-term governor, the foreign policy experience of a UN ambassador, and the heart of a mom. We need a new generational leader to step up to the plate and get our country back on track. Peter, you deserve a leader who will fight for you, no matter how hard it gets. I’ve proven throughout my life that I never give up when the going gets tough. In fact, when I’m underestimated, it only makes me fight harder. We have a country to save, Peter. And together you, me, and the rest of our team can get it done. But I need you on my side each step of the way to get there. As we inch closer to my next debate, I am asking for your support so we can continue to capitalize on the momentum and amplify my message across the country. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f6811041e594f4c8ac0b599dac8c8039a0f6de4aa1eefaabdb0defdc172ff76400ecb479267ebf805ea9372fdb2e1bc9b7cc50ff9c3ecb3a9a310 So if you can, would you be willing to chip in a generous donation of $20.24 or more before I take the stage in 3 days? Thank you for being on my side, Peter. Let’s win this! My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f6811041e594f4c8ac0b599dac8c8039a0f6de4aa1eefaabdb0defdc172ff76400ecb479267ebf805ea9372fdb2e1bc9b7cc50ff9c3ecb3a9a310 Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f6811041e594f4c8ac0b599dac8c8039a0f6de4aa1eefaabdb0defdc172ff76400ecb479267ebf805ea9372fdb2e1bc9b7cc50ff9c3ecb3a9a310 DONATE https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f68119a9705e4cf513db3b0cea09c17509967a42dfca77c2d17df58ee6b3c2610572fb150356fe521951bc2f28d9475bf62c5cdbfb02a672a48be https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f68119a9705e4cf513db3b0cea09c17509967a42dfca77c2d17df58ee6b3c2610572fb150356fe521951bc2f28d9475bf62c5cdbfb02a672a48be GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f68114d3ecde16a24a3b7f716be35d398b31fa7757fd178487047996a1233cf2c1ebedcb6bfd51a92e14f1a1bed977d885af38924c18780874c76 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f68114d3ecde16a24a3b7f716be35d398b31fa7757fd178487047996a1233cf2c1ebedcb6bfd51a92e14f1a1bed977d885af38924c18780874c76 VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2a50fa288d7f681140898999399e1ba21cee22a26982434e5af8ed4bd27819a953f7b8df53ea2ed7b8ab85006b5f8c7d63f3ce1b552ec73431d88e51fca5887a My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. Peter, Kevin McCarthy and his far-right friends are on the verge of shutting down the U.S. government — a major embarrassment and a huge disruption for so many government workers and their families just trying to put food on the table. Kevin’s not just incompetent, though. He’s also dangerous. Let’s count the ways: 😡 He hightailed it to Mar-a-Lago just three weeks after the events of January 6th to grovel at the feet of Donald Trump. 😡 He said he personally would “support” a nationwide abortion ban. 😡 He voted _against_ a resolution condemning violence against Asian American communities. 😡 He was a major supporter of the _Defense of Marriage Act,_ and voted against the _Respect for Marriage Act_ passed last year. Kevin McCarthy is not just an embarrassment — he poses a real threat to women, LGBTQ+, and people of color in this country. We have to stand up to his hatred and bigotry, and kick him out of the speakership come 2024. clean_body: | = Peter, Kevin McCarthy and his far-right friends are on the verge of shutting down the U.S. government — a major embarrassment and a huge disruption for so many government workers and their families just trying to put food on the table. Kevin’s not just incompetent, though. He’s also dangerous. Let’s count the ways: 😡 He hightailed it to Mar-a-Lago just three weeks after the events of January 6th to grovel at the feet of Donald Trump. 😡 He said he personally would “support” a nationwide abortion ban. 😡 He voted against a resolution condemning violence against Asian American communities. 😡 He was a major supporter of the Defense of Marriage Act, and voted against the Respect for Marriage Act passed last year. Kevin McCarthy is not just an embarrassment — he poses a real threat to women, LGBTQ+, and people of color in this country. We have to stand up to his hatred and bigotry, and kick him out of the speakership come 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Team HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Can I count on your $15? | = = | = = | = = Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans. I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it. I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. = Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Better than Morphine... Safer than Aspirin?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Hi Reader,

Since the 1930s,
natural doctors have been on a quest to find the "Holy Grail" of
pain relief...

I'm talking about a
remedy that blesses you with the pain-killing rush of opioid
drugs like morphine... but without the risk of addiction or
overdose.

Little did they know,
a Columbia University MD already found the "Holy Grail" back in
the 1970s.

You see, this doctor
uncovered a powerful, natural painkiller... that works with your
body's natural mechanisms to renew your achy joints from the
inside out.

And in fact, it's so
effective at stopping pain... Even some mainstream doctors are
now saying it's better than morphine - yet safer than aspirin!

Skeptical?

Well, right now I'll
show you all of the evidence.

Plus, you'll see a
simple way to use this Columbia doctor's discovery to be PAIN
FREE in as little as 24 hours!

⇒Click here to
discover this simple pain solution

To Your Best Health,

Jesse Cannone, CFT,
CPRS, MFT
Co-Founder, Healthy
Back Institute

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Friend,
As we continue fighting together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect, it’s never been more important for us to continue building our coalition.
But in order to do so, I want to be fully transparent. Q3 has been really slow on the fundraising front. We haven’t seen a drop-off in contributions this steep in a long time.
With our end-of-quarter deadline coming up on Saturday, I hope this slowdown doesn’t hold us back. According to my team, we still have to raise $13,700 before then.
If you’re with me, I hope you’ll step up today. The work we have ahead of us depends on it.
The good news is that you’re still eligible to take advantage of your PCR. If you make a $50 contribution (or $100 for couples) to my campaign, you’ll receive a FULL REFUND from the State of Minnesota.
[**Will you take advantage of your PCR and send a refundable $50 contribution to my campaign? subject: I still remember this conversation [📎photo enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70275068/428874235/146446798?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230924_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzNjg2NmRiLWZiNWEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HFWqe4QkVOlcs22hLTVjftJJ4oQbPYm56DG0BvXiCTg=) Peter,

I still remember this conversation I was having with Will last Summer. We were talking about the fight ahead and with so much on the line, just how important it was to defeat Ken Calvert.

Flash forward to this month, and even I never could have imagined just how low Calvert and his MAGA allies would stoop in their bid to damage the President and stoke division.

They’re pushing the government to the brink of shutdown.

They’re launching an impeachment investigation into President Biden.

And all the while, they’re waging an unprecedented assault on voting rights to keep power.

These people aren’t interested in governing, Peter. Instead, they’re focused on putting petty personal grievances over people and actual policies. **The good news is we can crush their chances of seizing power, and it starts here in CA-41.**

**[That’s why I’m asking you to send in a donation to support Will Rollins -- one of the finest candidates for Congress that I have had the privilege of supporting. Flash forward to this month, and even I never could have imagined just how low Calvert and his MAGA allies would stoop in their bid to damage the President and stoke division. clean_body: We must work together to tackle our problems. | = | Peter, In a moment, I'm going to tell you how our economy and our environment go hand in hand, but first, I need to ask: = | = | = I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we work together to tackle our problems with proper planning and strategy, every Washingtonian benefits. I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we create cross-cutting solutions to our most pressing problems, we can create jobs, put more money in more families' pockets, and boost local economies. Now, I'm ready to continue creating cross-cutting solutions as Washington's next governor. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Arizona, Nevada, and...

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70275273/428874881/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWJjMjlmZi1mYjVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4oSQB-lw4RhsCyD8W7k-6wGPH1fIByzz8YYhj8sRn8=&emci=4360e834-f35a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=71bc29ff-fb5a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | There are just a handful of must-win states in 2024.

If Democrats are going to hold the White House, we have to win a combination of Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Arizona, Nevada, and _**Georgia._**

And here’s the deal: **_if we win Georgia, the GOP has NO shot at winning the White House._**

That makes Georgia the single most important state for Democrats to win in 2024.

[**_If you’re with us and you agree that Georgia is the single most important state in 2024, then pitch in right now to help us hold Georgia in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70275275/428874883/710125701?refcode=20230924.1_DPG_9AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWJjMjlmZi1mYjVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4oSQB-lw4RhsCyD8W7k-6wGPH1fIByzz8YYhj8sRn8=)**_

The earlier you contribute, the further your donation will go. If our grassroots team steps up right now, we can fund our voter outreach program from now through next November. That’ll allow us to get field organizers recruiting volunteers and talking directly with voters for over a full year.

But if our team waits until next summer, we’ll have to rush to get our voter outreach program together, and we might not be able to reach all the voters we need to win this extremely close race.

[**_The earlier we’re able to fund our program, the more we can do leading up to the 2024 election. So don’t wait. Invest right now in the team that will win the most important state in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70275277/428874885/710125701?refcode=20230924.1_DPG_9AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWJjMjlmZi1mYjVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4oSQB-lw4RhsCyD8W7k-6wGPH1fIByzz8YYhj8sRn8=)**_

Let’s keep Georgia blue.

– GA Dems

| Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey. Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put $14 MILLION 😧 into his failed run for Senate last year AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him. [If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. We built a people-powered team that made history in 2022 – let’s build something even bigger to win again in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1fb31b0-29b7-4919-a175-da59c5ec4bb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks to folks like you, _Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats_ in the Senate who are fighting for working families. We’re going to need your help to keep it that way. Appreciate you all!! ❤️ John John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

| Hi team,

It’s Sarah here, Senior Campaign Advisor here at Scholten HQ. I wanted to update you on our upcoming FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th.

Every three months, we assess how much money we need to raise to make sure we can run a winning campaign in 2024. These totals are painstakingly calculated based on the fundraising numbers of our opponents, our staffing needs on the ground, and how much we will have to spend to get Hillary’s message out in this upcoming year. The current three-month period, the quarter, is ending soon, and we are falling a little behind.

The reality of running a robust campaign in a district as competitive as MI-03 is that you have to have a lot of money to win. With three Republican opponents, we have to raise more than ever to be ready to beat any of them. Whichever Republican candidate wins the primary will have the full backing of national Republican groups and, with them, a massive stack of cash to use to win.

On the other hand, Hillary's campaign will have her grassroots network's support to win. That’s why your contribution is so significant. We need to reach our goals to stay competitive, and being competitive is more expensive than ever as national Republican groups begin to invest later this cycle. Your support now helps us organize early to be ready for the year to come. [_**Will you please contribute today to get us back on track to reach this critical FEC deadline? With your support, we can build a campaign to beat any of our Republican opponents in 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70276048/428877236/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230924-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZjYzJkNS1mYzVhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rrMATfkJDvy5TJtvwnb_Drxzb8ovz1MxnowjnwjtfB0=)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: We Heart Seattle is challenging the status quo on homelessness
body:
This week we talked with Andrea Suarez, Founder and Executive
Director of the non-profit volunteer organization We Heart
Seattle. In a very short time the group has made a significant
impact in cleaning up encampments and helping people get off the
streets.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: (2) me, Donald J. Trump
subject: fw: “60 days to beat [Trump]”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
That was 30 days ago... Today is the halfway point...
| | Friend,
---
The special interest RINOs who pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us were caught saying, _**“We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days.”**_
**That was exactly 30 days ago. We are officially at the halfway point of their sinister plot to try and beat us...**
_...And I am pleased to tell you that right now our campaign is in its STRONGEST POSITION on record._
One poll gives us a 50-POINT LEAD in the entire Republican primary nationwide.
And in individual states, there isn’t a single poll in existence that shows us losing. In fact, we have double-digit leads across the board.
So, how have we been able to overcome this multimillion-dollar globalist plot to rob us of the Republican nomination?
The answer is simple... _YOU_.

Today is the halfway point... | | Friend, The special interest RINOs who pledged to spend over $370 MILLION against us were caught saying, “We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days.” That was exactly 30 days ago. We are officially at the halfway point of their sinister plot to try and beat us... ...And I am pleased to tell you that right now our campaign is in its STRONGEST POSITION on record. One poll gives us a 50-POINT LEAD in the entire Republican primary nationwide. And in individual states, there isn’t a single poll in existence that shows us losing. In fact, we have double-digit leads across the board. So, how have we been able to overcome this multimillion-dollar globalist plot to rob us of the Republican nomination? The answer is simple... YOU. You see, the globalist RINO cowards are no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots. But I hope you’ll agree, Friend, we can’t simply get complacent now. That’s why I’ve set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of 30,000 grassroots donations over the RINOs’ “30-day window” to make these final 30 days their worst nightmare! This is our chance to PROVE that every time these fake “Republicans” try to undermine the primary and cancel out YOUR vote, our incredible movement only becomes that much more UNITED. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: (2) me, Donald J. Trump Date: Thu, September 7, 2023 Subject: FW: “60 days to beat [Trump]” To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO’s who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the primary are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month? And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, “We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days”? Well, I’ve been thinking... What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully? And I know just the thing... We’re going to kick off our largest fundraising SURGE of the entire campaign to date! Which is why I’ve set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of 60,000 grassroots donations over the RINO’s“60-day window.” Because what we’ve PROVEN to be true time and again is that no amount of special interest money from shadowy RINO Super PACs can stop our beautiful movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, September 3, 2023 Subject: Another $50 MILLION?! To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, The amount of money the special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat OUR beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd. By now, I’m sure you’re already aware of the $370 million that they’ve pledged to spend against us in the primary... ...But LEAKED reports now reveal that the RINOs’ chief Super PAC is plotting to add *ANOTHER $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE! These cowards were even caught saying... “Now let me tell you a secret — don’t leak this... We’re making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we’ve got to beat him in the next 60 days.” How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their own Party’s undisputed FRONTRUNNER leading by 50 and even 60 points? Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country’s justice system to try andJAIL his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator. Well, here’s the TRUTH about them: They don’t care at all about Republicans winning back the White House. These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at YOUR expense for decades! And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda – and nothing more. Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and HELP Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the ONLY candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST (yours truly) never again steps foot in the White House. Friend, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices. But, as we’ve already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots. And now, we need to show these RINOs that every time they attempt to BUY this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks. Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking us , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe’s flailing campaign. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The hard truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek: In just a
moment, [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2150?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1001&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection
campaign in Wisconsin and Tony Evers' team. But first, I hope you’ll let
me explain why your support is so important — especially right now.

Wisconsin is no stranger to close elections. Four of the last six
presidential races in our state have been decided by less than a single
point. And after pouring $77 million into the state, Republicans won
Wisconsin’s Senate race last year by just 1%.

So as the GOP looks to flip the two seats they need to reclaim the
majority and hand the gavel over to Mitch McConnell, you better believe
they’ve got their eyes on my race in Wisconsin. They’ll do and spend
whatever it takes to flip my seat.

With Republican leaders threatening everything from Social Security cuts
to a national abortion ban, we can’t allow them to take my seat and the
Senate majority with it. But it’s no secret this could be my toughest and
most expensive race yet, and the hard truth is that Republicans could
easily squeak by here and win if we do nothing to stop them.

That’s why our team has set ambitious fundraising goals to build the
resources we’ll need to fight back and protect this seat, but right now,
we’re coming up short on our targets, which is why I’m asking:

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2150?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1002&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Will you please consider splitting a donation between Tony's team and
my reelection campaign to help us protect my seat in Wisconsin, and the
Democratic Senate majority with it?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately and be split between Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2151?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1003&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2151?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1004&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2151?amount=50&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1005&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Donate $50 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2151?amount=100&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1006&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2151?amount=500&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1007&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Donate $500 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2150?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230924_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.1.3&t=1008&akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa ]Another Amount

The path to victory for Democrats runs right through Wisconsin, and any
contribution you can give will keep me out on the campaign trail talking
to voters across the state. It’s going to take all of us pitching in to
win — I'm up to the task, and I'm hoping I can count on you to join me.

Thanks for everything,

Tammy

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6392%2E1827488%2E3UjTqa

This is your chance to Here’s why your support is so important: State Democrats have WON 26 special elections in 2023, winning a competitive election in New Hampshire, flipping a seat from red to blue in the Virginia Senate, and defending our majority in the Pennsylvania House. In Virginia, we have an election on deck where every single seat is up for grabs. And we still need 16 Democrats from your area to chip in to hit next week’s end-of-quarter fundraising goal. If we fail to meet our $200,000 end-of-quarter goal, we could give Republicans a cash advantage heading into October and lose in Virginia this November. But you can help defeat far-right Republicans in the states by being one of the 16 donors from your area we need to step up before our deadline. subject: I really shouldn’t be showing you this…

body:
... but what the heck!
|

| | Peter, this probably isn’t something I’m supposed to be sharing with you, but we’re less than a week from our Q3 deadline, so I’m pulling every lever possible: [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6006?t=10&amount=25&akid=495%2E52803%2ELSMW2Y) | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6006?t=11&amount=25&akid=495%2E52803%2ELSMW2Y)
---
Yeaaah, so as you can see, the past week’s fundraising numbers have pretty much hit a brick wall, and I’d be hard-pressed to think of a worse time for this to happen.
It sucks, but it’s not too late to right the ship. _And with this grassroots team, don’t ever count us out._
**That said, we do have a lot of ground to make up before Saturday’s End-of-Quarter deadline.[If we’re going to hit our $25,000 goal, we’ve got to move fast. Could you pitch in $25 to help get us back on track?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/6006?t=12&amount=25&akid=495%2E52803%2ELSMW2Y)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: BobCasey.com
subject: Mitch McConnell and national Republican donors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We need your help to defend our Democratic Senate majority.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)
**THIS JUST IN:** CNBC reports that dark-money GOP billionaires and Wall Street executives “have signaled they will likely back” David McCormick's Senate campaign, which could make PA's Senate race one of the most expensive of 2024.** [**Please, Peter, will you rush a donation to defend PA's Senate seat against a self-funding challenger and GOP super PAC money? The stakes of this race are huge — we need to act NOW.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230924-1?amount=5&refcode=em2023924-1&refcode2=740_552475__wPXMn&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn) **[Rush a Donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230924-1?amount=5&refcode=em2023924-1&refcode2=740_552475__wPXMn&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)**
---
Peter, this news is big.
David McCormick, a mega-millionaire GOP candidate who could self-fund his campaign, announced his campaign against Bob last week. And already, we're getting reports that dark money GOP billionaires are launching a Super PAC to support his campaign to flip Pennsylvania red.
We could be facing hundreds of millions of dollars of outside spending to defeat Bob, and we need your grassroots support to fight back.
**[Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are ready to pull out all the stops to flip PA's Senate seat and take back the majority, so we're urgently asking for your support TODAY. Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline this week to defend Bob Casey against millions and millions of GOP spending we expect to see in this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230924-1?refcode=em2023924-1&refcode2=740_552475__wPXMn&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230924-1?refcode=em2023924-1&refcode2=740_552475__wPXMn&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)**
We need to do everything in our power to compete with a self-funding opponent like McCormick. **[Your donations really have an impact on our campaign, and we're grateful for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230924-1?refcode=em2023924-1&refcode2=740_552475__wPXMn&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=740%2E552475%2E_wPXMn)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
