_*OUR DATA COLLECTION TEAM FLIPPED THROUGH THOUSANDS OF FILES TO SELECT YOU AS**ONE OF THE 1,250 DEMOCRATS** THAT WILL RESPOND TO THIS POLL. PLEASE, ANSWER THIS **URGENT** POLL BEFORE 11:59 PM!*_
**Since Vice President Kamala Harris was elected, she has proven herself to be a vital asset and a strong force to keeping our democracy alive.**

Beyond her historic election, she has continued to break records _and_ barriers with her persistence and strong leadership.

However, the MAGA extremist rot that has plagued this nation since Donald Trump’s election has taken root.

Every day far-right extremists and MAGA heads try to stain her image in an effort to bring VP Harris’s and President Biden’s agenda to a _s-c-r-e-e-c-h-i-n-g HALT._

That’s why we’re reaching out to loyal Democrats like you to fix the record and strengthen Kamala Harris’ approval rating.
**_PLEASE ANSWER THIS POLL BEFORE OUR URGENT 11:59PM DEADLINE:_**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10690%2E878179%2E2-MfJP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10690%2E878179%2E2-MfJP).**

body:
Our fundraising numbers are about to become public for the first time — and all eyes will be on us.

| Peter,

It’s hard to believe that it’s already been around a month since I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Florida. It’s been a whirlwind of meeting voters, hearing from supporters like you, and spreading our message of progress and unity.

Now, we’re rapidly approaching our first end-of-quarter deadline. This is the biggest moment of our campaign yet. Our fundraising numbers are about to become public for the first time — _and all eyes will be on us._

This is our chance to prove the strength of our movement to Rick Scott, the pundits, the GOP’s megadonors, and the people of Florida. **That’s why I’ve set an ambitious $350,000 goal — and I’m counting on your help to hit it._[Please, will you split a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign before midnight tonight to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal so that we can pull ahead in the polls?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70277268/428880927/-225452087?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230924-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhMDRiMDI0LTAyNWItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fc6q4o4oXhxLgFXigJU7EjdV3jKpOS7SPjrwD2leND4=)_**

Thanks to grassroots Democrats like you, we have the momentum advantage — **a new poll shows that this race is already tied!**

As I look back on these past few weeks, I’m filled with so much gratitude for supporters like you. But I also have to be realistic about what we’re up against here.

Rick Scott and his far-right megadonors are prepared to launch even more attacks against our campaign. And if they see any sign of weakness in our public fundraising numbers, they won’t hesitate to destroy our momentum.

I’m in this race to fight for the issues that matter to families like yours — protecting Social Security and Medicare, ending gun violence, restoring reproductive rights, strengthening voting rights, and more. I promise you that I will always have your back in Washington. But today, I need you to have mine.

[_**Please, will you split $25 between Fight for Progress and me to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority? I can only defeat Rick Scott and his personal fortune if people like you stand with me.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70277274/428880933/-225452087?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230924-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhMDRiMDI0LTAyNWItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fc6q4o4oXhxLgFXigJU7EjdV3jKpOS7SPjrwD2leND4=)

name: Padora Finance Team
subject: We’re off to a good start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Folks, We’re off to a good start on our September EOQ fundraising goal, but we can’t afford to slow down. Now that fall is here, the heat is cooling down and we can look forward to some snow, but the campaign heat isn’t going anywhere. It’s just going to continue to heat up. | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e56172976e75495d8ae6f8d09897af34&_e=YKmkzmuwordUdXGgViaAxCKiQ7b--wHzF56I4O5q_rB9kSvAqusXlVowK9empUu1GsTZkfUwNhHTnGhv4mSTlouEptbEJZ66LGV193CRSutLvcVGLUjXEenzePrUNzSwh5qMbeYJzSvX9Ax2tyxT70lmukbnu4Z7HqP8dXiuLoG0nCkSnHFgiKfjEesUVY6oEyeIW7TToxgTpLUQh9DWY6R1xRm_OSpMBxqVNcpaNMdrLiwceowpSNOanggyO5quI8F47ReenjWfDQ304zcZUJsPddJ7mmWWvnE-JafhfoYSnPQ2KGqWHxZ3jfH5w4laJJOQ5ThKR9VHO3KnFJUxbRXj4dolJNx7fHzs_Ojuwqq3OH35RsBnu5V2zS9QyrmJ2CROtbLS51q6B8huFLMXCyCy1C1OnuQupi0fl4UQy6g%3D) Folks, We’re off to a good start on our September EOQ fundraising goal, but we can’t afford to slow down. name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: I’m so proud of John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John had a big week in DC last week.
#
Hi Derek, Gisele Barreto Fetterman here.
John had a big week in DC last week 🤭 But I wanted to make sure you didn't miss my two favorite moments.
**First, Chris Hayes asked João on MSNBC about his recovery, and he spoke passionately about his fight with depression.** The past year has been a wild ride of ups and downs, but through it all the support for João, his vision for Pennsylvania, and his human struggles has made all the difference.
**Then a few days later, he became emotional in a Senate hearing speaking about how to become a more empathic and effective senator.**
I am so, so proud of João -- my grandmother used to say that John had to be made so tall to fit his whole heart. So if some shorts and hoodies (and silly attacks from Fox News) are the price to bring some empathy to DC, that's fine by me. 🥰
**[You can watch João's entire answer with Chris Hayes here, and if you're able, please consider supporting his work in DC with a donation at this link.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230924-1?refcode=em20230924-1-8583&refcode2=8583_434096_BPIoY3&akid=8583%2E434096%2EBPIoY3)**
**[Watch + Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230924-1?refcode=em20230924-8583&refcode2=8583_434096_BPIoY3&akid=8583%2E434096%2EBPIoY3)**
Thank you ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230924-8583-footer&t=1&refcode2=8583_434096_BPIoY3&akid=8583%2E434096%2EBPIoY3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8583%2E434096%2EBPIoY3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8583%2E434096%2EBPIoY3)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Vice President Harris
subject: re: Impeachment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We need to show President Biden our support today. | | |

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Why I asked for your old furniture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago:
Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Serve America's support in this mission.
Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul.
But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts.
Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs). [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
More soon,
David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.)

clean_body: Friend, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago: Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️ [] I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Serve America's support in this mission. Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help? [] This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul. But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts. Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs). [] More soon, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.) [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Team Durbin
subject: Here’s what Republicans are risking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
“The House GOP is trapped in a cycle of self-sabotage.” - Axios, 9/19
Peter,
House Republicans are only days away from shutting down the government. Instead of working together to deliver a plan that puts working people first, the GOP is choosing political games and drama instead.
If Republicans fail to deliver a plan and let the government shut down, people across the country will be impacted. Active-duty military and federal law enforcement will have to work without pay, 10,000 children will lose access to the programs that provide them with food and education, food safety inspections will be delayed, and travelers could face unnecessary delays.
The GOP House majority is willing to put the economy at risk and disrupt our lives instead of working together to come to _any_ type of compromise.
**[Add your name to the Team Durbin petition now to tell Republicans to stop playing political games and get to work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279269/428887298/-1048715458?refcode=dd_em_230924_1&ms=dd_em_230924_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkyYmIwMi0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAMKvl-dgxjy0-8c0ylAZ5xO-TMHgUqp09Hu8NY0uCY=&emci=cf7e736a-9559-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce92bb02-085b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Republicans have shown the American people who they are time and time again. Whenever the MAGA majority has a chance to help people, they’ll choose party politics every time.
Democrats like Senator Durbin are doing everything they can to stop a government shutdown and keep our country moving forward. Your elected officials should be focused on helping you—not creating chaos.
****[Tell the House GOP to put people first and stop a government shutdown.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279270/428887299/-1048715458?refcode=dd_em_230924_1&ms=dd_em_230924_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkyYmIwMi0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAMKvl-dgxjy0-8c0ylAZ5xO-TMHgUqp09Hu8NY0uCY=&emci=cf7e736a-9559-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce92bb02-085b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
Thank you,
Team Durbin

******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279271/428887300/-1048715458?refcode=dd_em_230924_1&ms=dd_em_230924_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkyYmIwMi0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAMKvl-dgxjy0-8c0ylAZ5xO-TMHgUqp09Hu8NY0uCY=&emci=cf7e736a-9559-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ce92bb02-085b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)******

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Re: September
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I wanted to send you a message before the start of the week. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279444/428887805/580812971?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgzOWFiNS0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xgmcb9hNVRUjGUmfXUre9flJAuEKTwPKUTeCD38tlpY=)
Team, I hope this message finds you well. As we approach the end of September (and our biggest FEC deadline yet), it's time to reflect on the challenges we've faced this year and the battles that still lie ahead. Congress has been rocked by the MAGA-rights dysfunction month after month. We nearly defaulted on our national debt. Congressional business was held hostage during the speakership vote. _Kevin McCarthy kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee._ And now, we're standing on the precipice of a government shutdown amid a sham presidential impeachment inquiry. But thanks to the unwavering support from dedicated individuals like you, team, we've weathered numerous challenges. The GOP's persistent attempts to undermine our movement have been non-stop, but we've remained steadfast. | [LET'S KEEP FIGHTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279445/428887806/1999457342?&refcode=E4242-20230924-EOQIntro-SB-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgzOWFiNS0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xgmcb9hNVRUjGUmfXUre9flJAuEKTwPKUTeCD38tlpY=)
---
Despite the hurdles, I continued to stand up against the misinformation and divisive tactics championed by certain members of the GOP. I've taken action against those who played roles in inciting events like the Jan. 6 insurrection, ensuring that those responsible are held accountable.
Now, more than ever, we need your support to keep this momentum. **Our September goal is ambitious: we're aiming to raise $14,000 by midnight on Saturday.** I'm confident that we can reach this target with the strength and dedication of our grassroots movement. With your help, we can close that gap.
**[Team, can you chip in $5, $10, or even $25 to help us meet our $14,000 target before the end of September?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279446/428887807/1999457342?&refcode=E4242-20230924-EOQIntro-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgzOWFiNS0wODViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xgmcb9hNVRUjGUmfXUre9flJAuEKTwPKUTeCD38tlpY=)**

clean_body: I wanted to send you a message before the start of the week. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Team, I hope this message finds you well. As we approach the end of September (and our biggest FEC deadline yet), it's time to reflect on the challenges we've faced this year and the battles that still lie ahead. Congress has been rocked by the MAGA-rights dysfunction month after month. We nearly defaulted on our national debt. Congressional business was held hostage during the speakership vote. Kevin McCarthy kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee. And now, we're standing on the precipice of a government shutdown amid a sham presidential impeachment inquiry. But thanks to the unwavering support from dedicated individuals like you, team, we've weathered numerous challenges. The GOP's persistent attempts to undermine our movement have been non-stop, but we've remained steadfast. | = Despite the hurdles, I continued to stand up against the misinformation and divisive tactics championed by certain members of the GOP. I've taken action against those who played roles in inciting events like the Jan. 6 insurrection, ensuring that those responsible are held accountable. Now, more than ever, we need your support to keep this momentum. Our September goal is ambitious: we're aiming to raise $14,000 by midnight on Saturday. I'm confident that we can reach this target with the strength and dedication of our grassroots movement. With your help, we can close that gap. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = With the steadfast support of individuals from California's 14th District and nationwide, we're continuously working towards a better tomorrow. No matter how small, every contribution takes us a step closer to our goal. Thank you for standing beside us. Together, let's show the GOP the strength and resilience of our movement. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: our first campaign ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter — I remember my first days of basic training as a cadet at the Air Force Academy. A memorable moment was firearms training with an M-16 - the military version of the AR-15. I understood that it was my responsibility to use the weapon wisely. At the end of the day, we put our weapons in secure storage - not our dorm room. Now, as a trauma surgeon, I’ve seen the human toll of firearms far too often.

Last week, we released our first campaign video and it shows why we need bold leadership on gun violence prevention. If you haven’t had the chance to watch it, I hope you’ll take some time now.

For me, it is no longer enough to save lives one at a time in my operating room. The system is broken — the system that allows these weapons of war on the street, that deprives citizens of their political power and basic sense of safety.

That’s why I’m running for Congress. There’s never been a trauma surgeon and there has never even been a Black doctor able to vote in Congress. The system has never seen someone like me. Someone ready to fight when needed and to heal when it’s time.

Please take a minute to watch our ad and make a contribution to our campaign. Soon, you will begin hearing about our end of quarter deadline, and now you know why it’s so urgent. I am asking because I’m ready for change, and I simply can’t do this without your help. Thank you. Here is a link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bw-fr-eoq-2309](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70279527/428888062/-1735495496?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230924_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_Brian_na_na_EOQ01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg3Yzc2MWItMDk1Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QljHVYiTIsRUJFPvhHNWfxDVbSpSd0eRRIzQDLgOq10=)

Onward,
Dr. Brian Williams

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I have seen enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
MAGA Republicans are ready to take down working Americans and the entire economy if they don’t get their way
Team—there is less than one week until the government shuts down if Republicans don’t get their act together and come to a deal.

But what are they doing instead? Opening a baseless impeachment inquiry, trying to ram through an extremist agenda that doesn't stand a chance in the Senate, and considering a vote to oust House Speaker McCarthy.

MAGA Republicans in Congress are ready to take down working Americans and the entire economy if they don’t get their way—and Mike Lawler and the Republican establishment have no one to blame but themselves.

Mike Lawler fanned the flames of impeachment: he voted for House Speaker McCarthy and he votes with his extreme MAGA buddies in Congress the vast majority of the time. Now, the MAGA chickens are coming home to roost.

**The only way out of this mess is retaking our House majority and stripping the GOP of its power. I’m ready to fight tooth and nail to make it happen, but I’ll need you in the fight with me.**

clean_body: I look forward to continuing to serve Virginians, but I need your support to continue serving. | = | Peter, It’s Abigail. This month’s FEC deadline serves as a valuable reminder that we are one month closer to the upcoming Virginia elections. In a place as competitive as Virginia, where prominent national Republicans and top political experts alike have their eyes trained on turning this purple state red, it’s essential we continue to build momentum as the election cycle progresses. = | = Next month, we will report our fundraising totals from the year’s third quarter to the FEC. This deadline could be a watershed moment for our campaign. With your support, we’ll send a resounding message to the national Republicans keen on flipping Virginia red. I’ve been overwhelmed by Virginia’s support as I’ve traveled across it, and I’m as energized today to enact lasting change in our community as I was when we first launched my campaign for Congress. = | = Thank you for your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: (2) TAKE ACTION via Malamed HQ
subject: SIGN ON: Keep PragerU out of our schools!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**PragerU is invading our public schools to push a far-right agenda:** [_Sign our petition to keep PragerU out of our schools!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=1&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)
---

**Public education is under attack:** From DeSantis’s book bans to erasing slavery from the syllabus, a small nonprofit called PragerU is leading the disinformation charge.

PragerU makes videos that will be shown in Florida and Oklahoma classrooms where cartoons explain the “benefits” of slavery, how Christopher Columbus meant no harm to native Americans, and why renewable energies are “unreliable.”

_**Even the nonprofit’s founder admitted that their material is specifically designed for indoctrination.**_

[But here’s what you can do about it:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=2&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb) [_Sign our petition today to tell your local leaders to keep PragerU out of our schools!!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=3&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)

[SIGN ON:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=4&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)

[_*We need 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight*_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=5&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)
The introduction of PragerU materials in schools is a national concern, not just local. Parents and educators must be aware of the skewed perspectives these materials offer, often masked as "alternative viewpoints."

We believe in an education system that provides a balanced view of the world, allowing students to form their own opinions. PragerU's one-sided content undermines this principle and threatens the quality of our education.

Our children deserve an education that equips them with the tools to think critically and independently. Let's ensure that our schools remain a place for unbiased learning, not a platform for propaganda.

[RIGHT NOW:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=6&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb) [_Sign our petition to keep PragerU OUT of our public schools for good!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=7&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)

Thank you,
Malamed HQ
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=472%2E8507%2EEqUVYb)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Cori Bush
subject: Stand in solidarity with UAW workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This year, the Big Three automakers are projected to rake in $32 billion in profits. | |
---
Peter, Across the country, workers are rising up demanding their right to fair pay and benefits -- and we must stand with them. Now, UAW workers at Ford, GM, and Stellantis have gone on strike, demanding a fair contract. Over the last few years, CEOs of the Big Three automakers have seen their pay skyrocket by 40%. And, this year, the Big Three are projected to rake in $32 billion in profits.[1] Auto workers have made this possible, but they’re making 10% less than last year, which is outrageous. **When these corporations see record profits, their workers MUST see record wages.** [**Click here to send a message directly to the CEOs of Ford, GM, and Stellantis telling them to meet workers’ demands immediately.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojlELXhn-Twyv_6e6qJK5EVKICp6bXji2aEB9W-kOBxDNaDT8MvO7d_6KWEjpQi4MzDbh3EKycIICS1d14vnXrifYWYAK39ROnOFeZDsWVv1Y7YzWECD-zA4MIXSHwgdBZPEtQJWd6Vh4zBIQj5ka9d82-fep5wqHfHcw04zaBmx8LkmZyzFvy72M-vK2QJuHtLaFvjMIFfEe5ricBXMHfA8qJ2IeoQYBQwfscrV8UGPhaZ0Q-Uey1j1pv_3ggGN30OE-PfHf5nKiXJZ2moTTM3TvfCJ7doZ5H3TsJ-NiY1-JPwKCvpWnJ9rCSW7Iciwq49n5g4VBHXSPxP1AFmosDpB1Uj_RGcAFIyr3f5hRUqywV_1TuHKH_Ixonelm0SVin7p9c4aRTuJUJkHkgO50KeA/3zv/vcWFM3IxQzq2ACIWopjZTA/h0/jUkC68jA27ncFQROqzpzoxMevv3NyrSU63DBGdd0UUk) ** **As an activist, organizer, and the proud daughter of a former union meat cutter, I will always stand in solidarity with workers.** That’s why I’ve introduced multiple worker safety bills and am a proud co-sponsor of the _PRO Act_ , which strengthens workers’ rights to collectively bargain a fair wage with benefits. Workers are stronger together and they need to know that we have their backs. [**Stand in solidarity with striking UAW workers and send a message to the CEOs of the Big Three automakers today to immediately meet workers’ demands.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk0CTCdzMxgqSqd7rKusgOElqlNSTtI9_tQPxGBOZDdJUZt1tCrc96JhKnuBNDbF-dd-hFLnkb1PaDoBlgWuyojlELXhn-Twyv_6e6qJK5EVKICp6bXji2aEB9W-kOBxDNaDT8MvO7d_6KWEjpQi4MzDbh3EKycIICS1d14vnXrifYWYAK39ROnOFeZDsWVv1Y7YzWECD-zA4MIXSHwgdBZPEtQJWd6Vh4zBIQj5ka9d82-fep5wqHfHcw04zaBmx-CczGTKtn0OnUJVWjxrd67dh6nMafWpcJByqC-B6OoWiPTSVZFYJZ6OsdCukpA5yZdsueYz-HQU0v9n3lTQk6n_nQjaSpVvVXBEJfhXNM49ePPTg3pj4e12KJK8MmIUzcY-9Xq_5rLfcAtj_Gjf8F3JEB3EaTHjqSHwAMgKprB7Y1FTb7KLqxotYPYHeD-E-7RfdGDSc7ppB62DuxMgimyJqKTvRw5VdwuUJUxxFlKeA/3zv/vcWFM3IxQzq2ACIWopjZTA/h2/eazgo5tG5ATUmeuM89wXLYPPaFgtRbgeKj3Vz3m-CxU) Thank you for taking action today. name: Vasquez HQ
subject: The people of New Mexico deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: Lucci Letter - Campaign Update
body:
Hi!

If this is your first time reading the weekly Lucci Letter, welcome! It’s
great to have you on the team as we campaign to Take Our Country Back in
Texas’ 25th US Congressional District. I'd love to hear from you, so hit
"reply" and let me know what's on your mind!

This past week has been a busy one, as you can imagine.

My wife and I were back at the True Texas Project monthly meeting in
Granbury on Monday. We heard retired DEA agent Jeffrey Stamm discuss the
crisis at the southern border, and the failure of the federal government to
stop cartel activity from spreading throughout our country. Great to see so
many friendly faces that are ready for a Congressman who will actually
fight to secure the border (instead of just buying billboards).
[image: IMG_0078.jpeg]
Retired DEA Agent Jeffrey Stamm at True Texas Project

I spoke with my Men’s breakfast in Burleson on Thursday on the 14 Texas
Constitutional Amendments that will be on the ballot this November. There’s
a lot of them, and they will impact your taxes, so read up on those here
<https://www.sos.texas.gov/elections/forms/november-2023-ballot-language-14-finalwprops.pdf>
.

Later that day, I dropped off a message at Roger Williams’ legislative
office urging him to vote against the Continuing Resolution. As the name
implies, it continues trillions in unnecessary spending that are driving
inflation, making it harder for working families and business owners to
keep their heads above water in this economy. Any “Republican” who votes
for that spending is definitely not conservative by any stretch of the
imagination.
[image: IMG_0092.jpeg]
My Letter to Roger Williams on the Continuing Resolution

My staff and I stopped by the Republican Party Headquarters in Cleburne on
Friday morning. The Johnson County Republican Volunteers are hosting weekly
classes on the US Constitution every Friday, and it’s well worth it! I
highly recommend taking the class Constitution Alive with a local
constitution coach like my friend Gary Sanders or joining online
<https://patriotacademy.com/coach/register/6996>.

We have to invest in the next generation of conservative leaders. That’s
why I went to speak with students at The University of Texas at Arlington
on Friday evening about getting engaged in politics.
[image: IMG_0153.jpeg]
Speaking with Students at UTA

Shifting gears to the week ahead, here’s what’s on the schedule:

I’m speaking at the Bluff Dale Conservatives monthly meeting on Tuesday at
7 PM. I’ll be highlighting the importance of securing our border, fighting
the fentanyl crisis, and how you can get involved with our campaign to Take
Our Country Back. Bring your questions, because I stay late to answer.

The campaign is hosting a watch party for the 2nd GOP presidential debate
on Wednesday night. Make plans to join us at the Old Texas Brewing Co. in
Burleson with special guest Dr. Ben Voth, a national champion debate coach
and award-winning author.

My wife and I will be at the Arlington Republican Club on Thursday night,
so come say hello and tell me what you’d like me to tackle in Congress.

I know that I’m missing a few, so make sure to check the website at
www.LucciForTexas.com for all events.

Multiple organizations have offered to host a debate between Roger and I.
We’ve reached out to him, and spoken with his team when they come to our
events, but Roger Williams refuses to engage in a debate on the issues that
matter to us in TX-25. After 12 years in Congress, maybe he thinks he’s too
good for us. It’s time that we elect a new representative and Take Our
Country Back from elitist career politicians.

I’d love for you to be a part of this fight. Could you sign up to volunteer
<https://www.luccifortexas.com/> as we knock 50,000 doors across the
district or chip in $25
<https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today> to help us
connect with voters and Take Our Country Back?

Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the
future of our country.

God Bless You!
[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
LucciForTexas@gmail.com
(682) 220-9925
*www.LucciForTexas.com <http://www.luccifortexas.com/>*

name: Rick Scott
subject: NO MORE MASK MANDATES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, Democrats want to **force** Americans to wear masks again.

_I fought these mandates once before, and I’ll fight them again today._

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: my great-great-great grandfather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Team, this is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, there are NO Black women in the Senate. I’m running to change that, but I can’t make history again without your help. Will you rush $10 or more to send another Black woman to the Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/Screenshot%202023-09-24%20at%2012.05.15%20PM.png]
I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf.
The day I was sworn-in, I carried that scarf.
It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.
I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason.
And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate.
If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $10 to my Senate campaign? Every donation goes towards creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lisa Blunt Rochester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Thank you,
Lisa
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=ldtFUbWXTqpwx07C2G6MyzegwCaxQHRd87qmRjoaaaH6OfzXCAkfU1gUfzwsX1VF7VUBtjAoxQ%2Fv6F6uI4scRXBPZsJb0QJH6oZD5kagx4b8EubthcicwCqrOLPJJPe52Nq747ezalljCp6jYYIDQ18cfob%2B42gjHnR6vip%2BBdtfhNjUsWHV4PR7x%2FcPu75uEFi1wSazlDnTTSKfLDvG6Ym5CubtYcbufFfoWB1h7%2F1QipkQq1TV6Fdhde6Bze8k23%2BdbMdfEztMKB9ynMeN7AXmfOQl3OnROls7p07%2FefJSZ9U9pSvmC1FcL3dg6%2FWMbaKZQ50zldAq9NRV8lrtAEWZC3TF58W1zBGMq2TlDm2Fq%2BaXnXBGoopNlGKYRg4ED%2BtzIl6jNeP0kcDdOqyB487ak6773QtMZRpzaeJDH4I%3D .

name: Col. Mike Waltz (ret.)
subject: You’re special
body:
| | | I’m going to be honest with you - your dedication to our mission means more to me than most.

You’ve been one of my most dependable patriots from day one.

From our mission to elect conservative veterans to taking on Communist China and keeping woke OUT of our military, I know I can count on you.

_But with this comes extra responsibility._

When the Left attacks, you’re going to be the first one I reach out to.

You’re my A-Team, and just like my squad when I was a Green Beret, I’m depending on you.

**[The radical Left is determined to silence me because I’ll NEVER apologize for being a conservative, America First veteran. Now, I need your help to fight back. Will you join our fight today?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=bbcce8f7b10741b0b7ae723a66ef7113&_e=HQju_xrZ4Q0jH2u6VC7msUlBSg7_pXr9dssJ44lw_-VigRGcBvlnzxTmEO7vfOr5qQ88xrUUY9gZNoyRUvzV7sJcGp4Ap9qlH7Q-Q2RCHUreXpmnZRJURaKZ2dCv6SqldmxsioCDb0oYAP-DtMGRBXj6F34DL6cMtiYX0B04EkpcfsRFF682tLR4dGlFARpsZDQXuY59PMveMRLGauVoEGpkiUuEAcDb6lwOarpXaXN7RnEr6Yrdk2L4sRE14WgD4-lTWR77IzGcbV_prEymxz6uiC3xRnh_zA0_biW4itvet3YWJnRxdB0RUANq4A6AAepuiSmQQCsyCpmM5IYSRHZrpEGsGvHNpkJ_CIyaQZo%3D)**

---
When I was on the front lines of the battlefield, the last thing on my mind was woke politics.

All that mattered was taking down the enemy. Anything that got in the way of that primary goal had no place in our squadron.

_But today’s democrats want to replace that unity with division and hate._

They’re rewriting history with America as the villain, and I won’t stand for it.

I put my life on the line for this country, and I need YOU to help me make sure our troops sacrifices aren’t thrown out the window by the radical Left.

**[You’re my day one A-Team, and I’m counting on you. Will you stand with our mission today?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=bbcce8f7b10741b0b7ae723a66ef7113&_e=HQju_xrZ4Q0jH2u6VC7msUlBSg7_pXr9dssJ44lw_-VigRGcBvlnzxTmEO7vfOr5qQ88xrUUY9gZNoyRUvzV7sJcGp4Ap9qlH7Q-Q2RCHUreXpmnZRJURaKZ2dCv6SqldmxsioCDb0oYAP-DtMGRBXj6F34DL6cMtiYX0B04EkpcfsRFF682tLR4dGlFARpsZDQXuY59PMveMRLGauVoEJes2FephePjSD36Vr42wzb8FkEPs5vlZ5TO4-Lj1Vx84rAupW8V76cVpGEGGohq0MF3CI5iqqzox5WpTOrzj3q8hm6k13uICoofe12YEzWdoJl3UygLNS5le273YwwlaUjTCXzvBxbAUzXCxgjb50c%3D)**

I want you to hear House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy’s excuse for Republicans’ lack of real action in the House: **“It’s hard to pass anything in this place ... Anything we do is pretty tough.”** Democrats have never let slim majorities in the House or the Senate get in the way of progress. We’ve turned critical legislation into law, from the _American Rescue Plan_ , to the bipartisan infrastructure bill, to the _Inflation Reduction Act_. Republicans don’t care about getting anything done. McCarthy is busy either making excuses or doing the bidding of the most radical members of his caucus and accelerating the government toward a shutdown. **We can’t afford to let Republicans continue clinging on to power. We need to keep the Senate and White House blue and take back the House, but we need resources to do it.** **[That’s where this grassroots team comes in. Our end-of-quarter deadline is less than a week away, and we need to meet our goal to gear up for the election ahead. clean_body: I want you to hear House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy’s excuse for Republicans’ lack of real action in the House: “It’s hard to pass anything in this place ... Anything we do is pretty tough.” Democrats have never let slim majorities in the House or the Senate get in the way of progress. We’ve turned critical legislation into law, from the American Rescue Plan , to the bipartisan infrastructure bill, to the Inflation Reduction Act. Republicans don’t care about getting anything done. McCarthy is busy either making excuses or doing the bidding of the most radical members of his caucus and accelerating the government toward a shutdown. We can’t afford to let Republicans continue clinging on to power. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

As House Republicans prepare to impeach President Biden and shut down the government, you may have missed that Donald Trump is officially back on the campaign trail following his fourth criminal indictment. **Why it matters:** Trump’s rhetoric is more dangerous than ever. If elected, he’s promising to direct his Attorney General to investigate his political opponents if he’s elected. And he’s even echoing the language of the deadly Jan. 6 insurrection -- encouraging supporters to “fight like hell” or “lose their country.” **Between the lines:** we’re still over a year out from the election and if Trump’s rhetoric is already more unhinged than ever, we can expect him to flood the zone with conspiracy theories and lies about our democracy. **What they’re saying:** the vast majority of Republicans continue to fall in line with Trump - and he’s picking up new endorsements nearly every day. **The big picture:** the GOP is showing no signs of backing down from the MAGA, election-denying agenda. clean_body: | = As House Republicans prepare to impeach President Biden and shut down the government, you may have missed that Donald Trump is officially back on the campaign trail following his fourth criminal indictment. Why it matters: Trump’s rhetoric is more dangerous than ever. If elected, he’s promising to direct his Attorney General to investigate his political opponents if he’s elected. And he’s even echoing the language of the deadly Jan. 6 insurrection -- encouraging supporters to “fight like hell” or “lose their country.” Between the lines: we’re still over a year out from the election and if Trump’s rhetoric is already more unhinged than ever, we can expect him to flood the zone with conspiracy theories and lies about our democracy. What they’re saying: the vast majority of Republicans continue to fall in line with Trump - and he’s picking up new endorsements nearly every day. The big picture: the GOP is showing no signs of backing down from the MAGA, election-denying agenda. Which is why we’re going to need strong Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend democracy against these attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) | =** | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. name: Brandon Presley
subject: We can beat Tate Reeves
body:
It’s worth the read. I promise.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70282098/428894902/-1813142666?refcode=em20230924&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjUxNTZiYi0xNTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxOMl8Yg6AuQFVhi3lK6we1HsY2Q8IAXEcj0gqXUU_I=) Look, team. I'm a Public Service Commissioner, former Mayor, and a proud Mississippian running to replace Tate Reeves. He's tied for most unpopular governor in the nation, plus he's neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in state history. Simply put, Tate Reeves has got to go — but first, I need your help. Our make-or-break quarterly deadline is almost here. It's also another major public filing deadline. And you can bet your bottom dollar that all eyes will be on us again. With less than 50 days left until Election Day, we can’t afford to mess up. [**I know we can defeat Tate and his good-for-nothing band of cronies, but we don’t stand a fighting chance without our grassroots supporters. Can I count on you to split a donation with Wes Moore toward our $108,000 online goal? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70282099/428894903/-1813142666?refcode=em20230924&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjUxNTZiYi0xNTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxOMl8Yg6AuQFVhi3lK6we1HsY2Q8IAXEcj0gqXUU_I=) | [Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70282100/428894904/-1813142666?refcode=em20230924&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjUxNTZiYi0xNTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxOMl8Yg6AuQFVhi3lK6we1HsY2Q8IAXEcj0gqXUU_I=)

I’ll say it again: we’re not just up against a politician who, for years, put his bottom line before our state and the good folks who call it home. We’re also up against his rich and powerful special interests buddies who fuel his campaign war chest.
I know we can beat them with the power of the people in our corner.
See, our campaign plan is already working. Recent polling has this race TIED — 46% to 46%. But we can’t afford to slow down with less than 50 days until the Election.
I just know we can crush our quarterly fundraising goal! If you could chip in right now, we'll stay on track to reach it. And if we reach it and have another strong quarter, we'll build enough firepower to bring real change to Mississippi.
[**So that's why this is important. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more to replace Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70282101/428894905/-1813142666?refcode=em20230924&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjUxNTZiYi0xNTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxOMl8Yg6AuQFVhi3lK6we1HsY2Q8IAXEcj0gqXUU_I=)

| | **We don’t like having to email you so much.** But here’s why emails like this are so important for Democrats nationwide:
* Over the past few years, the GOP has ramped up their attacks on abortion, gun safety, and LGBTQ+ rights. **The fight to defend our fundamental freedoms _is happening in the states._**
* Republicans are working to undermine our democracy – defending rigged maps, restricting ballot access, and outright denying election results. **The fight for free and fair elections _is happening in the states._ **
* Right-wing donors are spending millions on attack ads. We’ve been consistently outraised by our Republican counterparts, leaving Democrats vulnerable. Our state legislative races are severely underfunded, and **the fight to secure and defend Democratic power nationwide _is happening in the states._ **

**Here’s the good news: A generous group of donors are matching every donation FIVE TIMES through September 30th. But here’s why emails like this are so important for Democrats nationwide: Over the past few years, the GOP has ramped up their attacks on abortion, gun safety, and LGBTQ+ rights. The fight to defend our fundamental freedoms is happening in the states. Republicans are working to undermine our democracy – defending rigged maps, restricting ballot access, and outright denying election results. The fight for free and fair elections is happening in the states. Right-wing donors are spending millions on attack ads. We’ve been consistently outraised by our Republican counterparts, leaving Democrats vulnerable. Our state legislative races are severely underfunded, and the fight to secure and defend Democratic power nationwide is happening in the states. name: David McMillan
subject: Family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hello Derek —
My name is David McMillan. I’m Adam Schiff’s Little Brother. I hope you’ll
allow me a few moments to talk about my relationship with Adam, and why
his campaign for the U.S. Senate means so much to me personally.

When I was five years old, my mother took me to the Big Brothers Big
Sisters of America office in Los Angeles, and helped me fill out an
application. In it, I said that I had three wishes: for a Big Brother, a
puppy, and a beautiful world.

Adam had just moved to Los Angeles a year earlier, and, feeling settled in
his new hometown, walked into the same Big Brothers office to volunteer.
And of all the applications he looked at that day, he chose mine.

We were eventually paired up for a day, a kind of trial run, and Adam
brought me to the beach in Venice where he was living at the time. After
an afternoon battling the crashing waves and having a blast, we dubbed
ourselves The Survivors. It was an incredible day, and the start of one of
the most important relationships in my life.

After being on a waiting list, I finally had a Big Brother.

(By the way, here’s a photo of us from those days. Check out Adam’s truly
impeccable style back then. I’d like to think I’ve helped him become a
little more hip.)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]Adam Schiff in white t-shirt and blue overalls with Little Brother David

Our relationship has only grown in the many years since — years that
brought me to Yale, to USC film school, and to a career as a TV and film
screenwriter. A career that Adam, my WGA brothers and sisters, and I are
still fighting for on the picket line:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]David McMillan holding Writers Guild of America ON STRIKE picket sign beside
Adam Schiff speaking into megaphone and striking writers

I’m a Big Brother now too, and Adam and I are family. We have been since
the day we met. I was even honored to be a groomsman at his wedding to his
amazing wife Eve. These days, since I’m not so “little” anymore, I just
refer to him as my brother – because in all the important ways, he is.

He’s the kind of person we need more of in the Senate. Someone who will
always fight to do the right thing — even if it’s not always the easy
thing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]I hope you will join me by adding a small contribution to support
Adam’s campaign ahead of his critical FEC deadline at the end of this
week. And I hope sharing this story tells you a little more about the
incredible person that Adam is.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you so much for reading. And for supporting my brother.

Together, we can all make a beautiful world.

— David McMillan (Adam’s not-so-little-anymore brother)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=sep2023_abs_em.SOCG8v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230924_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4032%2E5257348%2Enefzr6 ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

We have been since the day we met. I was even honored to be a groomsman at his wedding to his amazing wife Eve. These days, since I’m not so “little” anymore, I just refer to him as my brother – because in all the important ways, he is. He’s the kind of person we need more of in the Senate. Someone who will always fight to do the right thing — even if it’s not always the easy thing. [ ]I hope you will join me by adding a small contribution to support Adam’s campaign ahead of his critical FEC deadline at the end of this week. And I hope sharing this story tells you a little more about the incredible person that Adam is. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you so much for reading. And for supporting my brother. Together, we can all make a beautiful world. — David McMillan (Adam’s not-so-little-anymore brother) [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. But what they so often forget is that they aren’t just going up against me in 2024... they’re going up against our entire grassroots movement of over 74 MILLION PATRIOTS who refuse to surrender our country to tyranny, despair, and ruin. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Andy is working overtime.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy is working hard and doing everything in his power to keep moving Kentucky forward. Hello Peter,

I couldn't be more proud of Andy. Over the past four years, he has led our Commonwealth with kindness, poise, integrity, and decisiveness. All the while, he has remained a fantastic father, husband, and community member. **To say that he's working hard would be an _understatement._**

I'm lucky enough to see his constant drive and determination day in and day out, and I know that with your support, he will continue leading Kentucky into the future.

But this re-election race is one for the record books. More money is being spent on this race than any gubernatorial race in Kentucky history. And the man trying to defeat him is doing everything he can to try to tarnish Andy's image and deceive voters — no matter how unethical or deceitful.

I'm reaching out today to ask for your support, Peter:

[**We have one last quarterly fundraising deadline coming up, and this is our chance to protect the progress Andy has made. Will you donate any amount today to help Andy win re-election and keep working to move our Commonwealth forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70285084/428897823/-995335578?refcode=em23_230924_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230924_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=dcb82b62-1d5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2I4MmI2Mi0xZDViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWW60b4kMsUnaj0edXz6IFtlFahocJHpt8DEotYRUn8=)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70285553/428898785/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY0MzZhOS0xZDViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6s8cdHve4FVikRw9yfYAn_bqdUFHIi49GTkCgsbkxc=&emci=5c7d7c6d-6b59-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5f6436a9-1d5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter, it’s Tammy Baldwin. I wanted to take this opportunity to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for the U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.

**When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital.** When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future.

But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: "pre-existing condition."

I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that.

**Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.**

Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need.

So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.

The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter.

[**_So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you split a donation between my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70285555/428898786/2063583167?refcode=20230924.2_TB_9AE&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY0MzZhOS0xZDViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6s8cdHve4FVikRw9yfYAn_bqdUFHIi49GTkCgsbkxc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Donate another amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70285564/428898792/2063583167?refcode=20230924.2_TB_9AE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY0MzZhOS0xZDViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6s8cdHve4FVikRw9yfYAn_bqdUFHIi49GTkCgsbkxc=)
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.

So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. [**_It starts by holding onto the Democratic Senate majority; chip in if you can._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70285568/428898793/2063583167?refcode=20230924.2_TB_9AE&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjY0MzZhOS0xZDViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6s8cdHve4FVikRw9yfYAn_bqdUFHIi49GTkCgsbkxc=)

Thank you for standing with me.

— Tammy

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [11:59 PM Deadline] There’s still time to take action to protect our wolves and the lands they rely on. Are you in?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
This is urgent, friend. **We thought we were sure to hit our National Public Lands Day goal yesterday. But when we checked the numbers, we saw that we’re still falling short. This is a huge blow to our efforts to protect vulnerable animals and the lands they live on – and it’s coming at the worst possible moment for our planet. Here's why:**
**Trophy hunters are using their powerful lobby to attack the Endangered Species Act, one of our most crucial and effective environmental laws. And they’re getting a major boost from destructive industries like mining, logging and oil companies.** These greedy corporations are hell-bent on destroying wildlife habitats to extract more fossil fuels. At this point in the climate crisis, the consequences for our dangerously warming planet could be disastrous. **And vulnerable species like our LAST gray wolves are feeling the pressure on all sides. **
That’s why we’re taking a chance and **EXTENDING our fundraising deadline for ONE MORE DAY** to make sure you get the chance to chip in. We know you care about the future of our planet’s fragile ecosystems and the creatures facing corporate-driven extinction. So we had to pull your supporter record before our fundraising extension expires. Here’s what we found:
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**EXTENSION EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. TONIGHT
**WOLVES AND BEARS: FACING EXTINCTION**
---
| | [RUSH MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Extension_
_expires 11:59 p.m. This is your last chance to help hit our critical National Public Lands Day goal, friend._
---
We can’t sugarcoat it, friend – we’re worried. We set our goal of hitting $60,000 before our National Public Lands Day deadline because the situation for vulnerable wolf pups, bear cubs and other threatened creatures is dire. **Fossil fuel corporations are TRIPLING DOWN on their planet-killing exploitation and pollution. They're seeking every opportunity to expand their dirty operations into some of the most pristine wilderness areas we have left. We can help stop them by protecting the Endangered Species Act and fighting to keep our precious public lands safe for essential wildlife. But time is running out, and we must increase our efforts to fight dirty industries before it’s too late. **
That’s why we can’t afford any gap in our fundraising budget. Every dollar has a job to do in our fight against well-funded, anti-environment corporations. If we miss our goal, our planet-saving work gets harder, and we risk losing more ecosystems and their inhabitants to fossil fuel destruction.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[**Our extension only lasts until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. So please: Rush your $27 or more membership gift now and every dollar will power our efforts to fight dirty industries and protect wolves, bears and ****the only Earth we’ll ever get.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008845?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2008846?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

name: Team Tina
subject: Re: Fighting for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina is leading the charge in the Senate to protect abortion nationwide, and we want to know if you’re standing alongside her in this fight. |
#
Team, we wanted to make sure you saw Tina’s note the other day about protecting abortion rights. From coast-to-coast, far-right politicians and conservative judges are trying to take away reproductive rights from women and their families. **Tina is leading the charge in the Senate to protect abortion nationwide, and we want to know if you’re standing alongside her in this fight.** **[If you support pro-choice policies, please add your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70287411/428899578/367365235?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230924_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzYjE5ZS0xZjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qu9QiroFXkT1HFl9XeDo4L06pXZj0vYKPhA_ROS2Oow=&emci=4bf3b19e-1f5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=52f3b19e-1f5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70287412/428899579/367365235?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230924_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzYjE5ZS0xZjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qu9QiroFXkT1HFl9XeDo4L06pXZj0vYKPhA_ROS2Oow=&emci=4bf3b19e-1f5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=52f3b19e-1f5b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)
---
Thanks!
— Team Tina

\----------Forwarded Message----------
_From: Tina Smith
Date: Saturday, Sept. 23
Subject: Fighting for reproductive rights_
Folks —
I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before.
These days, each and every Republican candidate for president supports abortion bans in some form — including some who support national bans.
It’s despicable that these politicians think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care. In recent months, state legislatures across the country have passed laws to punish women who get abortions, their doctors, and sometimes even prosecutors who choose not to prosecute people under certain abortion laws.
**As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day.**
We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_.
We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done.

clean_body: Tina is leading the charge in the Senate to protect abortion nationwide, and we want to know if you’re standing alongside her in this fight. | Team, we wanted to make sure you saw Tina’s note the other day about protecting abortion rights. From coast-to-coast, far-right politicians and conservative judges are trying to take away reproductive rights from women and their families. Tina is leading the charge in the Senate to protect abortion nationwide, and we want to know if you’re standing alongside her in this fight. | Thanks! — Team Tina \----------Forwarded Message---------- From: Tina Smith Date: Saturday, Sept. 23 Subject: Fighting for reproductive rights Folks — I’m doing whatever it takes to restore reproductive rights because they are under assault like we’ve never seen before. These days, each and every Republican candidate for president supports abortion bans in some form — including some who support national bans. It’s despicable that these politicians think they should make decisions about a woman’s own health care. In recent months, state legislatures across the country have passed laws to punish women who get abortions, their doctors, and sometimes even prosecutors who choose not to prosecute people under certain abortion laws. As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know the importance of fighting for reproductive justice, especially as we see these rights stripped away day by day. We need to make some big changes — and I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to pass crucial legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act and the Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act. We can’t wait any longer to enshrine abortion rights into federal law. I’m willing to do whatever it takes to get it done. Thank you for making your voice heard. I’m proud to have your support as we fight to protect reproductive rights from far-right politicians and conservative judges. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Sometimes reality offers irony that exceeds any fiction.
If ever the boondoggle of Pentagon spending needed a concrete illustration, last week's events made the absurdity of military procurement--and Washington's bipartisan spending priorities--painfully clear.
It also continued to sharpen the inversion among the corporate parties, as GOP voices (predictably, under a Democratic administration) continue to claim the mantle of an antiwar movement lacking any sincere representation in our nation's capital.
Over 20,000 people read this newsletter. Fewer than 100 support it. If a few more readers became paid subscribers, I could publish more frequently, and also add podcasts and videos for people who prefer to listen or watch rather than read. If you're able to afford a subscription, please join me to help expand my continuing work!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Lm0W4dgeLVzkK3JxB_IEN_RozJYzP9Df1XQlb_Z3UWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=137361228)
### **#Priorities**
The disconnect between policy rhetoric, and the reality encountered by our communities, has grown so vast that it can fairly be described at this point as grotesque. Homelessness is skyrocketing around the country as a pandemic continues to rage. Meanwhile, natural disasters fueled by climate chaos devastate [one](https://substack.com/redirect/8f0ede1d-9461-4960-9351-dc0960cf535a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) community after [another](https://substack.com/redirect/f3ebac8b-c24a-4e07-89e3-69a6ce092ed3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) through everything from [floods](https://substack.com/redirect/2679611d-d6fe-4787-9cb9-0966c174df37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [hurricanes](https://substack.com/redirect/f3ebac8b-c24a-4e07-89e3-69a6ce092ed3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to storms and [fires](https://substack.com/redirect/8f0ede1d-9461-4960-9351-dc0960cf535a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Yet Washington's bipartisan priority remains sending weapons to Ukraine.
Militarism not only offers a distraction from climate chaos, it actively contributes to the global climate catastrophe. American support for Ukraine included a covert operation to [bomb civilian energy infrastructure](https://substack.com/redirect/5f20bf12-c1fa-4cf9-95a0-c6720ca185e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The attack on the Nordstream pipeline entailed the greatest release of methane in human history, and was documented by the same journalist who [exposed U.S. Marines who committed a massacre](https://substack.com/redirect/9f68946a-f0b2-408e-b54f-86991f4acf99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), killing hundreds of Vietnamese civilians at the village of My Lai, in 1968.
As transparently foolish and ridiculous as it may be for Washington to continue enabling war and [accelerating](https://substack.com/redirect/288ca4e9-90f6-4a7b-b408-3f9f55796e74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the climate catastrophe, while millions of Americans struggle to subsist without food, shelter, or medicine, last week offered an even more glaring indication of the Pentagon's institutional failures--and continuing need for accountability that our co-opted policymakers in Washington are poorly poised to provide.
Having challenged military industrial corruption in the electoral arena--only to face a character assassination that ended my career, and the continuing suppression of my voice on some corporate social media platforms--I rely on readers to share my writing. Please share this post with your friends!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137361228&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3MzYxMjI4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTU1OTA4NTYsImV4cCI6MTY5ODE4Mjg1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-XoRq_UCm9xqGSg93lZ2p-BLMvt6O-kLPyiY7x-M8Qk)
The absurd spectacle of the Pentagon asking the public to help it find a missing fighter plane, when the federal government can't help struggling working people find homes, is a fitting juxtaposition that exposes the reality of life in the United States today. ...
