| | **Yesterday, I announced that I'm running to represent New Jersey in the United States Senate**. **I want to make sure you know why, and [I hope you'll take a minute to chip in to take our movement to the next level. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290068/428900645/-1197072038?refcode=2023-09-24-senateannounce&recurring=0&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6aece5d6-215b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWVjZTVkNi0yMTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO7qnwcrT2faI8L_iFw7VFMEidCgWtUNe2nHb7Kp4aM=)** [donate today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290069/428900646/-1197072038?refcode=2023-09-24-senateannounce&recurring=0&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6aece5d6-215b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWVjZTVkNi0yMTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO7qnwcrT2faI8L_iFw7VFMEidCgWtUNe2nHb7Kp4aM=) **I've long said that no one in America is above the law** , regardless of their job title or personal politics. That's the foundation of our justice system. So when elected officials of either party are accused of abusing the public trust, as Senator Bob Menendez was last week, I take those charges very seriously, and I hope the judicial system works thoroughly and quickly to bring this truth to light. In the meantime, I do not have confidence that the Senator can properly focus on our state and its people while responding to the allegations. But, facing multiple calls to resign from leaders in both parties and at all levels of government, Senator Menendez defiantly announced, "I am not going anywhere." New Jersey deserves better leadership in Washington. **That's why I am stepping up.****[Will you chip in today to help our movement rebuild faith in our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290070/428900647/-1197072038?refcode=2023-09-24-senateannounce&recurring=0&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6aece5d6-215b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWVjZTVkNi0yMTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO7qnwcrT2faI8L_iFw7VFMEidCgWtUNe2nHb7Kp4aM=)** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290071/428900648/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-09-24-senateannounce&refcode2=6aece5d6-215b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWVjZTVkNi0yMTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO7qnwcrT2faI8L_iFw7VFMEidCgWtUNe2nHb7Kp4aM=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290072/428900649/-1197072038?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-09-24-senateannounce&refcode2=6aece5d6-215b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWVjZTVkNi0yMTViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO7qnwcrT2faI8L_iFw7VFMEidCgWtUNe2nHb7Kp4aM=)

New Jerseyans need hard-working, trustworthy elected leaders focused on the common good and bringing integrity and civility back into our politics. **I don't take this on lightly – I didn't intend to run for Senate – but we can't jeopardize the Senate or compromise our country's integrity.**
**I hope you'll support our campaign; it's going to be a tough fight, but I know that together, we will make sure New Jersey has the leadership we deserve.** As always, I'm honored to stand at your side in this work.
More soon,
_Andy_

clean_body: | | | | Yesterday, I announced that I'm running to represent New Jersey in the United States Senate. I want to make sure you know why, and = = I've long said that no one in America is above the law , regardless of their job title or personal politics. That's the foundation of our justice system. So when elected officials of either party are accused of abusing the public trust, as Senator Bob Menendez was last week, I take those charges very seriously, and I hope the judicial system works thoroughly and quickly to bring this truth to light. In the meantime, I do not have confidence that the Senator can properly focus on our state and its people while responding to the allegations. But, facing multiple calls to resign from leaders in both parties and at all levels of government, Senator Menendez defiantly announced, "I am not going anywhere." New Jersey deserves better leadership in Washington. That's why I am stepping up.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = New Jerseyans need hard-working, trustworthy elected leaders focused on the common good and bringing integrity and civility back into our politics. I don't take this on lightly – I didn't intend to run for Senate – but we can't jeopardize the Senate or compromise our country's integrity. I hope you'll support our campaign; it's going to be a tough fight, but I know that together, we will make sure New Jersey has the leadership we deserve. As always, I'm honored to stand at your side in this work. More soon, Andy = | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: This month is so important to me, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290717/428900977/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.24_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mjEmhCGcFx8k_V0E_RWZKK3xaJ63Mh44QkOdxlLodY=)
Happy Hispanic Heritage Month, Peter.

_As a proud Latina, Hispanic Heritage Month represents an exciting time for my family._ I was raised by immigrant parents who instilled the values of hard work, dedication, and community into me from a young age. They inspired me to break barriers, go to college, and ultimately work in public service - _first as a pediatrician and now as a Congresswoman._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290718/428900978/535544092?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.24_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mjEmhCGcFx8k_V0E_RWZKK3xaJ63Mh44QkOdxlLodY=)
**It’s not lost on me that I’m the first Latina elected to represent the Colorado delegation in the House of Representatives.** It’s an honor and a privilege to bring my perspective to and represent my community in Congress.

**[But as you know, to keep fighting for the Latino community, we have a lot of work to do - and I have a tough fight ahead. Republicans are already spending six figures to flip this seat, but I’m going to need your help to stay in Congress. Can I count on your donation to my reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290719/428900979/535544092?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.24_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mjEmhCGcFx8k_V0E_RWZKK3xaJ63Mh44QkOdxlLodY=)**

Thank you, Peter. This month, I’m so grateful to be recognizing and celebrating the Latino community that has shaped me and made the U.S. thrive.

_Yadira Caraveo_
****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290720/428900980/535544092?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.24_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YThmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mjEmhCGcFx8k_V0E_RWZKK3xaJ63Mh44QkOdxlLodY=)****

body:
I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.

| | Hi friend, I’m writing to ask if you will make a $5 contribution to our campaign today. **[I want to take a minute to explain why this request matters to our campaign, but if you are ready to help us hold Pennsylvania, you can chip in at this link to split a donation between my campaign and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur, who is in a tough district running for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290725/428900987/-2130633652?refcode=230924_bc_split_l1&ms=230924_bc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8tl-DIpLC8lCevbugZYLVTYtRDq0O9R7_GyblF2oYM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_bc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_el1)** $5 may not sound like much. It’s about the price of a couple waters, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak. But the truth is, when enough folks chip in a few dollars whenever they can – whether it’s $50, $25, or even $5 – it makes a difference. And the stakes of this race are high. National Republicans are going to pull out all the stops to flip PA. They see the Commonwealth as key to their path to taking back the Senate majority and the White House, which is why we have to build a strong campaign now. I know we have what it takes to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us. We made history by electing Josh Shapiro and John Fetterman in 2022, and we’re going to need that same momentum on our side to win in 2024. **[So if you’re able, will you split $5 between my re-election campaign and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur? I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290726/428900988/-2130633652?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_l1&ms=230924_bc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8tl-DIpLC8lCevbugZYLVTYtRDq0O9R7_GyblF2oYM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_bc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_el2)** **[Contribute $15](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_bc?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_el3)** **[Contribute $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_bc?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_el3)** **[Contribute $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_bc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50?refcode=230914_mk_delivered_el3)** We are building a campaign of supporters across Pennsylvania and the country, and I’m proud to have you on our team. With gratitude,
Bob
---
| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.

**Can you donate now to help Democrat Marcy Kaptur win in one of the most competitive races in the whole country?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290727/428900989/1037629634?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=9b8fe38c-225b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=230924_bc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8tl-DIpLC8lCevbugZYLVTYtRDq0O9R7_GyblF2oYM=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70290728/428900990/1037629634?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=9b8fe38c-225b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=230924_bc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmZTM4Yy0yMjViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8tl-DIpLC8lCevbugZYLVTYtRDq0O9R7_GyblF2oYM=)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Quentin Fulks
subject: A race to the bottom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Our team must be ready to win in 2024. We can't do that without your support. | | |
---
Peter, In just a few days, the extreme slate of MAGA Republican presidential candidates will head to Simi Valley, California for their second debate. **Truth be told: It doesn’t matter who “wins” the debate on Wednesday. Every one of the Republican presidential candidates are racing to the far right to pander to Donald Trump’s MAGA crowd.** Meanwhile, President Biden and Vice President Harris have:
✅ Lowered the costs of families’ everyday expenses while helping steadily create jobs
✅ Taken action to safeguard access to abortion and support women crossing state lines to receive care
✅ Passed the most significant federal gun violence reduction legislation in 30 years
✅ Worked to rebuild nationwide infrastructure from the ground up

_and much more..._

body:
I’m not afraid to take on corporations from Monsanto to Mobil. Want to join me?

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=canoe_non_donor_1&n=1)

Peter, I’m running for President because I’ve spent a lot of time learning how to take back power from corporations and the government agencies they’ve captured. In the last 40 years, I’ve taken on the most powerful corporations on the planet and beat them in the courtroom time and time again. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/a-few-days-left-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=canoe_non_donor_1&n=2) On the Hudson River, I took on General Electric for polluting the water with PCBs. I beat Monsanto in the courtroom over glyphosate causing cancer. I’ve fought the biggest polluters and won legal victories that others thought were impossible. I’ve also sued Merck, Pfizer, Google, Facebook, and most of the federal agencies that are currently putting our rights and public health at risk. Each time, I’ve helped brave communities of dedicated citizens win victories for their wellbeing. Now I want to do the same for our country. The corporations know I will continue my work as President by cleaning up the federal agencies they now control. That’s why they’re so desperate to slow this campaign and muffle our voice. **As President, I will completely transform these agencies into allies of the public interest.** **Right now, we have an urgent September 30****th****FEC deadline coming up — in less than 6 days our fundraising numbers will be made public again. clean_body: I’m not afraid to take on corporations from Monsanto to Mobil. Want to join me? | Peter, I’m running for President because I’ve spent a lot of time learning how to take back power from corporations and the government agencies they’ve captured. In the last 40 years, I’ve taken on the most powerful corporations on the planet and beat them in the courtroom time and time again. On the Hudson River, I took on General Electric for polluting the water with PCBs. I beat Monsanto in the courtroom over glyphosate causing cancer. I’ve fought the biggest polluters and won legal victories that others thought were impossible. I’ve also sued Merck, Pfizer, Google, Facebook, and most of the federal agencies that are currently putting our rights and public health at risk. Each time, I’ve helped brave communities of dedicated citizens win victories for their wellbeing. Now I want to do the same for our country. The corporations know I will continue my work as President by cleaning up the federal agencies they now control. That’s why they’re so desperate to slow this campaign and muffle our voice. As President, I will completely transform these agencies into allies of the public interest. body:

Josh Hawley wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and what you do with your own body. He’s so obsessed with telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him — he's even got a whole book about it!

I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

**I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections.**

---|---|---
Representative Chip Roy (TX-21) tweeted a response to a breaking news alert that said members of Congress would be heading home from Washington D.C. for the week. In his response, Roy can be quoted as saying, "We should not leave town - our border is on fire & we have to get our job done."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/21983c83-247e-496f-9e0d-e9eeacf148ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While Chip Roy may want to portray himself as a politician who is 'holding down the fort' in Washington D.C., his actions paint a different picture. In fact, when Chip Roy posted this tweet, he wasn't even in Washington D.C. On Friday, September 22, Roy attended a high-dollar fundraiser in San Antonio, Texas for Republican candidate for President and absentee Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/de64b10d-f1ea-4463-80cd-0e6c7036765b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is quite fitting that amid talks of a possible government shutdown that absentee Congressman Chip Roy is fundraising with the absentee Governor of Florida in Texas.
I responded to this tweet by Representative Chip Roy with evidence from one of my most recent Substack posts which shows Roy was set to be a featured host of DeSantis's San Antonio fundraiser that was held on Friday. Roy has yet to issue any response to the damning evidence that I have published, including the fact that DeSantis's fundraiser in San Antonio was also hosted by former Congressman Lamar Smith, who is currently registered as a foreign agent.
## [EXCLUSIVE: Ron DeSantis To Attend Texas Fundraisers Hosted By Funders Of J6 Committee Members](https://substack.com/redirect/72a2c78e-6487-48c0-9437-e32e707997df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

In my[ exclusive report](https://substack.com/redirect/72a2c78e-6487-48c0-9437-e32e707997df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I detailed the fact that Lamar Smith, a prolific DeSantis donor and supporter, has donated to the re-election campaign of vicious J6 committee member and radical leftist Congressman Jamie Raskin. Instead of doing his elected duties in Congress amid conversations surrounding a possible government shutdown, Chip Roy was fundraising for DeSantis alongside the individuals who are funding the weaponization of government and the radical communist Democrats that Roy claims he 'stands against' in D.C.
Not only did Chip Roy abandon D.C. during talks of a potential government shutdown, he also lied about it on Twitter. His continued allegiance to Ron DeSantis and his hopeless Presidential campaign are simply an added insult to the Republican voter base that Roy continues to lie to.
This isn't the first time Rep. Chip Roy, who has endorsed Ron DeSantis for Presdient, has been caught attending one of DeSantis's campaign fundraisers with dubious characters. On June 23, 2023, my team Team spotted Congressman Chip Roy and confronted him as he was walking into the CCP tied Ron DeSantis campaign fundraiser in DC that took place at the law office of a law firm that represented Dominion Voting Systems. The fundraiser was co-sponsored by Marc Lampkin, a lobbyist for Moderna, one of the largest COVID 19 Vaccine manufactures. Lampkin is also a lobbyist for AbbVie, the maker of LUPRON, which is a drug used to chemically castrate children who are undergoing gender transition.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/2f7d7628-8520-4f5d-a65d-55d7952ff67a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is also worth nothing that Chip Roy voted 'YES' on a continued resolution last week that would continue to fund radical and deranged prosecutor Jack Smith in his witch hunt against President Trump. Is it a coincidence that Roy, who has fundraised with DeSantis , is supporting the continuation of President Trump's political persecution?
I don't think so. Where there is smoke, there is fire, and there is no such thing as a coincidence.
Chip Roy is an embarrassment to the great people of Texas. I caught him in a bald-faced lie, and have shown how DeSantis and many of his donors continue to display their lack of integrity and honesty. At the end of the day, Chip Roy and Ron DeSantis are two absentee losers who have accomplished nothing for the American people.
They truly deserve each other!

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Toe-to-toe with Fidel Castro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, when I was a journalist, I went toe-to-toe with the communist dictator Fidel Castro. Here’s what I learned: **socialists are cowards.** They’re so scared of being challenged that they need to control **_everything_** __ around them at the expense of other people’s freedom. **The truth is, today’s socialist Democrats are looking to impose on us their failed policies.** They want power and control. They want to silence anyone who dares to tell the truth about them. And they want to destroy American values like liberty, faith, and hard work. **My family escaped Fidel Castro’s rule. They were some of the lucky ones. But I know that not everyone was so lucky, and that’s why I’m fighting to make sure socialism NEVER comes to our great country.** **[That interview is a major reason why I decided to run for Congress. I have NEVER been so proud to be an American, and I hope to continue my work in Congress in 2024.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2135fbc25e1c4b0cb5cf0fda28974c9e&_e=eyAupCI9KWNnIAJ52-IH8QD8t50PH2xeiaQ9LDpA4LteVxgCSM4vlNG7VcQ-sFIqnI_1hBgZtcjVY3ZeilmbkV5X6ioFehb5_NJPHrRvxPhs5knuMJAvtsZrG1rUToEKIVdPGisDCQ53EhCtkzNBf6Pu09YU2mqIrxXt_QTPDdSYFlldoJ7t_v8OXt-LIUIy0RVNxF6mPX1U_q-aEH9bxOmLvF0qovMmNZhHGxOaIKiVkn0PshViRS7Yft25C2CvJ5ZIlBBCX7Lmfse-ZdD2S8HinnJ7I3MR79yCO-QR5XykVBzgSfBRb4cbQcNk2EJKElzRSOSGZKQ6zu8-ds5-dMuuxkzHHWLmdkn-TuaCz4w%3D)** Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Wake up, America!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Late Friday, a federal judge struck down California's law banning the possession of large-capacity firearm magazines.

Friends -
Late Friday, a federal judge struck down California's law banning the possession of large-capacity firearm magazines.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2893?t=1&akid=1581%2E4767699%2EkCeMEz)
It's time to wake up.
Unless we pass a Constitutional Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence, we are at the mercy of ideologue judges like this -- the same judge who compared the AR-15 to a Swiss Army knife.
All of our gun safety laws that are proven to save lives are at risk.
Invalidating laws we pass. Invalidating what the voters decide.
Concealed carry. Banning weapons of war. Reasonable waiting periods. Background checks.
Radical right-wing judges will come for all of them.
This is EXACTLY why I’ve called for a Constitutional amendment, and this is why I’ll keep fighting to defend our right to protect ourselves from gun violence.
\- Gavin
* * *
👋🏻**Wait! Don't click away yet!** 🇺🇸
California just became the first state to call for a Constitutional Amendment on gun violence.
But we can’t stop there.
Please make a contribution to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy PAC today and EVERY dollar we raise will go right toward a campaign to introduce and pass resolutions calling for a Constitutional Amendment in more states.
There has been interest, and we have heard from several states already, but it will take hard work – and resources – to get it done.
[**If that sounds worth it, please contribute $20, or whatever you can afford today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-sept23?refcode=em230924-1-15&refcode2=1581_4767699_kCeMEz&akid=1581%2E4767699%2EkCeMEz)

name: Greg Landsman
subject: A note before the week begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70297499/428905082/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_msg_2023.09.24_b1_gl_all&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk4NDdkZi0yYzViLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zc2ycSlbFH2u1Nae_DZGbEk_pCqerNUKJUFGV5UjZXM=) Hey there, Greg here.

You’re going to hear a lot from my team this week, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why. **This Saturday at midnight, we’re facing the biggest deadline of our re-election campaign to date,** and I’m going to need your support to reach our goal in time.

We are __required by law__ to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to July 1st.

And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country it’s especially important that we report a big number and show we have what it takes to win again next November.

**That’s why I’m coming to you today. This week, I’m going to be relying on our grassroots team more than ever before, and I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me about how important you are to this team.**

Successfully defending this seat won’t be easy, but OH-01 is worth fighting for. And I know we can rise to the occasion, just like we have every time before.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_

clean_body: = Hey there, Greg here. You’re going to hear a lot from my team this week, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why. This Saturday at midnight, we’re facing the biggest deadline of our re-election campaign to date, and I’m going to need your support to reach our goal in time. We are required by law to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to July 1st. And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country it’s especially important that we report a big number and show we have what it takes to win again next November. That’s why I’m coming to you today. This week, I’m going to be relying on our grassroots team more than ever before, and I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me about how important you are to this team. Successfully defending this seat won’t be easy, but OH-01 is worth fighting for. And I know we can rise to the occasion, just like we have every time before. Appreciate you, Greg PS. name: (2) TAKE ACTION via Malamed HQ
subject: re: Keep PragerU out of our schools!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**PragerU is invading our public schools to push a far-right agenda:** [_Sign our petition to keep PragerU out of our schools!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=1&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)
---

**Public education is under attack:** From DeSantis’s book bans to erasing slavery from the syllabus, a small nonprofit called PragerU is leading the disinformation charge.

PragerU makes videos that will be shown in Florida and Oklahoma classrooms where cartoons explain the “benefits” of slavery, how Christopher Columbus meant no harm to native Americans, and why renewable energies are “unreliable.”

_**Even the nonprofit’s founder admitted that their material is specifically designed for indoctrination.**_

[But here’s what you can do about it:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=2&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_) [_Sign our petition today to tell your local leaders to keep PragerU out of our schools!!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=3&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)

[SIGN ON:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=4&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)

[_*We need 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight*_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=5&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)
The introduction of PragerU materials in schools is a national concern, not just local. Parents and educators must be aware of the skewed perspectives these materials offer, often masked as "alternative viewpoints."

We believe in an education system that provides a balanced view of the world, allowing students to form their own opinions. PragerU's one-sided content undermines this principle and threatens the quality of our education.

Our children deserve an education that equips them with the tools to think critically and independently. Let's ensure that our schools remain a place for unbiased learning, not a platform for propaganda.

[RIGHT NOW:](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=6&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_) [_Sign our petition to keep PragerU OUT of our public schools for good!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/121?t=7&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)

Thank you,
Malamed HQ
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=459%2E8507%2EW5EAn_)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

Water Protectors,
---
Last Friday, despite so many of us driving calls and emails to lawmakers, the NC General Assembly passed the regulatory reform act known as HB600. A devastating act against NC waterways. One of the reps behind the bill has said it was intended to expedite MVP Southgate. Read the details and Crystal’s response on the [7DS blog](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YjnDi4aM7sFjzp91rHkMKc0_m3vR9QR5I1fQy7VFy-3ZW6yveNKuqO_guhh4abaC_Blzr-c-xgqZqVeuukPLMw__mOYbC2XjQ4bTz4qiiESSB9UIBi5yDRVGxlCSlqxfimyHZjIR0bNRnJraMnJGrehkOsuYBRoz070PobiElEkuA534GVarrPEA09yBi1ymC372kglq1gf7rDs6Jiz71f0bXq2P_w-ag4v4swfv1Fn-lo1WHfqDEozxzsCSH6zOqtjHJttn3Ng7AD4sxu7j8dI0BnmhuPu2Ki6NxqlewJWffMg9GJPGTww63_Gd_s-V_TEZaDt2G4hcyo6ur_tmC4m/3zv/RNn8mak4RpSM696l0teKtw/h1/CqkTM1SW-9qCEG08eh2mugi0W7saXgpt1d53tPmXi10). name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: Eigel Campaign TORCHES Woke Liberals Globally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
Last week, a Republican fundraiser in St Charles County turned into a global firestorm... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12652759?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| | The end of the quarter is approaching, and I need you to ***[ DONATE NOW](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4ea88eeb7d&e=c00a6982d2)***

Last week, a Republican fundraiser in St. Charles County turned into a global firestorm after Senator Nick Schroer and I demonstrated a couple flamethrowers on a pile of empty cardboard boxes.
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=47b7ffb409&e=c00a6982d2)
---

Liberals and RINOs took to Twitter and [spread LIES](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=5e261cb836&e=c00a6982d2). It’s telling that liberals have to resort to lies and attacks to protect their phony and disgusting agenda.

**I went to X (formerly known as Twitter)[ to set the record straight](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=fd64ebcbdc&e=c00a6982d2): **

They had me **BANNED** & **CENSORED** on social media for saying that I would **PROTECT OUR CHILDREN**.
---

***[ DONATE NOW](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=95f4d44176&e=c00a6982d2)***
| [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=e80d4efe65&e=c00a6982d2)
---
The WOKE media went after me.

**“[Candidate for Missouri governor uses flamethrower, threatens book burning](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=1b9e4a77c1&e=c00a6982d2)”**
– _St. Louis Post Dispatch_

Let me say this loud and clear – you’re **_darn right_ **I will burn any woke, pornographic book that’s brought into our schools to BRAINWASH our kids. **That’s my promise to you.

*[DONATE NOW](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=6a8a7409f8&e=c00a6982d2)***

They can spread lies, they can try to censor our message, but they will never break us.

I will not apologize for standing up for what’s right.

I will not apologize for defending our kids from liberal brainwashing.

I will NOT STOP FIGHTING.

But I need you with me in this fight. We’ve got a long way to go and this is only the beginning.

***[ DONATE NOW](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=9e07a87bd8&e=c00a6982d2)***

More outlets have reported on this than I can count, but to name a few who have released articles (linked below): [Fox News](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=836dd603ca&e=c00a6982d2), [LifeSite News](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4159d92045&e=c00a6982d2), [The Kansas City Star](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=092d22048a&e=c00a6982d2), [The New York Post](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=d1b37e2d24&e=c00a6982d2), [USA Today](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=97e7bb17a0&e=c00a6982d2), [The Associated Press](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=68ab39dc39&e=c00a6982d2), [Business Insider](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b65a91f34f&e=c00a6982d2),[ FOX 2 Now](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=02d7f3e2a0&e=c00a6982d2).

***[ DONATE NOW](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4e0c8c2d1f&e=c00a6982d2)***

---

**LET'S GO, MISSOURI!**
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b9f2bdd223&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")

---
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=af56def0f8&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=accebbf666&e=c00a6982d2)

You can [update your preferences](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=9b0c0adba7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=9b0c0adba7).

name: Lacey, Porter Campaign Manager
subject: My focus for this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’ve been outraised two quarters in a row now.
Hey Derek,
Lacey here. I’m Katie Porter’s Campaign Manager, and this week I’m laser-focused on our fundraising numbers, because our end-of-quarter deadline is on Saturday.
I promise this isn’t just about hitting a goal for my own sake! We’ve been outraised two quarters in a row now. **But posting a strong number will show our opponents’ super PAC that we have the grassroots support to win this race.**
Not meeting our goal could mean real trouble for our campaign later on.
With a third of voters still undecided, every dollar counts and allows us to reach voters up and down the state. **That’s why I’m reaching out to supporters like you to see if you can pitch in before Saturday. You can use this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-2?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230924-2?refcode=EMAL24_2_PLA_20230924_V1_F&refcode2=30401_3422442_w3z-Eo&akid=30401%2E3422442%2Ew3z-Eo)**
Thanks for considering it, we can’t do this without you!
Lacey

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=1&akid=30401%2E3422442%2Ew3z-Eo)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=30401%2E3422442%2Ew3z-Eo)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: | Bennett, Speaker McCarthy has tapped me to run the Impeachment Inquiry into Joe Biden 's extensive criminal wrongdoing. With Courage, James | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress

name: Rick Scott
subject: We can't let them outraise us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

**My Democrat opponents are on a mission to outraise us before the end of this quarter.**

_I know you’re not about to let them._

While we still have time, I’m going to need every member of my team to step up before the end of the quarter in _less than a week._

**[Can you pitch in now and help us meet our end of quarter goal to defend Florida?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=92dda65e084449eb8518287440bd838b&_e=FRdBK1irr2CFsBkD9WC_POYbFhvpbdoHrHnwQtdJLmHcuJnUw1Uq_4eDf66mnb23OPILbfSNQEGJj3VnBratrt1S0s5SJQBbD1YgieOL8-oJ7tWUU2fN_CMXlmyKYchISwZcUL8IgCgq-JomKI5F7H-RBcl-FufueSszvrvggp8SuVgOLLZesRovuVbeYy8P8mTwvgZouOt8WoAbpbmtEzRwUw_gKpAx7XOT1UqW7i7vQzr2vLYnyldSi5BGvCk2_s3U7lzrpd71BkUIoKmRkYiVi0SIGU8PHIm6IPcueFHPpFsrQc_UPcs1tm_5n3kNDP2jO-oEn2vV2ugh3xrbfH_1DcnjSMJBsUpFzCMF3xY%3D)**

**It’s simple: if we don’t hold onto this seat, all of our chances of taking back the Senate majority are shot.**

That means we’ll lose our chance to fix Joe Biden’s mess and America will be stuck with _at least_ two more years of the radical Left.

If we don’t take back our majority, I’m worried about what America will look like in the future. _**But we can’t save our great country if we don’t meet this critical goal.** _

**[Please, help us meet our end of quarter deadline ASAP to DEFEND this seat and take back the Senate!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=92dda65e084449eb8518287440bd838b&_e=FRdBK1irr2CFsBkD9WC_POYbFhvpbdoHrHnwQtdJLmHcuJnUw1Uq_4eDf66mnb23OPILbfSNQEGJj3VnBratrt1S0s5SJQBbD1YgieOL8-oJ7tWUU2fN_CMXlmyKYchISwZcUL8IgCgq-JomKI5F7H-RBcl-FufueSszvrvggp8SuVgOLLZesRovuVbeYy8P8mTwvgZouOt8WoAbpbmtE7gKX4hBPryQBs8SzR3ZD1iWWyJvxiZHdYzMRy01HeM0M3Sw_nERetpRXnTl9ZvEvteJ8m-BUw8xfEF9wJbancVma8u4UwC-T9FvunX0inrPyk0-u_h6y9RFT5VHQ7yHQfvRU8MAe8mRehQmGOPyU-w%3D)**

name: Joe Kent
subject: My deadline is almost here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
My filing deadline is coming up at Midnight on September 30th - less than a week away! Can you please help my campaign with a contribution today?
Show your support at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jse9wzv636m8927LgnmvwFbg/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw).
Last election, I lost by less than **one percentage point**. My campaign was outspent 6-to-1 in the General Election by Marie Perez, a radical Democrat with financial support from major establishment donors.
You can help ensure we are not outspent this cycle by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jse9wzv636m8927LgnmvwFbg/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw).
When I am in Congress, I will work to secure our border, protect parents' rights, and tackle the rampant inflation hurting everyday Americans.
The Republican Party is unified in its support for me as the 2024 nominee. I am endorsed by the Washington State Republican Party and my district's local county parties.
But the mission can only succeed if we are able to raise the money to go on offense! Please contribute at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jse9wzv636m8927LgnmvwFbg/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw) to help us hit our goal before the month ends!
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
P.S. - Win a trip to WA state to go target shooting with me by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/jse9wzv636m8927LgnmvwFbg/h4fShd7xhXf6z8w892xc9mKw).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---

body:
Could you complete this crucial survey for me? | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04ebb12cead347719af465bcae7cbc41&_e=w5ZwOd4PxqQuwOep2Cu43ffhnX-ur3PYYK6DyI3E13baH8Qd9BSKRjV2hm2lePG9NY6sWwjFL1PBzBU4876Y1-tMdNjA8Eg_-bZudO8jt4Rar-2N0O6OAHv1vNG3BTLcwaFjnyBG4XU5PQlJm1BBVIxhGWjipR7I--BBNEXDscgngvpp_-7tnAKw3dIH0iLCcH6tHQAe2h5ZBFswG_uklIK_uW9gvUnvGbNXU4E5F5yuetI17FWEluCjVQNFy3aHDg_67jHcA3SmVg7OM54S1b9YWpUC5PngA6qiQuXGHOYJJW1_y-9MLVXzV6Bz1UpejYY2X4jC1vRIkxZqn8thPOs_dII1uFf_zPNo4sAgnKZ3L_4oSGgOv5XRkNEyzsMuq6twTX0u_140XisXzSuhOyqm4JRSJM5AOjd4KVjg0GDJwZ_DymdJ7AFauRR1BBDGNA2HGDCFmm0AG1gbHwV7Lg%3D%3D)
Patriot, Don Jr. here.

As a loyal supporter of my father, I’m reaching out on behalf of Senate Republicans [**_because they desperately need your help._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04ebb12cead347719af465bcae7cbc41&_e=w5ZwOd4PxqQuwOep2Cu43ffhnX-ur3PYYK6DyI3E13baH8Qd9BSKRjV2hm2lePG9NY6sWwjFL1PBzBU4876Y1-tMdNjA8Eg_-bZudO8jt4Rar-2N0O6OAHv1vNG3BTLcwaFjnyBG4XU5PQlJm1BBVIxhGWjipR7I--BBNEXDscgngvpp_-7tnAKw3dIH0iLCcH6tHQAe2h5ZBFswG_uklIK_uW9gvUnvGbNXU4E5F5yuetI17FWEluCjVQNFy3aHDg_67jHcA3SmVg7OM54S1b9YWpUC5PngA6qiQuXGHOYJJW1_y-9MLVXzV6Bz1UpeqA7vNxmaJeL8C08iVd7LuKrRV968qL-TDSjJTh9Y5LdfXFGjuvzzPEgAQR10x5s5NN1pK32VJ-ldvNaETvTEUOofZANmUCO0nK__PD0ZepYHva4ctjfC5CrFu6VNRENjcJVjkvjum5E9YueM7lOA1g%3D%3D)

After reviewing your donor profile, I believe you are the right person for this job.

In Quarter 2, Democrats have raised an astronomical amount of money and it appears we are falling behind.

[**However, I’m not asking for money to help out Senate Republicans. I’m asking for input.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04ebb12cead347719af465bcae7cbc41&_e=w5ZwOd4PxqQuwOep2Cu43ffhnX-ur3PYYK6DyI3E13baH8Qd9BSKRjV2hm2lePG9NY6sWwjFL1PBzBU4876Y1-tMdNjA8Eg_-bZudO8jt4Rar-2N0O6OAHv1vNG3BTLcwaFjnyBG4XU5PQlJm1BBVIxhGWjipR7I--BBNEXDscgngvpp_-7tnAKw3dIH0iLCcH6tHQAe2h5ZBFswG_uklIK_uW9gvUnvGbNXU4E5F5yuetI17FWEluCjVQNFy3aHDg_67jHcA3SmVg7OM54S1b9YWpUC5PngA6qiQuXGHOYJJW1_y-9MLVXzV6Bz1Upei8D4EzatCNn8h05p0uW_N9ett_lpOJyLY4tsxthQjE0gbTUybh7QYi9JjKRTT4w1MiGKRXuVVWZ6AnrkONO0GrN5xeqF0_wf59lZNdCinml3qzj95_FcVEW2H1Rd2KyWRahqVk4zxSKMsgr4W0-4mg%3D%3D)
Senate Republicans need your help strategizing their next steps. If we strategize correctly, then money won’t matter.

I’ve put together a strategy survey that I need you to complete.

Once you’re done, I’ll send it over to Senate Republicans.

[**Please don’t let me down and complete it RIGHT NOW. >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04ebb12cead347719af465bcae7cbc41&_e=w5ZwOd4PxqQuwOep2Cu43ffhnX-ur3PYYK6DyI3E13baH8Qd9BSKRjV2hm2lePG9NY6sWwjFL1PBzBU4876Y1-tMdNjA8Eg_-bZudO8jt4Rar-2N0O6OAHv1vNG3BTLcwaFjnyBG4XU5PQlJm1BBVIxhGWjipR7I--BBNEXDscgngvpp_-7tnAKw3dIH0iLCcH6tHQAe2h5ZBFswG_uklIK_uW9gvUnvGbNXU4E5F5yuetI17FWEluCjVQNFy3aHDg_67jHcA3SmVg7OM54S1b9YWpUC5PngA6qiQuXGHOYJJW1_y-9MLVXzV6Bz1UpeSsx5L7b3Oa_nilXO0SV77cn3jYxVhrPSLDlRInqNxBhARHGB4BUUE6SNs8Lj6BlDvnvGWc8CLDb-DOui4UshHnJ2l9Ne7L2oTYqj9jJE_IejU2uL7VlZkh1t2PgWLoxmX9q0bBKOjuA64HjBxAOz7g%3D%3D)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Competitive edge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
This is going to be the most competitive Senate race in the country — and the result is going to be close.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)

Friends -
We have said it before, but it bears repeating: While we are hearing there are still other candidates who may get into the Michigan Senate race, Mike Rogers’ announcement two weeks ago makes it all but certain that this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. And if the outcome of this one Senate race wasn't enough on its own, the path to keeping Democrats' Senate majority could likely depend on our race.
Think about the issues you care about most: well-paying jobs, abortion access, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, protecting Social Security and Medicare and more... It is no exaggeration to say the outcome of our race could impact the future of all these issues.
These are the issues where someone like Mike Rogers has voted for 20 years as a politician, so we know exactly what he will do if he wins.
Now, not only is this going to be one of the most competitive races in the country, but it will also be one of the most expensive. But it’s on this very point we have an advantage.
You see, whether it’s Mike Rogers or another Republican opponent, they will raise almost all of their money from corporate PACs and from super PACs spending millions on TV on their behalf. But most of our fundraising comes from people chipping in a few bucks at a time, and we have seen cycle after cycle that grassroots contributions can actually outraise big super PACs when everyone bands together.
**Basically, when thousands and thousands of people are giving $10, $20, $100... the big money can't keep up.** _There's no way._
Most of the individual donations to our campaign come in response to emails like this. And while we know an inbox filled with fundraising messages can be a drag at times, we hope you'll view it as a way to play a role in making progress on the issues you care about.
[**And that is why we’re asking you: Will you chip in $3 to help send Elissa Slotkin to the Senate? Every dollar we raise from one of these emails helps give us a competitive edge over our Republican opponent.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=2&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-sep23.4B2XRE&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=21&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep23.ftxq_S&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=22&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hxG7bS&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=23&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep23.Buc2ei&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=24&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep23.CyJnvg&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=25&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep23.owjc7j&refcode=em230925-1-15&t=26&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=700%2E135344%2ENGqvFk).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Help us unseat Andy Biggs and Eli Crane next November to take back the House majority and bring back a functioning government.** | | **"Congress leaves for weekend with no shutdown solution in sight"**

clean_body: We're guessing “Everybody’s working for the weekend” didn’t include House Republicans | = Team — According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, nearly 30% Americans work on the weekends. Yet House Republicans voted to check out and go home this weekend with a government shutdown just 7 days away. Help us unseat Andy Biggs and Eli Crane next November to take back the House majority and bring back a functioning government. | | "Congress leaves for weekend with no shutdown solution in sight" — Axios, Sep 21, 2023 Congress is officially heading home for the weekend after conservative hardliners once again tanked plans to fund the government, forcing House GOP leaders to abandon their latest plan to avert a shutdown on Oct. 1. | = To be clear: Andy Biggs and Eli Crane are willing to shut down the government in order to make cuts to Medicaid and food stamp programs — all critical social safety nets that thousands of hardworking Arizona families rely on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you! name: Cassi Fenili
subject: I know what it takes to win close elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

As Tony's campaign manager, I've helped lead
him to victory in close elections that only came down to a few votes per
precinct.

The most important lesson I learned from those races is that every dollar
and decision made a difference. In a close election, especially in a state
as important as Wisconsin, there is zero margin for error.

That's why, as we gear up for a 2024 presidential race with democracy and
abortion rights on the ballot, we need to start making critical
investments right now.

to help us close our $65,314 budget gap before Saturday's end-of-quarter

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70298359/428908229/1832108762?refcode=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMzZGRiNDktMzQ1Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0ZDLMYgRA7GOlDa-q2no_BDbY3s5fiHAnoMFtlBqVAo=) We’re going to all 82 counties to talk to voters that politicians have ignored for years – and our work is paying off! Recent polling shows this race TIED, 46% to 46%. [And with less than 50 days until the Election, we can’t afford to slow down. We’ve set a goal to raise $108,000 before our final quarterly public filing deadline on September 30th. Can you chip in $25 to power our campaign before these numbers go public?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70298360/428908230/1832108762?refcode=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMzZGRiNDktMzQ1Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0ZDLMYgRA7GOlDa-q2no_BDbY3s5fiHAnoMFtlBqVAo=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70298361/428908231/1832108762?refcode=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMzZGRiNDktMzQ1Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0ZDLMYgRA7GOlDa-q2no_BDbY3s5fiHAnoMFtlBqVAo=)**

Brandon is traveling to places that no politician in Mississippi has visited in years. That’s because we have to outwork Tate Reeves each and every day from now until November.
We didn’t pull $108,000 out of thin air. This is exactly what we need to raise in order to fund push cards, yard signs, and volunteer materials in every corner of the state.
If we come up short, we’ll have to make serious decisions about what part of our voter outreach program to cut. And since these numbers are going to be released publicly, Tate Reeves is going to be watching for any sign of weakness.
**But if everyone reading this email invested just $25 right now, we’d meet our goal and be on track to fire Tate Reeves in less than 50 days.**
[So, can we count on you, Peter? Make a contribution today to make sure Brandon can reach voters in all 82 counties in Mississippi.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70298362/428908232/1832108762?refcode=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b33ddb49-345b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMzZGRiNDktMzQ1Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0ZDLMYgRA7GOlDa-q2no_BDbY3s5fiHAnoMFtlBqVAo=)
